name: Election Update
subject: Should Donald Trump be held accountable for his role in the Jan. 6 insurrection?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is critical news for our democracy, friend.
| | |
---
This is critical news for our democracy, friend:

The House committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection just released _major_ findings alleging that Donald Trump and his allies engaged in a "criminal conspiracy" by trying to obstruct Congress from certifying the results of the 2020 election.

**In other words, Trump could finally be criminally charged for spreading dangerous lies about election fraud, attempting to overturn the presidential election, and inciting a deadly insurrection.**
As the GOP works overtime to shield Trump and his cronies from any and all accountability, Democrats are fighting tirelessly to secure our democracy in the face of these attacks – but we need to know where _you_ stand.
**We're looking for 5,000 folks to speak out before midnight tonight, and we're counting on you to be one of them, friend. If you're with us in the fight for accountability and justice, please answer now:**

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Romney & Cheney sitting in a tree
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING** [Privacy Policy](http://trk
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| Friend, By the time you read this, Liz Cheney will have finished one of the most exclusive and expensive fundraisers in the entire country - _all so she can fatten her campaign war chest to stay in power._ Worse yet - she's teamed up with the same elitist Never-Trumpers who've put fealty to Big Government over _We the People_ and the people of Wyoming:[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)Once again, friend, Liz Cheney could be spending her time fighting for you against Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's arrogant authoritarianism. But instead, she's wasting it at fancy cocktail parties with Mitt Romney, John Boehner, and the NeoCons who long ago sold out our country . . . And are clamoring for War with Russia! Is it any wonder? These career politicians are more beholden to CNN anchors than to you and me, and they'll do _anything_ to keep power. That's not me, friend. As you know, I've spent my entire life fighting for Wyomingites against Big Government overreach, and unlike Liz Cheney, I'll actually fight for Americans like you in Congress. But first, I'll need your help to get there. [**So I must ask, friend: Will you show your support for my America First campaign to defeat Liz Cheney with an $35 donation BEFORE the end of quarter fundraising deadline?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) I truly hope the answer is **YES**. And am asking you to use it to rush your donation to my campaign in the next 24 hours because we are scraping up against one of this year's most important filing deadlines. You should know we have our work cut out for us. Even before she turned to one of _**Jeb Bush's**_ top supporters to throw her recent fundraiser, Cheney reported a record-braking haul last year - and currently sits on $4.72 million dollars of elitist, Never-Trumper cash! It's not hard to see how she got it - after all, at her recent fundraiser with Mitt Romney, she charged "VIPs" over $10,000 just to attend! But what's truly scary? _**Liz Cheney raised that money by calling conservatives like you "crazies" and a "threat" to our Democracy, repeating the same old LIES that Democrats and the Media have spread.**_ I'm not going to let her get away with it, and I hope you won't either. So please, would you consider making a generous donation to my campaign to defeat her? Now, friend, I'm not tone deaf enough to ask my supporters for $10,000 amidst Joe Biden's self-induced inflation nightmare. I know real Americans are hurting, and that every dollar I receive from patriots like you is a blessing. **[So, if you can't quite afford to make a $35 donation to my campaign, I hope you'll make the very best donation you can.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** Because while polls show Cheney is in trouble, she can still buy her way out of it - especially if Democrat donors continue to help her. So, know that if you're able to make a large donation of $1,000 or more, that will certainly bolster my campaign as we take our message to all 98 thousand square miles of Wyoming! But, whether you can give just a few dollars for small expenses, or $1,000 dollars to help with larger expenses like TV ads, the important point is that you rush back your donation within the next 24 hours. After all, Cheney's establishment backers are powerful, and the closer we get to the election, the more we can expect career politicians like Mitt Romney to try to bail her out. Your donation, and your continued support, helps me fight back. And it helps me keep momentum in this must win race for our America First Conservative movement. And in case I haven't said it enough, friend: _Thank You._ I couldn't have made it this far without you. Your support - especially your financial support - is a tremendous blessing. And it will help us defeat Liz Cheney and put _We the People_ before Big Government. Respectfully,[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-V-nFZZx1ojg)Harriet HagemanAmerica First Conservative for Congress (WY)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)P.S. Liz Cheney continues to raise millions of dollars off glitzy fundraisers held with establishment politicians, and now that she's bringing Mitt Romney in to help her campaign, I need you to show them that our America First movement is strong and rejects their anti-Trump rhetoric and constant overtures to the Left. **[My campaign to defeat Cheney has momentum, but we can't keep it without your support. So please, would you send a generous gift of $35 in the next 24 hours?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-gMnYUow)** **DONATE** **PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING** [Privacy Policy](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDg0LTA0YjMzZjEzM2JhODQ1ZTk5M2YxYzVkN2RlMmNjMmE3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5oYWdlbWFuZm9yd3lvbWluZy5jb20vcHJpdmFjeS1wb2xpY3kifQ/M5DLS1bIa0mCz1-ILUlByg) | 2020 All Rights Reserved | info@HagemanforWyoming.com P.O. Jazz has dedicated his life to fighting for social justice, from his start as a community organizer to serving as a delegate in the Maryland House the past 5 years. We can send Jazz to be the effective progressive advocate we need for health care, education, and criminal justice reform in Congress -- but he can’t win this campaign for this critical open seat alone.
Please, rush your first donation to Jazz’s campaign to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal and fuel our people-powered movement for the change that can’t wait >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=body_link1]
By working together, we can achieve great things,
Team Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus.
Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Censorship is getting worse... much worse
body:
The Media Research Center is sounding the alarm: Big Tech is censoring conservatives, Republicans, Trump supporters, libertarian
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrekqvopiruhqhppvc309tk7svsk5oujaev9sf78_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ugrb3c76mpom0phlc5gm7c77cthjatji6thn0pb7mjim7c3jemr60stnckqeattnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchgcpqe9cr66upb8phhm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1c3h68pj2c5im49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcrdl8t4v5a1igmfudtp94ct0scr8mauquru125g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9i6coj1clh2bs)
Hello Friend,

Censorship is hitting conservative voices harder than ever before.

Here are just a few examples:
* A recent Trump interview with over 5 million views after one day was REMOVED from YouTube.

* OAN, a conservative news network, is about to be KICKED off of cable.

* Congresswoman Tulsi Gabbard's Fox News interview about Ukraine was SLAPPED with not one, but two layers of censorship.

The Media Research Center is sounding the alarm: Big Tech is censoring conservatives, Republicans, Trump supporters, libertarians, and ANYONE they disagree with... and their plans have only just begun.

It's about to get MUCH worse.

My name is Brent Bozell, I serve as the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). Our mission is to expose the leftwing bias in the media and hold them accountable for their actions.

[_**I need your help to stop the censorship, to give conservatives back their voices. Your gift empowers us to monitor and expose the leftwing bias in the media and hold them accountable. Please click here to donate $20.22, $50, $100, $250, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zahq5ba693arnrqjbqiiedjenta76270d7g8fno8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9i6coj1clh2bs)

As President Trump said, _" We don't have freedom of speech anymore. We don't have a free press. We don't have a fair press. We have a corrupt press. It's totally corrupt. It's the enemy of the people."_

**Allow me to break down Big Tech 's blueprint to censoring conservatives: **
* **The first step is simply "suppressing" information.** What does this mean? Social media networks have "algorithms" to determine how much a post, video, or photo is seen by users.

Meaning, they can artificially suppress how much people see posts from conservatives, America-First candidates for office, or from pro-liberty organizations spreading the truth. Even Google can suppress what emails you receive or send content from conservatives to your junk folder.

This is an attack on the First Amendment. [_**Help MRC expose the truth by donating today >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6c0n6r2se7kp44cq4qbm23k1eqqrrsin4tniko_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9i6coj1clh2bs)

* **Next, they use "Fact Checkers" and warning labels on the content they dislike: **This has become one of Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter's favorite tactics. These social networks hire "fact checkers" to review content that may be political and they apply warning labels to conservative content.

We can see this with Congresswoman Gabbard's interview, and YouTube's multiple layers of censorship. [_**Help MRC stop censorship by donating today >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvr202254cfhip70gfahfgjj2r9t3j1p6q65g7to_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9i6coj1clh2bs)

* Lastly, they simply BAN content: Big Tech has stopped hiding the fact they are attacking free speech and censoring conservatives.

YouTube is taking down Trump interviews. OAN is about to be kicked off cable.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqtks7lohslr7r971bii5gsr1peitje0r18bo7o0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9i6coj1clh2bs)

**Big Tech and leftwing media bias have quickly become one of the greatest threats to the United States, liberty, and the Constitution. **

I fear it's about to get worse unless American voters help expose it.

Censorship is anti-American. Our great country was founded on the words of brave men and women.

We CAN NOT allow Big Tech to destroy the First Amendment or build a culture hostile to debate, disagreements, or allow them to silence us.

Big Tech is using the internet to wage war against free speech, the truth, the America-First movement, Donald Trump, and ultimately the Constitution.

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I'm fuming
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
There’s no end to what DeSantis will do to advance his own political career. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43356456/336866220/1828375930?refcode=20220325_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjJmMzFjMy00MWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jyVPx2uOv-DJkBop1sz5wp1hOpfNbW3ylbmghORF7K0=)
---
Friend,

I won’t lie: When I think about all the terrible things Ron DeSantis has done to Florida and our people during his time as governor, I can feel my blood pressure rise. It seems there’s _no end_ to what he’ll do to advance his own political career.

DeSantis supports legislation **targeting LGBTQ+ kids in the classroom** , outright banning any discussion of gender issues and further marginalizing already vulnerable students. We should be nurturing _all_ of Florida’s future leaders, not tormenting some for political gain.

He supports **the most restrictive anti-choice legislation** in Florida’s history since _Roe v. Wade_ , banning almost all abortions with no exceptions for horrible situations like rape or incest. It’s a monstrous law, but it won him points in his primary, so he supports it.

He **neglected the science** around basic public health measures and has even gone so far as to **bully children** at one of his press events, telling them they looked “ridiculous” for refusing to conform to his political agenda.

Suffice it to say the stakes could not be higher in this November’s election. With DeSantis eyeing a run for president in 2024, there’s no telling what he’d do with a second term as governor if he thought it would help him get to the White House.

**The good news is a recent Listener Group poll shows me outright BEATING the governor in November. But to maintain that lead and get Florida back on the right track, I need your grassroots support. Will you pitch in right now to help keep up the momentum?**

name: Office of U.S. Senator Raphael Warnock
subject: Capping Insulin at $35 a Month
body:
|
---
Hi Neighbor,

I wanted to let you know about some exciting work I'm doing to fight for you in Washington.

I hear from Georgians every day that the cost of medication, especially insulin, is skyrocketing. In fact, in the past decade, insulin costs have doubled or even tripled. Georgians shouldn't have to ration insulin or ignore other bills in order to pay for this life-saving drug, yet one in four insulin users say they've skimped on insulin because of high costs. That's why I introduced the Affordable Insulin Now Act, which will cap insulin costs at $35 a month. I'm fighting to get this legislation over the finish line so we can start saving Georgians money.

I recently visited a pharmacy in Atlanta's Little Five Points neighborhood to speak with insulin users about how difficult it is for Georgians to afford their insulin. I spoke with my new friend, an eight-year-old named Evan, who was diagnosed with Type-1 diabetes when he was just two-years-old. His mother pays over $9,500 a year in health care costs to keep her son alive. Evan and his mother's stories are just one of the thousands of stories that Georgians have shared with me about the high costs of insulin. I bring these stories with me to Washington as I'm fighting to break through partisanship and bureaucracy to get this legislation over the finish line.

More than one million Georgians have diabetes, and many use insulin to treat their condition and stay healthy. This legislation will help make sure Georgians who need insulin can get it. And, lowering insulin costs is personal for me: as a pastor, I've seen up close how devastating diabetes can be if it goes untreated. I've sat with Georgians and their families as they have dealt with the complications of untreated diabetes, including kidney failure and heart disease.

Insulin users in Georgia--and across our nation--have waited long enough for Congress to act to cap exorbitant insulin costs. That's why I'm fighting to pass my Affordable Insulin Now Act as soon as possible, and I won't stop pushing until we get it done.

Keep the faith, and keep looking up.
U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock

| This is official correspondence from the Office of Senator Revered Raphael Warnock. If you have any questions, please contact our office [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=15514.7535442.5681208.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f&redir_log=51402161759365).
If you need help with a federal agency, please click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=15514.7535442.5681208.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f%3fpath%3dhelp&redir_log=904232600857435).

PRIVACY POLICY: Your e-mail address will not be shared with anyone else or sold in any way.
TO UNSUBSCRIBE, PLEASE CLICK [HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=15514.7535442.5681208.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fnewsletter-signup%2funsubscribe%2f&redir_log=564209011866492).

clean_body: [] Hey Team, Did you see this note from DASS Chair Jena Griswold yesterday? If not, we’re bumping it to the top of your inbox. DASS is facing an unprecedented challenge this November – millions of dollars from far-right billionaires and extremist activist groups are propping up ‘big lie’ supporting Republicans nationwide. [] But we can fight back and win with your help. Give Jena’s note a read, and rush $20 right now to help us hit our critical $75,000 Q1 goal and stop the far-right from destroying our democracy >> [] CHIP IN NOW >>> [] [] Hi Team – I know you’ve gotten a lot of fundraising emails from our team recently. But believe me, we wouldn’t keep emailing if the stakes weren’t so high. [] In exactly one week we face our first quarterly deadline of the year, but right now our fundraising numbers just aren’t where they need to be. Can I count on you to rush $20 right now to help DASS hit our goal and continue to protect voting rights across the country? >>> [] CHIP IN NOW >>> [] Soon, our numbers will be made public, and you better believe our opponents at the RSLC will be poring over them for any sign of weakness. With 27 Secretaries of State races across the country this November, we have our work cut out for us. But the RSLC is raking in enormous sums of cash from the far-right’s vast donor network. Last year, they announced a record-breaking fundraising haul of over $33 MILLION – and who knows how much they’ll bring in this quarter! [] I spoke with Kim and the fundraising team, and if we can raise another $75,000 from grassroots donors like you before midnight on the 31st, we’ll be in a good spot to fight back against the RSLC and win in November. Now, I know that doesn’t seem like a lot compared to what the RSLC is bringing in from mega-donors and extremist interest groups. But when regular people commit to protecting our democracy by chiping in $10 or $20 at a time, we build a grassroots movement far more powerful than one propped up by blank checks. [] And with anti-democratic extremist candidates like Mark Finchem, Jody Hice, Kristina Karamo, and Tina Peters having a very real chance of winning this year, we can’t afford to sit out on the sidelines – the future of our democracy itself is on the line. [] So, now that you know the stakes and what we’re up against, I have a personal request: Will you rush $20 to help us hit our critical Q1 goal and elect Democratic Secretaries across the country? [] RUSH $5 >>> [] RUSH $20 >>> [] RUSH $50 >>> [] RUSH $100 >>> [] ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [] Thank you, Jena Griswold DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections. Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today! Donate Now []

Friend, there’s a major energy crisis... And it’s not just here in the United States. It’s _everywhere._ And it’s not because they aren’t depending on GREEN ENERGY - for many countries - it’s BECAUSE of their reliance on green policies. They’ve banned coal, banned nuclear, and now they’re stuck relying on oil for places like Russia.

_It’s a nightmare, but the left just won’t learn the lesson from it! And that’s exactly what I told Fox News just recently.___
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znipt4ekjm336vmeaa69t87oap1unrk11ol3pbpo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9i66o76cth2bs)
---
| | **[WATCH NOW >> ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zinasrd7svaqo7po8jo98gb7pk7sj3guoi24lr68_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9i66o76cth2bs)** It’s simple for every American to see what’s happening now and come to the simple conclusion that America should be producing more of our own energy. Every type. More drilling, more coal, more wind, more solar.
We should be growing our domestic production so we are not forced to rely on foreign nations who are predictably self-interested and incredibly unstable. **_That’s what I’ll continue to fight for, Friend. _**
If you’re with me, please chip in today to support energy independence: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3937313/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z56kq26pc7710rpjbd6mkb5r31585241n9j5crqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9i66o76cth2bs)** It’s just common sense. In Liberty,Rand Paul __

We only hold the Majority by the skin of our teeth, and my good friend and colleague, Tom Malinowski, is fighting a race in New Jersey. In 2020, he only won his re-election by 1.2%. Now, he’s up for a rematch against his same opponent, this time in a newly drawn district. We need to band together with support.

clean_body: | | | Team, As you know, this year’s midterm election is perhaps one of the most important elections of our lifetimes, which is why I’m reaching out. We only hold the Majority by the skin of our teeth, and my good friend and colleague, Tom Malinowski, is fighting a race in New Jersey. In 2020, he only won his re-election by 1.2%. Now, he’s up for a rematch against his same opponent, this time in a newly drawn district. We need to band together with support. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = In Congress, Tom has been unstoppable in his focus to get COVID relief, secure infrastructure resources for New Jersey, and fight to defend our values and Democracy. It’s crucial that we re-elect Tom in November. Tom is a fighter who is unafraid to take on tough political fights. But the GOP will stop at nothing to halt the amazing work we’ve been doing in the House, and with a recent poll showing Tom in a dead heat with his opponent, the GOP is pouring even more money into this race. This is a winnable race for Tom, an outstanding campaigner, and one that we need to win as part of our national strategy to hold the House. = = Thank you for all your support, Nancy Pelosi | Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district. = = Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. Box 263 Somerville, NJ 08876 United States | | Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress

body:

| I'm working with Mike Lindell to expose election fraud and hold the perpetrators accountable. Will you help us? ->
---
| [DONATE TO HELP EXPOSE ELECTION FRAUD](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r "DONATE TO HELP EXPOSE ELECTION FRAUD")
---
| Mike just filmed this urgent video message that I told him I would share with everyone I knew:

| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)
---
| **I am proud to have Mike Lindell 's endorsement for my campaign to be an America First U.S. Senator from Missouri.** Frankly, the RINOs in DC are too chickenshit to do anything about the massive election fraud in our country, so I'm running to change that!

Do you remember this?

In June of 2020, 350 to 500 Antifa rioters attacked my home while my wife, daughter, and I were there alone. We exercised our 2nd Amendment right and held off the mob...
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)
---
| Many in the same situation would likely have left their home, but I didn't back down. I doubled down, protected my family and secured my home.

But the mob wasn't done yet.1,000 rioters came back days later. With the help of almost two dozen armed patriots, we stood up for what is right despite the dire personal risks! We turned back the mob and achieved peace through superior firepower when they reached our house the second night.

Now, as a lifelong strong Christian constitutional conservative, I am running for U.S. Senate in Missouri to defend our country with the same strength that I defended my family and home!

**I will never** **back down,** **and I will never let the socialists achieve their goals. Mike Lindell knows this, which is why he is supporting my campaign.**

**But we need your help to continue our mission to expose election fraud and restore Donald J. Trump as President of the United States! Will you send in a generous contribution of **[**$10**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)[**,**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)[**$25**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)[**,**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)[**$50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)[**,**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)[**$100**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)[**, or**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)[**even $200**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)[**to help us get it done?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59941344:67nZg6o5N:m:1:3317145305:DF7C5ECC567B2D7031B4E10AF64F11FE:r)

Patty and I are outsiders. I am the only person running for U.S. Senate in Missouri that is not now and has never been a politician. And the day of the career politician is over.

If you agree, please, help us take back our country:

name: Jerry and Deb Finkenauer
subject: Sen. Grassley has been our Senator for too long – 47 years. Our daughter will defeat him.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Abby will win if she has an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43363022/336885909/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk805-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhOGZjMC00OGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyrNThF1AabRm9tNQBmgrv4nbDQrCNC62M41X3oryro=)
Hi Peter,

That's our little girl, Abby, you're looking at – and she's going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and expand Democrats' majority in the Senate!

Back then, if you had told us our little girl would grow up to be elected to Congress and go on to challenge Sen. Chuck Grassley (who, by the way, was our senator even all those years ago!), well, we _absolutely_ would have believed you.
You see, Abby's always stuck up for what she believes in and fought for what's right. Since the age of 10, she has sat at the kitchen table with her grandfather and uncles – some of them Democrats, some of them Republicans – and talked politics. We may not have been able to give our daughter a trust fund or write a six-figure check for college, but what we did give her was her work ethic.

So as Abby grew up and saw work to be done, she signed up and _did_ the work. She won election to the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old – and then four years later, she became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic. All along the way, she's been fighting for working families like ours.
We have complete faith that Abby will work her heart out and defeat Sen. Grassley. But we've seen how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment will pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like our daughter – and right now, they have more than $41 million in the bank to protect Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans.
**This is where you come in, Peter: Abby will win if she has _ _ an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. [So will you help her raise another $10,000? Donate $5, or whatever you can right now, and every dollar will ensure Abby's campaign has what it takes to defeat top Trump ally Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43363023/336885910/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk805-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTZhOGZjMC00OGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyrNThF1AabRm9tNQBmgrv4nbDQrCNC62M41X3oryro=)**

clean_body: Abby will win if she has an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. | | | = Hi Peter, That's our little girl, Abby, you're looking at – and she's going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and expand Democrats' majority in the Senate! Back then, if you had told us our little girl would grow up to be elected to Congress and go on to challenge Sen. Chuck Grassley (who, by the way, was our senator even all those years ago!), well, we absolutely would have believed you. You see, Abby's always stuck up for what she believes in and fought for what's right. Since the age of 10, she has sat at the kitchen table with her grandfather and uncles – some of them Democrats, some of them Republicans – and talked politics. We may not have been able to give our daughter a trust fund or write a six-figure check for college, but what we did give her was her work ethic. So as Abby grew up and saw work to be done, she signed up and did the work. She won election to the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old – and then four years later, she became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic. All along the way, she's been fighting for working families like ours. We have complete faith that Abby will work her heart out and defeat Sen. Grassley. But we've seen how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment will pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like our daughter – and right now, they have more than $41 million in the bank to protect Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans. This is where you come in, Peter: Abby will win if she has an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. = | | = It means the world to our family to have you on this team. Thank you so much for supporting our daughter. Jerry and Deb Finkenauer (Abby's parents) | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. name: Team Greitens
subject: Caught Redhanded: RINOs Mitch McConnell And Karl Rove Exposed As The Masterminds Behind Latest Disgusting Smear
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Caught Redhanded: RINOs Mitch McConnell And Karl Rove Exposed As The Masterminds Behind Latest Disgusting Smear
---
| St. Louis, MO - We now know that Mitch McConnell and Karl Rove are the masterminds behind the latest unfounded and disgusting attacks on former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens. In an [explosive new report from ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zTPMvbjb-vbl5HTAtwQl-n9ZYewkFR9eRc4ErzPpVCTgws15oi8sG9LiFkiwMyN8FCMkUDr8ocXS0TYxof4bm3jAniRE825ZtA824_nvf1Np350JYO9wQ-SNvBOkpXndmd1GTWa53Gtcb3m2LKO_GymdTA1qhzAu1fUxhgAMlMjRqmNh7g-8ZOMfB6WIXIEsQ0EImy03LO3LmmH2iVZfREW8twzuAkWkr9dRudMXPaqCPjVOpUxCOH09eOL3vPZg9Jfrjlz4VCrGQGpX7utulAdV3a-iaivOaL55q7XqUJUcftaS0RwCnnttfHrlxhB8TZOnYFMHgbn0yr7iPknibLmO7d9G0MDOPEh2QFHQIfo=&c=9c9HaEhPHENhEwRnrJ0bSIigfX2qX2HeFzOOOmGPaidLlFYJTevvHg==&ch=l-E1iyjF2oKGobQuuMNfgS67K-Kde7RgfHuD6azyE2ir_pFrsrrdDA==)[Breitbart News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zTPMvbjb-vbl5HTAtwQl-n9ZYewkFR9eRc4ErzPpVCTgws15oi8sG9LiFkiwMyN8FCMkUDr8ocXS0TYxof4bm3jAniRE825ZtA824_nvf1Np350JYO9wQ-SNvBOkpXndmd1GTWa53Gtcb3m2LKO_GymdTA1qhzAu1fUxhgAMlMjRqmNh7g-8ZOMfB6WIXIEsQ0EImy03LO3LmmH2iVZfREW8twzuAkWkr9dRudMXPaqCPjVOpUxCOH09eOL3vPZg9Jfrjlz4VCrGQGpX7utulAdV3a-iaivOaL55q7XqUJUcftaS0RwCnnttfHrlxhB8TZOnYFMHgbn0yr7iPknibLmO7d9G0MDOPEh2QFHQIfo=&c=9c9HaEhPHENhEwRnrJ0bSIigfX2qX2HeFzOOOmGPaidLlFYJTevvHg==&ch=l-E1iyjF2oKGobQuuMNfgS67K-Kde7RgfHuD6azyE2ir_pFrsrrdDA==), swamp creature Karl Rove--a McConnell acolyte-- admitted he had prior knowledge of contents within an affidavit filed by Greitens' ex-wife two weeks ago, according to a prominent political donor who confirmed that on the record. This information undercuts the ex-wife's statement released earlier this week that states she did not discuss contents of her affidavit with anyone besides her lawyer before filing on Monday. While Greitens was with his boys for an eight-day vacation, his ex-wife was in Washington, D.C., and wrote, notarized, and had her allegations distributed to the press from D.C. "I love my boys. I'm a great Dad. Anyone who has seen with my kids knows it, and most importantly, my boys know it. And I'm going to protect them from these cowards like Rove and McConnell," Governor Eric Greitens said. "This sad, disgusting attempt to hurt my children and exploit my ex-wife for political gain is sadly normal operating procedure for RINOs and establishment swamp creatures. Unfortunately for them, their lies have already been proven false." "I'm proud to have been the first US Senate candidate in the country to say that when I'm elected, I'm voting Against Mitch McConnell. It's time for new, America First Leadership. Rove and McConnell are clearly desperate, to have launched such a sloppy attack, full of lies, all exposed within a few days. They want to stop me and the America First movement led by President Trump, because true patriots represent a threat to their entire cabal. We're taking our country back, and they can't stop us." On Thursday, Governor Greitens stated on a Missouri radio show: "We have a joint custody plan. We've had it for two years. In that plan, the boys spend the majority of their free time with me--they're with me all summer, they're with me all Thanksgiving break, they're with me all spring break, winter break, and they're with me every holiday weekend--Memorial Day weekend, Columbus Day weekend, President's Day, Labor Day weekend, etc. every holiday weekend. That's in addition to the time that I spend with them in Texas on weekends and school days. Now, ask yourself and ask all of your listeners, use your own judgment, if any of this were remotely true--if there was even a shred of truth to these false allegations from supposedly four years ago--would my ex-wife and the mediator and the court all have decided that the best thing for those boys, my beautiful boys, is to spend the majority of their free time with their dad? It makes no sense." It is no coincidence these disgusting attacks came on the very week of the bombshell news that not only has Governor Greitens been completely exonerated of previous Soros-funded allegations, but that they were part of a criminal conspiracy. Breitbart News reported that "the former FBI agent, William Tisaby, who a George Soros-funded local prosecutor hired to investigate then-Gov. Greitens just this week cut a plea deal after facing seven felony counts including fabricating evidence and perjury. The actual prosecutor, Kim Gardner, faces an ethics complaint of her own and could possibly lose her law license or be disbarred at an upcoming April hearing for her alleged misconduct in the case." Read excerpts of the explosive reporting by Breitbart News below exposing the RINO's who were behind this sloppy attack, which was uncovered almost immediately. EXCERPTS: Donor Confidante Says Karl Rove Had Prior Knowledge of Eric Greitens's Ex-Wife's Allegations Before Filing [Breitbart News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zTPMvbjb-vbl5HTAtwQl-n9ZYewkFR9eRc4ErzPpVCTgws15oi8sG9LiFkiwMyN8FCMkUDr8ocXS0TYxof4bm3jAniRE825ZtA824_nvf1Np350JYO9wQ-SNvBOkpXndmd1GTWa53Gtcb3m2LKO_GymdTA1qhzAu1fUxhgAMlMjRqmNh7g-8ZOMfB6WIXIEsQ0EImy03LO3LmmH2iVZfREW8twzuAkWkr9dRudMXPaqCPjVOpUxCOH09eOL3vPZg9Jfrjlz4VCrGQGpX7utulAdV3a-iaivOaL55q7XqUJUcftaS0RwCnnttfHrlxhB8TZOnYFMHgbn0yr7iPknibLmO7d9G0MDOPEh2QFHQIfo=&c=9c9HaEhPHENhEwRnrJ0bSIigfX2qX2HeFzOOOmGPaidLlFYJTevvHg==&ch=l-E1iyjF2oKGobQuuMNfgS67K-Kde7RgfHuD6azyE2ir_pFrsrrdDA==) By Matthew Boyle GOP establishment consultant Karl Rove had prior knowledge of contents of a now-public filing that Sheena Greitens, the ex-wife of former Missouri Gov. Eric Greitens, filed in a dispute over the parenting structure for their two boys, a top confidante of GOP mega-donors told Breitbart News exclusively. ...
This revelation gained additional significance because Sheena Greitens released a press statement on Tuesday evening which said, in part, that she did not discuss the contents of her affidavit before filing it in court with anyone other than her attorney--and only after she filed it did she tell close family members. But if that were true, then how could Karl Rove have known? ... Then there's this: Sheena Greitens' sister works for not one, but three different political consulting firms run by a top ally of Senate GOP leader Mitch McConnell. McConnell has a clear vested interest in seeing Eric Greitens' U.S. Senate campaign fail, as Greitens has very prominently called for the removal of McConnell as the GOP leader in the U.S. Senate. The timing of this filing is also significant in that it comes just as previous allegations against Greitens began to completely crumble. The former FBI agent, William Tisaby, who a George Soros-funded local prosecutor hired to investigate then-Gov. Greitens just this week cut a plea deal after facing seven felony counts including fabricating evidence and perjury. The actual prosecutor, Kim Gardner, faces an ethics complaint of her own and could possibly lose her law license or be disbarred at an upcoming April hearing for her alleged misconduct in the case. That comes after an ethics commission in Missouri cleared Greitens himself of wrongdoing previously, leading the front-running U.S. Senate candidate to claim he has "total exoneration" on the now discredited previous charges. So that all begs the question of why new allegations would surface now, who might be connected to or trying to politically benefit from them, and who may be using them to their advantage in the contentious primary that could set the tone for the future of the Republican Party nationally. Eric Greitens, for his part, is not going down without a fight. "They are completely false allegations," he said on a local radio program on Thursday morning. "And let's point out that what a coincidence that on the very week, the very week when William Tisaby pleads guilty, on the very week when we are going to be fully exonerated and everyone is going to see this entire criminal conspiracy that Soros funded come crashing down, on that very week they release another series of terrible, false allegations. It isn't just me saying that they're false. Anyone with any common sense knows that they're false. I'll tell you what we know now, here's what we know now. Last week, while I was on spring break with my boys for eight days, and we're having a great time--we're hiking and biking and climbing and playing--while that was happening, that document was being produced, notarized, and distributed to the press in Washington, DC. We also now know, a story should come out in the next 24 to 48 hours, showing exactly who the political operatives were who were working on that story and exactly who the political operatives were who it was handed to." ...
It is possible that other candidates in the U.S. Senate primary also had prior knowledge of the then-forthcoming Sheena Greitens filing as early as last Friday. On a talk radio show in Missouri on Tuesday, former State Sen. John Lamping said that last Friday at a Lincoln Day dinner one of the candidates told him things were about to get nasty for Greitens. "It's interesting, I had a chance on Friday night to speak to all of the candidates," Lamping said on 97.1 Talk FM. "One of them--I asked them all how it's going and you know what they thought of the campaign so far. One of them said to me 'well, it's about to get real, real soon.'" ...
Lamping continued by saying he thinks every other candidate against Greitens was aware this was coming. "There's no coincidence this was released yesterday at 10 o'clock Monday morning--I think all the campaigns were made aware of this coming out," Lamping said. "You saw a pretty well-coordinated effort. Vicky [Hartzler] did a video pretty much right away in response to this news. This is 'welcome to the campaign season, we're four months out.' Sadly, we're probably not going to talk too much about issues but we're going to focus on very personal issues like this." Not only did Rove have prior knowledge of the forthcoming accusations, the donor confidante said, but he offered that if the confidante would travel to Texas, Rove could set it up so the confidante could hear directly from her. The confidante, Steve Hantler, confirmed the account on the record to Breitbart News when asked about it on Tuesday. Hantler is a well-known figure behind the scenes in the GOP donor community, and his credibility is clear. He rarely speaks on record with news outlets but is frequently involved in helping top conservative candidates and causes as well as serving as a go-between with GOP donors and candidates and groups. Between 10 and 14 days before Sheena Greitens filed her complaint with the Boone County court in Missouri, Rove was on a call with Hantler in which Hantler says Rove explicitly stated that Eric Greitens's ex-wife "is going to," before the primary election, "make a statement or release something." Hantler has known Rove for decades--dating back to the 1990s--and describes Rove a close friend. He spoke to Breitbart News about this after the story came out earlier this week. He also told Greitens' campaign for U.S. Senate about the call with Rove contemporaneously and before the filing was made, sources familiar with the matter told Breitbart News. Hantler said in response to Rove during this phone call that he would call Sheena and ask her if it is true, and Rove replied "well, she won't talk to you." "But, if you want to talk to her, I can set it up--fly down to Austin and the two of you will be able to talk," Rove said, according to Hantler. Rove does not deny that the call in question took place, but he does deny Hantler's account of the call. In a written statement to Breitbart News, Rove said he did not have prior knowledge of the Sheena Greitens filing--and claimed that the account from Hantler, who is a supporter of Eric Greitens, should not be believed. Rove also argues it is "patently absurd" he would set up a meeting between Sheena Greitens and Hantler given Hantler's political support for her ex-husband. ...
After she and Eric divorced, Sheena Greitens moved to Austin, Texas--where Rove coincidentally also lives--as she is an associate professor at the Lyndon B. Johnson School of Public Affairs at the University of Texas at Austin. Rove also teaches there and sources familiar with the matter say the two of them have interacted during the past year plus at the school and in other capacities. Despite living in Austin, Texas, Sheena Greitens also apparently spent the week leading up to the filing of the document in Washington, DC, where her sister lives and works. The actual affidavit was, interestingly, notarized in the nation's capital, not in the Texas capital. During this timeframe, for what it's worth, Eric Greitens actually had their kids with him for over a week for spring break as part of the custody sharing agreement that Eric and Sheena had previously made. Eric Greitens made this point to back up his case on that local radio interview on Thursday morning where he said his ex-wife's new allegations were "provably false" because he said they are "co-parents" and have had a years-long agreement to that effect. "We have a joint custody plan," Eric Greitens said. "In that plan, the boys spend the majority of their time with me--they're with me all summer, they're with me all Thanksgiving, they're with me all spring break, and they're with me every holiday weekend--Memorial Day weekend, Columbus Day weekend, President's Day, every holiday weekend. That's in addition to the time that I spend with them in Texas on school days. Now, ask yourself and ask all of your listeners, use your own judgment, if any of this were remotely true--if there was even a shred of truth to it--would my ex-wife and the mediator and the court all have decided that the best thing for those boys, my beautiful boys, is to spend the majority of their free time with their dad? It makes no sense." In addition to all of the above, there is another interesting fact about this whole development: Sheena's sister Catherine Linkul now has a plum gig for a political consulting firm run by a close ally of Senate GOP leader Mitch McConnell. Linkul is the vice president of strategy for P2 Pathway Public Affairs. That firm is run by a man named Phil Cox, who currently serves on the board of McConnell's Super PAC, the Senate Leadership Fund. Cox has other deep ties to McConnell including having been regularly quoted by media outlets backing up the Senate GOP leader. Linkul also, according to her LinkedIn page, has since 2018 served as Vice President of two other political firms--GuidePost Strategies and 50 State. Both of those firms, according to their websites, are also run by Cox--and the GuidePost Strategies website boasts of his closeness to McConnell. Before linking up with McConnell's allies, Linkul previously worked on Greitens's successful 2016 gubernatorial campaign--aiding her sister's then-husband in winning the governor's mansion in the first place. ...
Rove's connections to this whole storyline directly connect McConnell to it as well given their deep and years-long relationship. Rove's protege Scott Jennings in 2013 launched a pro-McConnell Super PAC called "Kentuckians For Strong Leadership" to back McConnell in the 2014 U.S. Senate race. In 2016, according to the Center for Responsive Politics, a McConnell-allied nonprofit called One Nation received millions of dollars in donations from a Rove-linked group called Crossroads GPS.

The former FBI agent, William Tisaby, who a George Soros-funded local prosecutor hired to investigate then-Gov. Greitens just this week cut a plea deal after facing seven felony counts including fabricating evidence and perjury. The actual prosecutor, Kim Gardner, faces an ethics complaint of her own and could possibly lose her law license or be disbarred at an upcoming April hearing for her alleged misconduct in the case. That comes after an ethics commission in Missouri cleared Greitens himself of wrongdoing previously, leading the front-running U.S. Senate candidate to claim he has "total exoneration" on the now discredited previous charges. So that all begs the question of why new allegations would surface now, who might be connected to or trying to politically benefit from them, and who may be using them to their advantage in the contentious primary that could set the tone for the future of the Republican Party nationally. Eric Greitens, for his part, is not going down without a fight. "They are completely false allegations," he said on a local radio program on Thursday morning. "And let's point out that what a coincidence that on the very week, the very week when William Tisaby pleads guilty, on the very week when we are going to be fully exonerated and everyone is going to see this entire criminal conspiracy that Soros funded come crashing down, on that very week they release another series of terrible, false allegations. It isn't just me saying that they're false. Anyone with any common sense knows that they're false. I'll tell you what we know now, here's what we know now. Last week, while I was on spring break with my boys for eight days, and we're having a great time--we're hiking and biking and climbing and playing--while that was happening, that document was being produced, notarized, and distributed to the press in Washington, DC. We also now know, a story should come out in the next 24 to 48 hours, showing exactly who the political operatives were who were working on that story and exactly who the political operatives were who it was handed to." ... It is possible that other candidates in the U.S. Senate primary also had prior knowledge of the then-forthcoming Sheena Greitens filing as early as last Friday. On a talk radio show in Missouri on Tuesday, former State Sen. John Lamping said that last Friday at a Lincoln Day dinner one of the candidates told him things were about to get nasty for Greitens. "It's interesting, I had a chance on Friday night to speak to all of the candidates," Lamping said on 97.1 Talk FM. "One of them--I asked them all how it's going and you know what they thought of the campaign so far. One of them said to me 'well, it's about to get real, real soon.'" ... Lamping continued by saying he thinks every other candidate against Greitens was aware this was coming. "There's no coincidence this was released yesterday at 10 o'clock Monday morning--I think all the campaigns were made aware of this coming out," Lamping said. "You saw a pretty well-coordinated effort. Vicky [Hartzler] did a video pretty much right away in response to this news. This is 'welcome to the campaign season, we're four months out.' Sadly, we're probably not going to talk too much about issues but we're going to focus on very personal issues like this." Not only did Rove have prior knowledge of the forthcoming accusations, the donor confidante said, but he offered that if the confidante would travel to Texas, Rove could set it up so the confidante could hear directly from her. The confidante, Steve Hantler, confirmed the account on the record to Breitbart News when asked about it on Tuesday. Hantler is a well-known figure behind the scenes in the GOP donor community, and his credibility is clear. He rarely speaks on record with news outlets but is frequently involved in helping top conservative candidates and causes as well as serving as a go-between with GOP donors and candidates and groups. Between 10 and 14 days before Sheena Greitens filed her complaint with the Boone County court in Missouri, Rove was on a call with Hantler in which Hantler says Rove explicitly stated that Eric Greitens's ex-wife "is going to," before the primary election, "make a statement or release something." Hantler has known Rove for decades--dating back to the 1990s--and describes Rove a close friend. He spoke to Breitbart News about this after the story came out earlier this week. He also told Greitens' campaign for U.S. Senate about the call with Rove contemporaneously and before the filing was made, sources familiar with the matter told Breitbart News. Hantler said in response to Rove during this phone call that he would call Sheena and ask her if it is true, and Rove replied "well, she won't talk to you." "But, if you want to talk to her, I can set it up--fly down to Austin and the two of you will be able to talk," Rove said, according to Hantler. Rove does not deny that the call in question took place, but he does deny Hantler's account of the call. In a written statement to Breitbart News, Rove said he did not have prior knowledge of the Sheena Greitens filing--and claimed that the account from Hantler, who is a supporter of Eric Greitens, should not be believed. Rove also argues it is "patently absurd" he would set up a meeting between Sheena Greitens and Hantler given Hantler's political support for her ex-husband. ... After she and Eric divorced, Sheena Greitens moved to Austin, Texas--where Rove coincidentally also lives--as she is an associate professor at the Lyndon B. Johnson School of Public Affairs at the University of Texas at Austin. Rove also teaches there and sources familiar with the matter say the two of them have interacted during the past year plus at the school and in other capacities. Despite living in Austin, Texas, Sheena Greitens also apparently spent the week leading up to the filing of the document in Washington, DC, where her sister lives and works. The actual affidavit was, interestingly, notarized in the nation's capital, not in the Texas capital. During this timeframe, for what it's worth, Eric Greitens actually had their kids with him for over a week for spring break as part of the custody sharing agreement that Eric and Sheena had previously made. Eric Greitens made this point to back up his case on that local radio interview on Thursday morning where he said his ex-wife's new allegations were "provably false" because he said they are "co-parents" and have had a years-long agreement to that effect. "We have a joint custody plan," Eric Greitens said. "In that plan, the boys spend the majority of their time with me--they're with me all summer, they're with me all Thanksgiving, they're with me all spring break, and they're with me every holiday weekend--Memorial Day weekend, Columbus Day weekend, President's Day, every holiday weekend. That's in addition to the time that I spend with them in Texas on school days. Now, ask yourself and ask all of your listeners, use your own judgment, if any of this were remotely true--if there was even a shred of truth to it--would my ex-wife and the mediator and the court all have decided that the best thing for those boys, my beautiful boys, is to spend the majority of their free time with their dad? It makes no sense." In addition to all of the above, there is another interesting fact about this whole development: Sheena's sister Catherine Linkul now has a plum gig for a political consulting firm run by a close ally of Senate GOP leader Mitch McConnell. Linkul is the vice president of strategy for P2 Pathway Public Affairs. That firm is run by a man named Phil Cox, who currently serves on the board of McConnell's Super PAC, the Senate Leadership Fund. Cox has other deep ties to McConnell including having been regularly quoted by media outlets backing up the Senate GOP leader. Linkul also, according to her LinkedIn page, has since 2018 served as Vice President of two other political firms--GuidePost Strategies and 50 State. Both of those firms, according to their websites, are also run by Cox--and the GuidePost Strategies website boasts of his closeness to McConnell. Before linking up with McConnell's allies, Linkul previously worked on Greitens's successful 2016 gubernatorial campaign--aiding her sister's then-husband in winning the governor's mansion in the first place. ... Rove's connections to this whole storyline directly connect McConnell to it as well given their deep and years-long relationship. Rove's protege Scott Jennings in 2013 launched a pro-McConnell Super PAC called "Kentuckians For Strong Leadership" to back McConnell in the 2014 U.S. Senate race. In 2016, according to the Center for Responsive Politics, a McConnell-allied nonprofit called One Nation received millions of dollars in donations from a Rove-linked group called Crossroads GPS. | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:team@ericgreitens.com powered by

subject: For me, this is personal
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43369158/336891697/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNkZTkzYy00Y2FjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JiDGIOLF2PWNNBZbrYBUBCzBmTidiTkxeUKighDRmw=)

| | Peter, I’m about to tell you why running for Governor of Maryland is so personal for me, but before I do that – [**will you chip in $25 or more to my campaign? I’m coming up on my monthly fundraising deadline, and right now I’m falling behind.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43369163/336891701/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220325_FR_Bio_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNkZTkzYy00Y2FjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JiDGIOLF2PWNNBZbrYBUBCzBmTidiTkxeUKighDRmw=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43369167/336891705/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220325_FR_Bio_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNkZTkzYy00Y2FjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JiDGIOLF2PWNNBZbrYBUBCzBmTidiTkxeUKighDRmw=)
---
For me, running for Governor isn’t about name recognition, elevating my status, or consolidating power – it’s all about uplifting folks so that **everyone** in Maryland has the opportunity to succeed.
The opportunity I was not given growing up.
I left an abusive home when I was just a teenager and subsequently dropped out of high school. There weren’t measures in place to support a kid like me at that time.
And as a young adult, I endured a brutal rape I was fortunate to live through. The police didn’t believe me. There weren’t policies in place to make me feel supported, believed, or safe.
By all accounts, I should’ve failed. I shouldn't have gone on to get my MBA and work as an entrepreneur turning around struggling businesses. I shouldn’t be running for Governor right now.
But I succeeded in spite of structural failures in my state – and that’s why I’m running for Governor, Peter.
That’s why it’s so personal to me. I want everyone in my state to be able to succeed no matter their experiences and station in life. And that comes down to good social policies and support.
I happened to meet a little boy who lives in my childhood home.
He’s still in an unsafe neighborhood.
His school is underfunded and he is unsupported.
Decades have passed since I lived there – and nothing has changed. We have failed this child.
My goal is to make sure that no other child has to endure what I went through, or what this little boy is currently going through.
If you’re aligned with my vision for Maryland, [**will you chip in $25 or more today? The only way I can get to the Governor’s seat and enact sound legislation to uplift folks in our state is with your help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43369171/336891709/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220325_FR_Bio_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNkZTkzYy00Y2FjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JiDGIOLF2PWNNBZbrYBUBCzBmTidiTkxeUKighDRmw=)

With less than six days to go until my campaign's March 31 end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, I'm pleased to report that we're 70% of the way to reaching our $78,000 fundraising goal!

name: Brit Bender
subject: re: we plan to win
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

Hi, just wanted to make sure you saw Adam’s message below — we are super excited about our plan to Take Back Tennessee and want to make sure you’re in the loop. 2022 is the year to fight back, and we plan on giving it our all. Democrats are here, we just need to get them to the ballot box.

We need you with us in the fight to take back our state. Are you in?

— Brit

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Altendorf < adam@tndp.org >
Date: Thu, Mar 24, 2022 at 12:19 PM
Subject: Tennessee Democrats Are Back
To: Brit Bender < brit@tndp.org >

Hi Peter,

Tennessee Democrats are back. The Tennessee Democratic Party is here, and we are working everyday to Take Back Tennessee. Our new administration is bolder, more agile, and willing to implement new ideas that have the power to revolutionize the way Democratic politics is done in Tennessee. And we plan to win — not just in this cycle, but in the long haul.

Democratic voters are here. We have to find them and mobilize them, which is what we will do in 2022.

But to win, we need boots-on-the-ground organizers. Can you chip in now to help us raise the funds we need to hire the organizers who will Take Back Tennessee? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

Together we can Take Back Tennessee and build a state that supports working people. Now is our chance, we have to give it our all.
It's time to take back our state, and we need you with us. Are you in?

Can I count on you to chip in $25 now to help us build an organizing machine that is capable of going toe-to-toe with the Republicans? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

Let’s get it done,

Adam Altendorf
he/him
Coordinated Campaign Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

subject: a critical moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I may need to make budget cuts
| |
---
I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. Every dollar will help this people-powered team defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43371052/336899635/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2744-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGVhODUwYi00ZmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YChTEbJLgxhBruZwtBgkfSZbGtXz_pLVmXmFXlqM3eY=)

name: Rep. David Cicilline
subject: becoming a first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
Friend,
I’m Representative David Cicilline, of Rhode Island’s 1st congressional district. When I was elected as Mayor of Providence years ago, I was the first openly gay elected mayor of a state capital in the country. Later when I was sworn in as a United States Representative, I became only the fourth openly gay member of Congress. We’ve come so far since then — introducing the Defense Against Marriage Act which legalized Gay marriage, co-sponsoring the Gay and Trans Panic Defense Prohibition Act in 2018, and passing the Equality Act in the House in 2019.
Sometimes being the first is just the beginning of the story.
Now as co-chair of Equality PAC, it is my honor to support LGBTQ+ candidates across the country achieving their own set of firsts. When Clay Aiken is elected to represent North Carolina, he will make history as the first openly gay member of Congress representing the South. But Clay doesn’t just provide representation for LGBTQ+ folks across the South, he’s got plans to fight for equality as well — for all Americans. But we need your help.
Clay’s End of Quarter filing deadline is on Thursday, can you chip in $13 to help fuel this historic campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eoq?refcode=03252022_EOQ_FR_1&amount=13]
donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eoq?refcode=03252022_EOQ_FR_1&amount=13]
Becoming a first was only the start of my journey. Since then, I’ve been honored to help and advocate for families across the country (LGBTQ+ and otherwise). I can only imagine the good that Clay will do once he becomes the first.
I’m ready for Clay to make history, but we have to get him across the finish line first.
Can I count on you to donate $13 right now, before his End of Quarter filing deadline hits? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eoq?refcode=03252022_EOQ_FR_1&amount=13]
donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eoq?refcode=03252022_EOQ_FR_1&amount=13]
Thank you,
Congressman David Cicilline
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 4th congressional district. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
Clay Aiken for North Carolina
PO Box 13274
Durham, NC 27709
United States

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: My Berkshires to Boston Tour visit to Worcester County was a great success!
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
I had a great day in Worcester County on Thursday during the third stop of my Berkshires to Boston tour of the Commonwealth - even though the weather didn't cooperate!
We started our day with breakfast at Lalajava Coffeehouse and were greeted by owner Lola Boyers with awesome coffee and pastries.
---
|
---
| Next up: a business tour of St. Pierre Manufacturing/Sports with owner Peter St. Pierre and checked out all of the horseshoes he makes. Thanks to Peter for signing my nomination papers as well!
---
|
---
| I then checked out some historic monuments and sites at Shrewsbury's Historic town green.
---
|
---
|
---
| A much welcome lunch with supporters at Wachusett Mountain and checking out the amazing views!
---
|
---
|
---
| After lunch, Leah Cole Allen joined me at The Farm At SummitWynds, a lavender farm owned by Chip Pollit and his family. I got a great tour of the grounds, and some delicious lavender lemonade.
---
---
Leah and I then visited Access Futures Day Care Center, and had so much fun reading with the little ones there.
---
---
---
| We wrapped up our day with pie and coffee at Boulevard Diner.
---
|
---
| Special thanks to Congressional candidate Jeffrey Sossa-Paquette for joining me on this great day in his neighborhood!
Thanks to all the businesses who hosted me, and all who came out to show support and ask great questions on the trail.
I can't wait for next week's stop in Essex County! The itinerary will be posted this weekend, check for it on my Events page!
---
| [View Upcoming Events](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zcrRgPCCTefK8Pa1nEMDV84uGTHXmxZefGipksmmb_OCdLA6QJEM3iN9Cccqy0dtAs6-gmHPlmLWQcR6jalkS0kfVRWb9XXEvp3QxTnIRTiBYsI-DOy9nxnciG0_Zg_u_81U30r3Wpn4mV9Pl6Oi7EHszr0IOEDh&c=90hsN-cldiT7fO7czL2U1REjX6DLanvX2VOuLBLeKudLw-AxL-QxpQ==&ch=TwjuLHW9EQAhPRnQo8PESKWFipBlJ1U8WXAQ0KVtuHP6INdsl9qaFw==)

| Sincerely,

Friends , our fundraising deadline ends TOMORROW AT MIDNIGHT and we’re short of where we need to be to hit our goals for the month. The timing is NOT GREAT and Mark needs your help. Can you PLEASE split a contribution today between Mark Kelly and Seth Moulton? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-kelly?refcode=20220324_MK_split]
Things are really heating up...
FIRST: A Mitch-McConnell-backed dark money group started spending millions of dollars to defeat Mark Kelly.

AND THEN: Trump told his supporters that beating Mark was one of the most important things they can do this year.

Team Kelly

name: Wes Moore
subject: This primary race just got more expensive
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43372145/336904565/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220325EOQ1_wm_60do30ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDllNjgwMy01NGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCKLa22viEnH788Js0BH0rkt72T3IvS1R1_NIqtSXTU=)
---
Friend, Our campaign is coming up on our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2022 next week, and this race just got more expensive. In a moment, [I’m going to ask if you can pitch in a contribution to help us hit our goal,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43372146/336904566/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220325EOQ1_wm_60do30ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDllNjgwMy01NGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCKLa22viEnH788Js0BH0rkt72T3IvS1R1_NIqtSXTU=) but before I do, I hope you’ll let me explain why this deadline and our new primary date matters. Last week, as a result of redistricting complications, **the Maryland Court of Appeals announced the primary election originally scheduled for June 27 is being pushed back to July 19.** **That adds almost an extra month of advertising and get-out-the-vote efforts to our primary campaign budget, which means this race just got a whole lot more expensive.** Now, my team is working around the clock to add these additional costs to our budget, and that makes contributions from supporters like you all the more impactful, so we can make sure we have the funds to keep our movement going strong until late July. This announcement requires us to double down, and I have no doubt that this powerful team has the ability to come together and fuel our campaign to the new primary date, so Aruna and I can go on to the general and fight for every Marylander in Annapolis. **[Can you help us make up the difference and reach our end-of-quarter goal by chipping in $10 or whatever you can afford today? I’d deeply appreciate it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43372147/336904567/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220325EOQ1_wm_60do30ds_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDllNjgwMy01NGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCKLa22viEnH788Js0BH0rkt72T3IvS1R1_NIqtSXTU=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---

clean_body: | = Friend, Our campaign is coming up on our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2022 next week, and this race just got more expensive. In a moment, = but before I do, I hope you’ll let me explain why this deadline and our new primary date matters. Last week, as a result of redistricting complications, the Maryland Court of Appeals announced the primary election originally scheduled for June 27 is being pushed back to July 19. That adds almost an extra month of advertising and get-out-the-vote efforts to our primary campaign budget, which means this race just got a whole lot more expensive. Now, my team is working around the clock to add these additional costs to our budget, and that makes contributions from supporters like you all the more impactful, so we can make sure we have the funds to keep our movement going strong until late July. This announcement requires us to double down, and I have no doubt that this powerful team has the ability to come together and fuel our campaign to the new primary date, so Aruna and I can go on to the general and fight for every Marylander in Annapolis. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: American Defense News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3gfge60lmvsjhvmm33sqiv006pkneehc18pemn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9h62o33c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr0e1jb8s77c9ijbcbgcsrjeo3kc5rb5crlc5i32t72mhrmepjgchh64crh63g6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30pjks2pm4ptmcpj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi06dpm99vqhij82fjvkppukjni7enrjjsc38rc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9h62o33c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze0umive9q0cdq5k16mijkc1iobcsqbr1n13qph8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9h62o33c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zar9fvelh9iu3s8vhbqrn6e4tl13jb14glh8kfpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9h62o33c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Everybody is now paying attention to this, except for the fake news media.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgl70fem21gbm1dd71op7q5feo5t8urt7vf6to88_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbojbd31mkpb4o7265rrepdhctj6eori6thm9dtgcaomfddmeljrcc5imsq6ecrn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjacb7maq6cd34mmqjfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ge4oj1c1imeoh5u)
"Everybody is now paying attention to this, except for the fake news media."
Friend, when Devin Nunes sounds the alarm, WE LISTEN.
Well he just went on Fox News to issue this important message about the Durham Report: _" Everybody is now paying attention to this, except for the fake news media."_
For years, the Liberal Media told us President Trump cried wolf. They said Trump LIED about being spied on... They said he LIED about his ties to Russia...
**Now, we 're only scratching the surface. WE NEED THE TRUTH!**
**[DEMAND THE TRUTH FROM JOHN DURHAM>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zarncuoidrundp8e10oatqg49e8pn2mb62mfq4s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9h62o35cth2bs)**
Experts say the initial reports are just the tip of an iceberg.
We expect the FULL and COMPLETE truth to go way beyond what we hear in the news -- just like Devin Nunes said.
[**We only ask that you join the thousands of your fellow Patriots in demanding John Durham 's FULL report be made public to the American People.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf6052sd0k1o9gamudbprolath2n21do95508qb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9h62o35cth2bs)
Can you do that for us? It's important.
For truth,
**Durham Updates**
_Sent via House Conservatives_
**[DEMAND THE TRUTH FROM JOHN DURHAM>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbaqlfl8g6n649g649r5ela8qsqrafp9jsbverm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9h62o35cth2bs)**
