name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: This is bad. Really bad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Coming to you with a humble request... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9785%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=7TPoYk2KHiMZ17t677YeZg&sysid=1)
Coming to you with a humble request...

|
| | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26416%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LWh21AA2uPusjeUFiUgvWg&sysid=1)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn’t what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn’t an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26417%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OhTiaU6tf2z5ncRN%2bwQ02w&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won’t either, which is why today I’m coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26418%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wT2%2fMRG4o0Ky6BScHRhMjg&sysid=1 "Can I count on you to rush
a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or
even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.")**

I can’t extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it’s critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it’s indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/crenshaw-extended-deadline-august-3x-match/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20220324_PWG-AUN2.103067_dan-crenshaw_t1160535-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PWG-AUN2.103067&utm_content=20220324_this-is-bad.-really-bad.AU-20220325 "BUT, if every patriot who
gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical
Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300%
matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26417%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OhTiaU6tf2z5ncRN%2bwQ02w&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

We’re in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we’re just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she’s panicking._

_She’s dialing up dark money donors.

She’s depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi’s working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can’t let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There’s no way we make our mark without you.

**[I can’t extend this deadline again- even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26419%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qjk8LVVtckXsWMJVKp5KZQ&sysid=1 "I can’t extend this
deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your
300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26410%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yv5M3FnHBqddowgx%2bQub5g&sysid=1)
---
Dan Crenshaw

---
| |
* * *

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26411%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OELE0HzmYegMnTzdEfRX9Q&sysid=1 "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26412%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hFDkuT%2bJd1OifD2BkpVvAA&sysid=1 "Can we count on you to
step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26413%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XCtgrEWcqs7Fs1r3qdkj9A&sysid=1 "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
|

Team, Senator Ossoff is AMAZING -- he just filed one of the _most comprehensive voting reform bills in HISTORY!!_

But Republicans are already coming out of the woodwork to keep this bill from going anywhere!

[We need a groundswell of support to get this bill through. PLEASE, ADD YOUR NAME IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_v2/?source=VPP_20220325_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=1623%2E878179%2E4tsDRY)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1623%2E878179%2E4tsDRY). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1623%2E878179%2E4tsDRY).**

name: Courtney Geels
subject: Campaign Sign Update
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| [](mailto:courtgeels@gmail.com)
---
| Hey Peter,
I am taking a quick break from unpacking new yard signs to thank you and everyone in District 4 for your overwhelming support so far. Every day, more of you join the movement and show your support proudly with car magnets, yard signs and t-shirts. I appreciate that so much. And if you haven't picked one up yet, what are you waiting for?
Because of everyone's support, I've already needed to order more signs and the new ones look great thanks to one of your neighbors and a fellow supporter who printed these quickly so that we could get them out to you. I choose to support community businesses because this campaign is a community effort. It is going to take us all to defeat the well-funded Democrats.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vmG5_xUTjDL9v3ec0AaByUcx082_3PC3jElaAqkTMy9yzc42gYK2zSYhJM3QGo63vpzvghqalWBVAr4ILU4zFt9HQC74WH01kVKvnlueWjhmvLTS9HWQfeaT6kmuNCGCdtAWbZo5EyMsvj46lqTb03giuQQW3v5LEhcYU0Hjzk77alMpO5NvKri3cch7EXzJSHGvZVjJrfhyJvqE-uhhd_3DpbLH_IvM-oNtqOdXD87crs99VvgtZ-b4_A4dQexo7GHgG-VSxyM=&c=d8i275Z7DoQ6xMkS3nhgwiWzP2WAeHDtUhk27cb4a7hROKsUWTBVxg==&ch=xK5Z7ScEwG14g-YIJcG5uNxStqfRRK16WoSNNA8vYoVDqKJmNCkqJA==)
---
It was important to me that yard signs be available to all of our supporters regardless of their circumstances and I am humbled that my message speaks to so many people from different backgrounds and cohorts. Some supporters have already generously stepped up to help, but I am asking the rest of you to join them today.
My team needs to raise $484 to fund the next round of campaign material available to each and every voter in our district!
Can you chip in $5, $10, or $20 right now to help us achieve this goal?
---
| None of this is possible without your help.
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vmG5_xUTjDL9v3ec0AaByUcx082_3PC3jElaAqkTMy9yzc42gYK2zSYhJM3QGo63vpzvghqalWBVAr4ILU4zFt9HQC74WH01kVKvnlueWjhmvLTS9HWQfeaT6kmuNCGCdtAWbZo5EyMsvj46lqTb03giuQQW3v5LEhcYU0Hjzk77alMpO5NvKri3cch7EXzJSHGvZVjJrfhyJvqE-uhhd_3DpbLH_IvM-oNtqOdXD87crs99VvgtZ-b4_A4dQexo7GHgG-VSxyM=&c=d8i275Z7DoQ6xMkS3nhgwiWzP2WAeHDtUhk27cb4a7hROKsUWTBVxg==&ch=xK5Z7ScEwG14g-YIJcG5uNxStqfRRK16WoSNNA8vYoVDqKJmNCkqJA==)
---
|
---
| Thanks again, Peter. \- Courtney

subject: We need Erika in Congress

Right now, Donald Trump is _threatening the political futures of his own allies_ and pitting them against one another by endorsing in Republican primaries with multiple MAGA candidates running. name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: She Wants ⛽ Gas Prices High!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Democrats, like Michigan’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer are playing politics while our citizens suffer. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter:

Americans are hurting. Only once in my lifetime can I remember inflation as bad as this. Rising prices are at a 40-year high.

And gas prices? Well, **you know the pain at the pump** right now.

**Yet Democrats, like Michigan’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer are playing politics while our citizens suffer.**

Whitmer publicly calls on Washington to suspend the federal gas tax, but when lawmakers in Michigan try to suspend the state’s gas tax she vetoes the bill.

That’s right. _Whitmer vetoed a suspension of the state’s gas tax_.

Then, she further confused the issue by saying she wants to pause the state’s sales tax on gas.

Cynical? Manipulative?

It’s time for leadership in Lansing, not politics.

**Yet, Gretchen Whitmer would rather play politics while our citizens are struggling to pay their bills.**

[When Whitmer was first elected she wanted to raise the gas tax an additional 45 cents per gallon. That _would have made Michigan’s gas tax the highest in the nation at**71.3 cents per gallon**_.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=83420d0589&e=0636b97700)

So it should come as no surprise that she would veto a suspension of the gas tax.

Whitmer and her liberal friends want gas prices high.

**That’s why she applauded when Biden cancelled the Keystone Pipeline.

And she cheered when Biden stopped new oil and gas leases.**

Then **Whitmer went even further by ordering the shut down of Enbridge Energy’s Line 5 pipeline** – a pipeline which supplies many Michigan residents with fuel and propane.

Her edict could result in the _loss of over 33,000 jobs_ and cause _$20 billion in economic damage_ to the Great Lakes region.

It would have a _devastating effect on Detroit Metro Airport_ which receives half of its jet fuel from this pipeline. That would be a massive blow to the aviation industry.

**We can’t let these radical Democrats further destroy our economy.**

Just two short years ago America was energy independent – and we were a net exporter of oil.

Now, _thanks to Whitmer, Biden and their radical cronies we are again dependent on foreign nations_ for oil and inflation is at a 40-year high.

**Peter, we have a real opportunity to stop them by flipping Michigan. We can turn the state from blue to red.**

Gretchen Whitmer’s popularity has plummeted because of her reckless policies.

She _devastated small businesses_ with her prolonged lockdown.

She forced Covid patients into nursing homes _needlessly increasing deaths_.

She closed schools and _forced masks on kids_.

She marched in a “ _defund the police_ ” rally and publicly stated her support for the “spirit of the defund the police” movement.

On issue after issue, Whitmer has shown she is out of touch with everyday Americans.

We can defeat Gretchen Whitmer and flip Michigan back to the red column, and _I need your help today_.

**Will you chip in to help? $10, $25 or $50 will go a long way in defeating the radical left Michigan.**
---
| [CHIP IN $10 TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=162d12c44e&e=0636b97700 "CHIP IN $10 TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE")

| Peter, following my time in the Marine Corps, I’ve built a 34-year career in law enforcement in Michigan. I’ve excelled at putting together high-performing teams to solve challenging problems. That’s what I bring to the table.

[_I am a conservative_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=648beb72df&e=0636b97700). I believe our government spends too much and taxes are too high.

That’s why [_I've signed the “Taxpayer Protection Pledge.”_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=7705d7f804&e=0636b97700) I will oppose any efforts to raise taxes on Michigan’s citizens.

Will you join me in this campaign? _Let’s flip Michigan and send Gretchen Whitmer packing_.

Please make a generous donation today. Let’s stand together as we Fix Michigan and rebuild our nation.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown

clean_body: Democrats, like Michigan’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer are playing politics while our citizens suffer. | | | | | | | | Peter: Americans are hurting. Only once in my lifetime can I remember inflation as bad as this. Rising prices are at a 40-year high. And gas prices? Well, you know the pain at the pump right now. Yet Democrats, like Michigan’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer are playing politics while our citizens suffer. Whitmer publicly calls on Washington to suspend the federal gas tax, but when lawmakers in Michigan try to suspend the state’s gas tax she vetoes the bill. That’s right. Whitmer vetoed a suspension of the state’s gas tax. Then, she further confused the issue by saying she wants to pause the state’s sales tax on gas. Cynical? Manipulative? It’s time for leadership in Lansing, not politics. Yet, Gretchen Whitmer would rather play politics while our citizens are struggling to pay their bills. So it should come as no surprise that she would veto a suspension of the gas tax. Whitmer and her liberal friends want gas prices high. That’s why she applauded when Biden cancelled the Keystone Pipeline. And she cheered when Biden stopped new oil and gas leases. Then Whitmer went even further by ordering the shut down of Enbridge Energy’s Line 5 pipeline – a pipeline which supplies many Michigan residents with fuel and propane. Her edict could result in the loss of over 33,000 jobs and cause $20 billion in economic damage to the Great Lakes region. It would have a devastating effect on Detroit Metro Airport which receives half of its jet fuel from this pipeline. That would be a massive blow to the aviation industry. We can’t let these radical Democrats further destroy our economy. Just two short years ago America was energy independent – and we were a net exporter of oil. Now, thanks to Whitmer, Biden and their radical cronies we are again dependent on foreign nations for oil and inflation is at a 40-year high. Peter, we have a real opportunity to stop them by flipping Michigan. We can turn the state from blue to red. Gretchen Whitmer’s popularity has plummeted because of her reckless policies. She devastated small businesses with her prolonged lockdown. She forced Covid patients into nursing homes needlessly increasing deaths. She closed schools and forced masks on kids. She marched in a “ defund the police ” rally and publicly stated her support for the “spirit of the defund the police” movement. On issue after issue, Whitmer has shown she is out of touch with everyday Americans. We can defeat Gretchen Whitmer and flip Michigan back to the red column, and I need your help today. Will you chip in to help? $10, $25 or $50 will go a long way in defeating the radical left Michigan. | "CHIP IN $10 TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE" | "CHIP IN $25 TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE" | "CHIP IN $50 TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE" | "CHIP IN MORE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE" | Peter, following my time in the Marine Corps, I’ve built a 34-year career in law enforcement in Michigan. I’ve excelled at putting together high-performing teams to solve challenging problems. That’s what I bring to the table. . I believe our government spends too much and taxes are too high. That’s why I will oppose any efforts to raise taxes on Michigan’s citizens. Will you join me in this campaign? Let’s flip Michigan and send Gretchen Whitmer packing. Please make a generous donation today. Let’s stand together as we Fix Michigan and rebuild our nation. Sincerely, Michael Brown Republican for Governor PS - In another cynical move, Whitmer also vetoed legislation that would have lowered the state’s income tax. name: VoteVets
subject: $3 to stop Rick Scott and Republicans from making it harder for members of the military to vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Rick Scott, Chairman of the Republican Senatorial Campaign Committee released a blueprint for his party’s rule should they take over the Senate.
#
Derek —
Rick Scott, Chairman of the Republican Senatorial Campaign Committee, released a blueprint for his party’s rule should they take over the Senate.
And in that plan, he says Republicans will pass a law that forbids mail-in ballots showing up after Election Day from being counted, ever.
This is, of course, a nod to the Big Lie that the election was stolen. And in doing so, he is willing to make it harder for members of the military to vote.
In his own state of Florida, there is a 10-day exception for ballots cast overseas, including by members of the military, as long as they are postmarked by Election Day.
Acceptances like that for our service members would be gone if Scott gets his way.
So we can’t let him.
VoteVets is one of the leading outside spending groups for Democrats. But we can’t do it alone. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets before our end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few days? This is so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-work?refcode=em220325-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=4371_3013755_OjOQjW&akid=4371%2E3013755%2EOjOQjW)
| [CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-work?refcode=em220325-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=4371_3013755_OjOQjW&akid=4371%2E3013755%2EOjOQjW)
---
Help us defeat Rick Scott.
VoteVets

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: How to Change the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: They did it again.
Democrats needed Republican votes to fund the government. Senate Republican leaders had the leverage to fight for real reforms – building a border wall, boosting U.S. energy production, defunding unconstitutional vaccine mandates.
And what did they do? **Nothing.**
Mitch McConnell and his lackeys not only worked with Democrats to pass the $1.5 trillion bill. They brought back earmarks, too – 4,000 of them! As usual, establishment Republicans sold out their principles, their constituents, and our children.
What did we get? More spending, more debt, and more fuel to the inflation fire.
_**You and I both know that these outrageous Senate votes will not change until the Senators do.**_
**[Let's dump the Senate establishment to save America!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5f29252ef95f492fb27d795a65b0dd55&_e=XByGbg_sz9PTlZ-YEhdaTyHXUyDn5UZpL0UJ4B6_9Ch13W7AT9o1MdsrbVO8GmkscknUpdAkUqMpSImGdDW9HWseBfsftGFI-5kefMgE2jguKCrsxhzq_UuS5-n_c2aKP0w5zFeMZ9laSRwq6BdRJa4fIJ3INCp8twEkuLtIE2G4rEK0V0o4egSZXwjhZSuBTOwWUPMd2vbiImBcT3CoCUG6WILfieHl8o4NG4SIciRxIJyHsjjJbZmESuiYiEpjs4y3t-CKzWzPJztcJSFgO3DmiiGwprYSQgPhChikr_xg94ue9H7ncviWYZnWdXGs)**
The Senate Conservatives Fund (SCF) is committed to creating a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. No more corporate cronies! No more party hacks! No more McConnell lapdogs!
In 2022, we can stop the Washington Mono-Party by electing true conservatives to Senate seats across the country:
---
* **MO BROOKS** in Alabama;
* **JOSH MANDEL** in Ohio;
* **TED BUDD** in North Carolina;
* **ADAM LAXALT** in Nevada; and
* Senators **MIKE LEE** , **RAND PAUL** , and **RON JOHNSON**.

---
Fighting, principled conservatives like them – joining America First leaders like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and others – can change the Senate, Washington, and America.
SCF exists to leverage activist energy around the country and concentrates it on the most critical Senate races every cycle. This year, these races will determine not only whether the Senate goes Republican or Democrat but whether it will even matter.
**[Help us stop the endless Senate Sellouts by supporting SCF and our priority candidates today!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5f29252ef95f492fb27d795a65b0dd55&_e=XByGbg_sz9PTlZ-YEhdaTyHXUyDn5UZpL0UJ4B6_9Ch13W7AT9o1MdsrbVO8GmkscknUpdAkUqMpSImGdDW9HWseBfsftGFI-5kefMgE2jjQUsuBvUwPK49c1gv7tk8X35o1apgaMS9oU4AFEWCxvNxTqqL7sSXq40QPUj6wAyR9kbLWa8bW4EofneAlmPUaEgcK-Dm0kwpKAO4sQHRkx0ThLnHoZVq1wtatuV-CJT1f4PdAYIpxqfDdMi0IGJh3b-S0KWzS-YFiwBLA1JAaQUbSrkCuasMNziDBi46c5fmV8MGTE2ZZAVnB3BFZiicL)**

Friend, the U.S. Postal Service is a critical public service, delivering everything from daily mail to lifesaving medical supplies. In recent months, millions of Americans have depended on the USPS to ship COVID-19 tests provided by the Biden administration to keep them and their families safe. But this critical public service was thrown under the bus by the Trump administration.
**FIRST:** Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected Trump megadonor Louis DeJoy to be postmaster general.
**THEN:** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and groceries.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time enacting plans that reduce post office hours, increase prices and MASSIVELY slow down deliveries – including of the Biden administration's free COVID tests, a key part of our country's pandemic response.**

name: Karen Bass
subject: Wanted to loop you in on our new goal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Help our campaign kick off the race to the primary stronger than ever.

Team —

I wanted to loop you in on where our campaign stands at this point in the race. Two weeks ago, we officially qualified to be on the primary ballot in June. This week, I shared my vision for L.A. on stage at the first televised primary debate. And now, we need to get to work making history this year.

Our campaign needs to raise $50,000 before midnight on March 31. What we raise will go directly toward fueling our voter engagement efforts so we can reach voters in every corner of Los Angeles.

This goal is ambitious, but we can't afford to come up short. Especially when one of our opponents is already on pace to spend over $20 million before the primary. **[So I'm asking, team: will you contribute $5, or whatever you can afford, to help us reach our goal before the deadline? Please contribute what you can to support my campaign for mayor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377190/336926461/-1030957994?ms=em22_220325_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&refcode=em22_220325_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&source=em22_220325_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220325_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=C6fWqkcQK5qv1JI77W2k6fZW9dYKGLUh5mI3YZcTHQtjFf%2FVLkfGJAbJK2QlfkY8TjIw1C7D1AlocFup5D746R5x50tio8jQqNtHM7kCYaQR3yumSVAZHRGZ1Cb8xRtu64S9lwregdPtyv%2BliTQhkA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTI0ZDA4MC02MGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f6_ZnI7FV0acIuYa6tv9CmZEluD4F4PWN2XHOAJ4NEA=&emci=6fb9ce8d-a0ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b124d080-60ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

name: Team Latham
subject: I'm ready to debate
body:
Herschel Walker continues his Biden Basement Strategy
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Patriot,

We're entering the most crucial moment of the campaign and we can feel the momentum building every day. There are only 60 days left until the Republican primary on May 24th! We're working our tail off every day to meet with voters, attend as many events as possible, and organize our supporters as we head towards the finish line.
We have a big opportunity in the upcoming debates to show why I'm the authentic America First candidate in this race and the only candidate in the race who will defeat Raphael Warnock. I've said yes to every debate invitation we've received, including two upcoming ones: [9th District debate on April 9th](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hml1j_dVLalz8nUgFnT2r7OjO2ufMzxr0KrrLCctwMHyri00Eykojyl1kRwupm4WsWuSAprtxqZ0PfZIjQ68fxDLpt2GGObn_CJ-P1XQ866pHVzrTmjN57DVaU5-LeOjXg74qZvTiN0sz3DHI-7QibF73_gdKMt9SDA2bCJYOoc5nBnCmf4YPCPCVCEst3JAzKEZOZQWAkSJC8L-g6dheEmrVfp9jlcb_VKnOdCrG5TF5sXZtiZUgg==&c=L2P165BRBkKH09-VVsN2D3b0-j4U2424aRhS3Kw8KYlkjSdjAA5dzA==&ch=PV68PeK3zPeSnUULKlGh2ysyNtm7zn6LcKlWw0ofrrkEXLfGfPDclA==) and the [Atlanta Press Club debate on May 3rd.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hml1j_dVLalz8nUgFnT2r7OjO2ufMzxr0KrrLCctwMHyri00Eykojyl1kRwupm4W-PbqiUezp_MG1UTqmDOC4MADz8ub_KumW7cdAZnjiT63VuQjrQzG2MtiKiU9CwKA-eES7OOsF-WC3pvoaPHu4Kbxjm0TMxOtvRlk1YnTnEKklGpIXpfoBpYBtfXARllm_HgLRDR_hnOFNWKi15VO45q627MX2qe4C5mKKXWhuK-utqgBmMAU-g==&c=L2P165BRBkKH09-VVsN2D3b0-j4U2424aRhS3Kw8KYlkjSdjAA5dzA==&ch=PV68PeK3zPeSnUULKlGh2ysyNtm7zn6LcKlWw0ofrrkEXLfGfPDclA==) Unfortunately, Herschel Walker continues to refuse these invitations. His team knows that when voters hear his message versus mine, I flip all of his supporters to our team.
A United States Senate seat must be earned. Voters deserve to know where candidates stand on the issues and hear them in an unscripted forum. So I encourage all of our supporters to come to the 9th District debate on April 9th and show that we have the team that is ready to defeat Raphael Warnock.
Tickets are free, but they are limited and will sell out quickly, so make sure you get them today! [Click here to secure your tickets.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hml1j_dVLalz8nUgFnT2r7OjO2ufMzxr0KrrLCctwMHyri00Eykojyl1kRwupm4WsWuSAprtxqZ0PfZIjQ68fxDLpt2GGObn_CJ-P1XQ866pHVzrTmjN57DVaU5-LeOjXg74qZvTiN0sz3DHI-7QibF73_gdKMt9SDA2bCJYOoc5nBnCmf4YPCPCVCEst3JAzKEZOZQWAkSJC8L-g6dheEmrVfp9jlcb_VKnOdCrG5TF5sXZtiZUgg==&c=L2P165BRBkKH09-VVsN2D3b0-j4U2424aRhS3Kw8KYlkjSdjAA5dzA==&ch=PV68PeK3zPeSnUULKlGh2ysyNtm7zn6LcKlWw0ofrrkEXLfGfPDclA==)

| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hml1j_dVLalz8nUgFnT2r7OjO2ufMzxr0KrrLCctwMHyri00Eykojyl1kRwupm4WsWuSAprtxqZ0PfZIjQ68fxDLpt2GGObn_CJ-P1XQ866pHVzrTmjN57DVaU5-LeOjXg74qZvTiN0sz3DHI-7QibF73_gdKMt9SDA2bCJYOoc5nBnCmf4YPCPCVCEst3JAzKEZOZQWAkSJC8L-g6dheEmrVfp9jlcb_VKnOdCrG5TF5sXZtiZUgg==&c=L2P165BRBkKH09-VVsN2D3b0-j4U2424aRhS3Kw8KYlkjSdjAA5dzA==&ch=PV68PeK3zPeSnUULKlGh2ysyNtm7zn6LcKlWw0ofrrkEXLfGfPDclA==)

| With these upcoming debates, we should highlight the recent decision by the Rabun County Republican Party to pass a no-confidence resolution criticizing Herschel Walker for refusing to debate his primary opponents and engage with voters. I released a statement calling on county GOPs across the state to demand that Herschel Walker abandon his Biden Basement Strategy, answer questions with unscripted responses, and participate in debates. [You can read my full statement here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hml1j_dVLalz8nUgFnT2r7OjO2ufMzxr0KrrLCctwMHyri00Eykojyl1kRwupm4WGJL2h88qFIdoW_ALANuKlGx8rE_qtsci2gSIG-Q7LK_I7NIsBfLUZRlk_cq8lr9eiqhzD6r9YwtkmXf1Y6tcwMSTU5T4ZK4lhxkGZcdngYbKJPqruNGQmmf7srCKFznW4u2HVXWtAIK2ITkUnolwtKuCrpZJZrM6NiZvinCMVpN3r1ox01aHlw==&c=L2P165BRBkKH09-VVsN2D3b0-j4U2424aRhS3Kw8KYlkjSdjAA5dzA==&ch=PV68PeK3zPeSnUULKlGh2ysyNtm7zn6LcKlWw0ofrrkEXLfGfPDclA==)
---
|
I also want to take a moment to thank the Georgia Public Safety Training Center for inviting us out this week. Georgia is blessed to have the #1 law enforcement training center in the nation because of the team at GPSTC, and I was honored to get a firsthand look at the important work they are doing to educate and train Georgia's law enforcement. I will always stand with and defend our great law enforcement officers in Georgia.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hml1j_dVLalz8nUgFnT2r7OjO2ufMzxr0KrrLCctwMHyri00Eykojyl1kRwupm4WKTvfNfRleQVR5TVElQUgooInwquCtyw0_OS0RCKunyQGYEJlYap7WhIJFVo9Uxjd9KVHIgLpBEgJ_jqka1NWhVfAjPgi_0uqGIA84Yx7d5PAZLBmec7evOyWEPP6aDiQn9nS1ffwTS28HhXbCP4oat3IgZngjg03nKS8KuwiNFd3JLhgpXr3Wg==&c=L2P165BRBkKH09-VVsN2D3b0-j4U2424aRhS3Kw8KYlkjSdjAA5dzA==&ch=PV68PeK3zPeSnUULKlGh2ysyNtm7zn6LcKlWw0ofrrkEXLfGfPDclA==)
---
|
---
| Voters in Georgia are hungry for experienced and capable leadership that will fight back against the failed policy agenda of Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock. I've got the plan to do it, but we need to amplify our campaign's message. We are about to launch our TV ads so that all Georgians learn who I am, hear my message and know they have a choice in this race between celebrity and real leadership.

clean_body: Herschel Walker continues his Biden Basement Strategy | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, We're entering the most crucial moment of the campaign and we can feel the momentum building every day. There are only 60 days left until the Republican primary on May 24th! We're working our tail off every day to meet with voters, attend as many events as possible, and organize our supporters as we head towards the finish line. We have a big opportunity in the upcoming debates to show why I'm the authentic America First candidate in this race and the only candidate in the race who will defeat Raphael Warnock. I've said yes to every debate invitation we've received, including two upcoming ones: == and the == Unfortunately, Herschel Walker continues to refuse these invitations. His team knows that when voters hear his message versus mine, I flip all of his supporters to our team. A United States Senate seat must be earned. Voters deserve to know where candidates stand on the issues and hear them in an unscripted forum. So I encourage all of our supporters to come to the 9th District debate on April 9th and show that we have the team that is ready to defeat Raphael Warnock. Tickets are free, but they are limited and will sell out quickly, so make sure you get them today! == | == | With these upcoming debates, we should highlight the recent decision by the Rabun County Republican Party to pass a no-confidence resolution criticizing Herschel Walker for refusing to debate his primary opponents and engage with voters. I released a statement calling on county GOPs across the state to demand that Herschel Walker abandon his Biden Basement Strategy, answer questions with unscripted responses, and participate in debates. == | I also want to take a moment to thank the Georgia Public Safety Training Center for inviting us out this week. Georgia is blessed to have the #1 law enforcement training center in the nation because of the team at GPSTC, and I was honored to get a firsthand look at the important work they are doing to educate and train Georgia's law enforcement. I will always stand with and defend our great law enforcement officers in Georgia. | == | | Voters in Georgia are hungry for experienced and capable leadership that will fight back against the failed policy agenda of Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock. I've got the plan to do it, but we need to amplify our campaign's message. We are about to launch our TV ads so that all Georgians learn who I am, hear my message and know they have a choice in this race between celebrity and real leadership. As we get closer to launching those ads, I hope you'll consider pitching in to help us reach our budget goal to reach voters in every corner of this state. Please consider donating today. $10, $20, $50, whatever you're able to give will help us tremendously in this mission to take back Georgia. == | == | | | Don't forget, the time to vote is coming soon! Mark your calendar to vote and be sure to encourage your family and friends to do the same! Early Voting Begins May 2nd Final Primary Election Day is May 24th == | | Above all, thank you for all of the support that you've shown me as we work to take back our country. Please help us amplify our message by following us on ==, ==, and ==. Gratefully, Latham | == == == == | | | | | | | Team Latham | 4062 Peachtree Rd. NE, Suite A #288, Atlanta, GA 39319 | | Sent by mailto:info@lathamsaddler.com

clean_body: | | | | This sets the tone. | Peter Willis, This is our FIRST End-of-Quarter deadline of the election year. This is the single most critical deadline we have ever faced. If we don’t leave it all out on the field, the Democrats will win - meaning Pennsylvania will remain an oppressed state for the next 4 years. If there ever was a time to act and defend our freedom, it’s now. In a staff meeting this morning, Lou asked us to reach out to you because he needs your help. It’s simple. If he can’t raise the funds, he won’t get elected. And right now, we are short $8,745 of our March goal before the end-of-quarter deadline March 28th at 11:59 P.M. Lou knows you’re a loyal supporter, and he knows you’ve always stepped up to the plate in the past. He hopes this month is no exception. Thank you, Lou Barletta for Governor | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 ==

name: John & Michelle
subject: Happy Maryland Day, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
We are both grateful to be raising our families in this incredible state, and we wanted to take a minute to talk about what our favorite parts of Maryland are!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377409/336927232/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220325-b1_fr_in-JKMS_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220325-b1_fr_in-JKMS_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220325&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_in&&&&utm_term=JKMS_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=7b9d4635-61ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjlkNDYzNS02MWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=haqUnWAKkIuDc6I86AjhMAku_NoNn62iut5zVoq6dng=)
---
| Peter, Happy Maryland Day! John and Michelle here. As proud Marylanders who couldn’t imagine living anywhere else, we wanted to take a minute to talk about how special Maryland is to us and how proud we are to be running to represent the state we feel lucky to call home. **John here:** My family roots in Maryland date back to at least the early 1800s, but for my wife Melissa and me it is the diversity of Maryland - from the incredible racial and cultural diversity of the people to the extraordinary variation in the geography from Mountain Maryland to the Chesapeake to Ocean City - that made us choose to raise our family here. **Michelle here:** As soon as I began law school in Maryland, there was something about living here that I’d never felt anywhere else. The authenticity and small town feel instantly made me feel at home, and ultimately my husband and I chose to make our home here because we found a community where we feel connected with those around us. And here are couple more of our favorite things about Maryland: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377412/336927233/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220325-b1_fr_in-JKMS_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220325-b1_fr_in-JKMS_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220325&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_in&&&&utm_term=JKMS_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=7b9d4635-61ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjlkNDYzNS02MWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=haqUnWAKkIuDc6I86AjhMAku_NoNn62iut5zVoq6dng=) We are both so grateful to be raising our families in this incredible state, and we are thrilled to be running for Governor and Lt. Governor to build upon everything we love so much and transform that promise into the progress all Marylanders deserve. If you share our love for this state we call home, will you share some of your favorite things about Maryland, Peter? **Let us know what you love about our great state by replying to this email or by sharing with us here!** | | [SHARE YOUR MARYLAND FAVORITES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377414/336927237/-444893703?contactdata=7gtaKkKorjF3eZLvcq7vuyTwl%2FQGV73lheR0WqJ%2BIMc6iOmMy55i1o1pwvAwuATJwusQOTRvkp32Jd129YJSyUgN5iuGL5JiaLnzp7q%2B5XcNMIh5CRUcBDwEElVa0oACHMe86C%2FHxhk0ChUUVMSMX%2BedJqmA8IYYO%2FkhsonfDCliuW%2Fx6C%2B%2B%2BPkqorLDOkq4Tl%2Fl0aZmnFEo8sQabQ5q8w%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjlkNDYzNS02MWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=haqUnWAKkIuDc6I86AjhMAku_NoNn62iut5zVoq6dng=&emci=8d4b9784-ecaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b9d4635-61ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
---
Thanks and have a great rest of your day!
John and Michelle

clean_body: We are both grateful to be raising our families in this incredible state, and we wanted to take a minute to talk about what our favorite parts of Maryland are! | = | Peter, Happy Maryland Day! John and Michelle here. As proud Marylanders who couldn’t imagine living anywhere else, we wanted to take a minute to talk about how special Maryland is to us and how proud we are to be running to represent the state we feel lucky to call home. John here: My family roots in Maryland date back to at least the early 1800s, but for my wife Melissa and me it is the diversity of Maryland - from the incredible racial and cultural diversity of the people to the extraordinary variation in the geography from Mountain Maryland to the Chesapeake to Ocean City - that made us choose to raise our family here. Michelle here: As soon as I began law school in Maryland, there was something about living here that I’d never felt anywhere else. The authenticity and small town feel instantly made me feel at home, and ultimately my husband and I chose to make our home here because we found a community where we feel connected with those around us. And here are couple more of our favorite things about Maryland: = We are both so grateful to be raising our families in this incredible state, and we are thrilled to be running for Governor and Lt. Governor to build upon everything we love so much and transform that promise into the progress all Marylanders deserve. If you share our love for this state we call home, will you share some of your favorite things about Maryland, Peter? Let us know what you love about our great state by replying to this email or by sharing with us here! | | Thanks and have a great rest of your day! name: South Bay CRA
subject: Don't Miss the 28th
body:
Wise Words from my Husband Remember, if we keep voting the same way we will keep getting the same thing. We can be part of the problem or we can be p
| |
---
|
---
|
---
# **Wise Words from my Husband**
**Remember, if we keep voting the same way we will keep getting the same thing. We can be part of the problem or we can be part of the solution, you choose. - Derrick Gates**
## South Bay Republican Assembly
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
For those that attended the CRA conference this weekend, I hope you had a wonderful time. These events are important because it takes you from being a coach to actually playing in the game. The time of being an armchair quarterback is over. Get in the game or get out of the way, we have a country to save! We would like to hear your feedback on the event, how you think it went, and what involvement you would like to have in the future through our South Bay Club.
**See the end email for a list of CRA elected offices and endorsed candidates**
## __
Also a reminder that our club will have its triumphant return from a hiatus on the 28th of this month. Don't miss this amazing time of fellowship with great speakers that will inspire you to stand and make a change.
Blessed and Free,
Nena Gates
President (pro-tem)
nenarenae2@gmail.com
**About the upcoming meeting on the 28th @ 6:15 Walter Buisness Men's Club. 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 90505**
I would like to remind everyone that we will be having our monthly meeting on March 28th at the Walteria Business Men's Club. We have some wonderful speakers that will be joining us and I look forward to hearing from each one of them.
If you have any questions please feel free to reach out to me and I will get back to you shortly.
## Monday Evening Meeting! Monday, March 28th 6:15 PM to 8:30 PM
---
---
|
---
# **Sonya Green**
Business owner of 25 years in Huntington Beach, California, Sonya Green’s sole dream was to help people be the best they can be and build unity within one’s community.
With that goal in mind, she established her own staffing company, now called WorkLand Staffing, rebranded after losing her brother in 2020. Sonya has been successful at placing over 25,000 people into gainful employment.
Sonya is the Founder of the PAC “Patriots for Freedom,” and was an Authorized Personnel for Recall Gavin 2020.
As a business owner, Sonya was awarded 2-time Entrepreneur of the Year by the Orange County Business Journal, awarded by EDD “Most Placed of Unemployed Individuals,” and awarded the One-Stop Dislocated Aerospace Workers Project, where she placed numerous displaced Aerospace workers.
Sonya has been a long-time advocate for the homeless and veterans, and frequently places unemployed U.S. Military Veterans into gainful employment, easing the transition into civilian life. Sonya has recently formed an alliance to remove those who abuse their power in government.
She has been consistently vocal about the mishandling of our judicial system, educational indoctrination, political fractures, budget mismanagement, government overreach and the disregard for our Constitution.
"An alliance of community is a necessity to combat those who are trying to destroy it"
~ Sonya Green
|
---
# **Siaka Massaquoi**
Actor Siaka Massaquoi entered Hollywood with big dreams. However, after witnessing racism firsthand and seeing colleagues lose roles because of their skin color, he began to ask questions. This is his story of breaking free. Siaka is now running for State Assembly and has committed the last several years to fighting for your freedom.
|
---
# **Cole Brocato**
God, family and country are pillars in the Brocato household. Cole was raised to respect his elders, police and first responders. He was taught to have courage and fight for what is right, to respect and love his country, to stand for the flag and kneel before God. With his wife Stephanie by his side, they instill these same principles to their sons Caleb and Xander. Their boys are taught to believe all goals and dreams are achievable, if they are willing to work hard even through life’s adversities. Without a doubt, these opportunities exist because of America’s greatness. The forethought of our founding fathers, the sacrifices made by them and all who’ve fought since that time, are looked at with much gratitude in their family.
**Point of Interest:**
**CRA Endorsed some of the following Candidates**
# __
Governor: Jenny Rae Le Roux
Attorney General: Eric Early
Senate: Dr. Cordie Williams We will have a complete list of endorsed candidates soon Below are the results of the CRA Officer Elections at the 2022 Annual Convention in Buena Park:
Executive Vice President (Two-year Term)
Carl Brickey - 114 votes - Elected
George Grachen - 37 votes
Vice President (5 two-year term positions and 1 one-year term position)
Molly Analla - 115 votes - Elected to Two-year Term
Celeste Greig - 109 votes - Elected to Two-year Term
Davina Keiser - 106 votes - Elected to Two-year Term
Jennye Bigelow - 98 votes - Elected to Two-year Term
Justin Hardcaslte - 97 votes - Elected to Two-year Term
Rich Handy - 85 votes - Elected to One-year Term
Sonia Lee - 77 votes
Dale Tyler - 55 votes
Membership Secretary (One-year Term)
PJ Garcia - 68 votes - Elected ***
Baron Night - 63 votes
**Jon Paul White - 20 ____
---
---

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Will you become a founding donor of our re-election campaign?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
I am running for re-election in New York’s 16th Congressional district with the goal to continue shaking up the status-quo and fighting for the progressive values we deserve. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4lXTwYVhRducjUbf2ls2gyx8zN2yXRLCKjKCfp0jNWk9ka_kMW4sO79zCLh7wV5BUxKwz59XQ-lt0tIHC3ucctDIefikx9pEjKlyy6JJcf4WiaQKFJY9RvxGUlwLKYID7xSSGAElLhpVloEIg_i12UYtQKonDNeTonhQgmxy_KvIKd9jx5M0s00jYKW6_8nxw_x5-hY9bnJ4cjBGcttQZTQwfaL-rzzcblChuoAgMBlqA/3kn/Oommf46mTXO1j0jPHw66Rg/h0/jq05u_Zty4A4okXh6yKF0w-au3cQ1yikeknCbC9mraU) Peter, it’s official. **I’m running for re-election to represent New York’s 16th Congressional District in the House of Representatives.** I’m humbled to receive the support of Jessica Cisneros — and I hope to also receive your support today, as well. In a few months, I’ll be asking my neighbors NY-16 for their vote so we can continue causing problems for the status quo and fight for the progressive values we all deserve. [_**If you’re ready to go and fired up just like I am to grow our movement — can you split any amount between Jessica Cisneros and my campaign today?**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCw0b-9f-UvrSlPctKxLYAVeb74MxfFeUhZ4B6X77hp7dbI9o4B9c_yaryeykMfy-DeLrSN3wMswCuWT4-8U8SvprRPvDpbg-8SQ99THA67X7PyZVIsYLCnH1b_esMadh09Yf-EvtfF8OBleLZNzhsoyScI-qJ9edHwM6YWDLjvryWPnPMRLCVAV8iK8OYGMI4Mx4pDwQBYCly3wn3yQ2LZMJi0aAtO0wAttJlygt4-MFTCyrV2PkIW1MY83ohKhXcBcj_xD0vAtV6V5YxedlZ-utRQ1RwoQ5gK3jaJshJ4ZOGL-VNmJXE33XXjE6haDhlpph0l0kBNTfTzVC4P4_B5w/3kn/Oommf46mTXO1j0jPHw66Rg/h1/48hPg_yA6T4WfFYO8fc-t6uUBJusS_9GPMy7139L_q0) [Donate now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCw0b-9f-UvrSlPctKxLYAVeb74MxfFeUhZ4B6X77hp7dWUysWw2yJaFFoF9pM9C9-Y5GbWk4S1u-8_QbtvhevyCZ8nQdcL79KVVthaLQFFSPq6WF-eITkzBATFJkTpx34MmhTmQ912ahmhj3M0V6X9sxl4bKho945ll2AmOzhbeUGB5blayPhgOXzOO_n9uvpL6tm-sYlzNOjQCFJMAebDInE89Fc3xqhusoLksHSsQnjc45y6hRiU7WxwtHFDuWHpg616fWWwHf-jvpaacNmDpZWIG_pNHF9hjmO0nhRONCBfengQ2alijGVyS4a3Ha49kzyKsa2YcAfigP5X1IszA/3kn/Oommf46mTXO1j0jPHw66Rg/h2/sc1pk3jcexECayrlR4cMRoWl7e2okYSIYookkGB7zsg) **I’m fired up to go back to Congress, Peter.** Because the truth is, people like me aren’t often elected to Congress. People like me — people who are Black, people who grew up in public housing, people who’ve been arrested, public school educators — aren’t typically given positions of influence and power. **We’re not given this power, even though we’re the ones closest to the pain.** I’ve experienced the same struggles as many of those who voted for me. I grew up in public housing and experienced firsthand the result of greedy landlords and failing public housing infrastructure. I’ve seen first hand how gun violence affects our communities, our schools, and our children. And to this day, I myself am dealing with the crushing weight of student debt loans. _I say all of this to simply explain that I understand._ And that’s not something that many of our current representatives in Congress can relate to — which leads to unjust and out of touch leadership and legislation. **Enough is enough, Peter.** We still have so much more work to do to fully address the racial, social, economic, and environmental inequities that exist in our communities and in our government. As one of very few progressive leaders in Congress, I deeply recognize the gravity of our decision-making — the lives of thousands depend on our ability to find solutions to the issues we face each and every day. And unlike many representatives in Congress today, **I refuse to be pressured or swayed into making compromises for my constituents.** With a strong establishment challenger poised against our campaign — and a voter landscape that has shifted dramatically from the one I was elected to in 2020 due to redistricting — we cannot afford to lose our momentum or we lose our opportunity to continue fighting for change in Congress. [_**As a grassroots funded campaign, our power is built and sustained by supporters like you — so, I need your support now more than ever, Peter. clean_body: I am running for re-election in New York’s 16th Congressional district with the goal to continue shaking up the status-quo and fighting for the progressive values we deserve. | | | Peter, it’s official. I’m running for re-election to represent New York’s 16th Congressional District in the House of Representatives. I’m humbled to receive the support of Jessica Cisneros — and I hope to also receive your support today, as well. In a few months, I’ll be asking my neighbors NY-16 for their vote so we can continue causing problems for the status quo and fight for the progressive values we all deserve. I’m fired up to go back to Congress, Peter. Because the truth is, people like me aren’t often elected to Congress. People like me — people who are Black, people who grew up in public housing, people who’ve been arrested, public school educators — aren’t typically given positions of influence and power. We’re not given this power, even though we’re the ones closest to the pain. I’ve experienced the same struggles as many of those who voted for me. I grew up in public housing and experienced firsthand the result of greedy landlords and failing public housing infrastructure. I’ve seen first hand how gun violence affects our communities, our schools, and our children. And to this day, I myself am dealing with the crushing weight of student debt loans. I say all of this to simply explain that I understand. And that’s not something that many of our current representatives in Congress can relate to — which leads to unjust and out of touch leadership and legislation. Enough is enough, Peter. We still have so much more work to do to fully address the racial, social, economic, and environmental inequities that exist in our communities and in our government. As one of very few progressive leaders in Congress, I deeply recognize the gravity of our decision-making — the lives of thousands depend on our ability to find solutions to the issues we face each and every day. And unlike many representatives in Congress today, I refuse to be pressured or swayed into making compromises for my constituents. With a strong establishment challenger poised against our campaign — and a voter landscape that has shifted dramatically from the one I was elected to in 2020 due to redistricting — we cannot afford to lose our momentum or we lose our opportunity to continue fighting for change in Congress. Thank you for your support, and I can’t wait to see what changes we continue to make together. Peace and love, Jamaal Bowman | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Izzi Levy
subject: obsessed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2964%2E3611125%2Evf7U1e ][IMG]

Folks, news outlets have reported that Donald Trump continues to
be OBSESSED with our Senate race.

Reminder: Trump’s first rally after leaving office (the one where he spent
his time taking cheap shots at Tim) was right here in Ohio.

Now, word is, the former President is taking meetings at Mar-A-Lago nearly
every week focused on keeping Ohio’s open Senate seat RED. And we know our
GOP opponents are making frequent pilgrimages there to beg for his
endorsement.

But, folks, do we need to show them a map? Because last we
checked, Mar-A-Lago is nowhere close to Ohio.

Tim’s Republican opponents are moving further and further away from Ohio
(both ideologically and geographically). But no matter which extremist
millionaire wins the GOP primary, we cannot let them win this open Senate
seat.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9802?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2964%2E3611125%2Evf7U1e ]Can we count on you to step up and pitch in
$25 to give
our campaign the resources we need to defeat whichever out-of-touch
millionaire comes out on top?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9802?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2964%2E3611125%2Evf7U1e ]Chip in
$25

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9802?t=1010&amount=30&akid=2964%2E3611125%2Evf7U1e ]Other Amount

Josh Mandel. JD Vance. Mike Gibbons. Any one of Tim’s extremist

name: Nina Turner
subject: Solidarity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Nothing difficult is ever achieved alone
#

Hello Somebody!
Over the past few days, I’ve been watching the confirmation hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson. And I was particularly moved by her story about a Black woman — a stranger to her — recognizing that she was struggling and offering a kind word when it was needed most.
It was a powerful moment of solidarity, and it reminded me of a story from my time in college. I think it’s important, so I hope you’ll take the time to read on.
As you may know, I’m a first-generation college graduate. And as the oldest of seven siblings, it was not easy.
The first time I enrolled at Tri-C (Cuyahoga Community College for those of you not from here), I had to drop out to help take care of my family.
And because I didn’t formally withdraw from my classes, when I returned years later, my GPA had taken a dive.
When I tell you I wanted to turn around and walk right out of that building the moment I found out...
But I had an advisor — a woman named Iris Williams. She would not let me feel sorry for myself, and she sat me down at her desk and together we made a plan.
I made the Dean’s List every quarter after that, and eventually became a lecturer and then a tenured professor at Tri-C.
All that was possible because one person would not give up on me. A single gesture of solidarity can make a massive difference in someone’s life.
And that’s what we’re trying to do on this campaign — to stand in solidarity with working people, and tell them that they are not alone, and that together we have the power to change things.
Nothing difficult is ever achieved alone — and that includes winning a race for Congress. The truth is, the only way we’re going to have the resources to compete against the powerful special interests who want to stop us is with the support of a massive grassroots movement of conscious-minded people like you.
**[So if you can afford it, please make a contribution to our 100% people-powered campaign. We’re just days away from the first FEC deadline of the campaign, and we can’t afford to fall short of our goals now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377817/336928970/-1971788355?refcode2=23c5677a-63ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220325-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2M1Njc3YS02M2FjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OrMbf5eEL-MU4P7D_DOaW6wLx92qKWmwIz7GQUI3e9U=)**
This campaign is powered by working folks chipping in whatever they can afford because they believe in a vision of a better world and know that the ONLY way we’re going to get there is if we stand together.
Thank you for being a part of it. As long as we continue to stand in solidarity with each other, we are going to accomplish great things.
With these hands,
Nina Turner
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377818/336928971/-1971788355?refcode2=23c5677a-63ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220325-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2M1Njc3YS02M2FjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OrMbf5eEL-MU4P7D_DOaW6wLx92qKWmwIz7GQUI3e9U=)**

* * *

name: Aleksander
subject: 270 ROUNDS of ammunition and a jar of gasoline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alek for Oregon
body:
My life changed forever the day I tackled an islamic terrorist on a French passenger train. Do you have a few moments to let me tell you why? I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism, now I want to take on the radical-Left in Washington. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=42308f57c8dd458e92da511328b20f4e&_t=awWLMsZPRBs-n-W21a98E3hHl1elREXBHUeHPzTfXvErTT11lWs_0TuspLCfMDOm5nH0ElB4tMX6AIyGNMvkvRN75yUYa56epFoALCWxhx_QZHVLpPAE-2YGp5BR_aHcJ85vyoMBCVN_RQt5RK6fCmmCKQCW07do8MHJRwxGATw%3D) | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42308f57c8dd458e92da511328b20f4e&_e=9ljfcR1q2TFbaBt7U0Dqj5o0ooKqxgmCDaDYNnrV6rw_vpRyg-RhuTypFunHCiiM0jeGogq6o63iNDzcIB3H38lExUb7J_uvovLO5vmEw-68ttrNsDE2R5pFdvfTrZRAWhHuRPXSGjKWtqw38BTSxNsuwxn5gnWQ9MfPH8EZIxDChFsvmIh_w9SVI-yH4xOL98d9L3osERFnpMSV7HyQL2dvITPs_c2yQbEfUbvC-yBkzmNMVCD1FmcJstwEohtNtQfKVseBlPhOp2OOXHHOprXUIJYaxKkN5FyjvVajgItqPAPsg6N5KGNh8SzOU1Mbow_NE3kNfgyPx8pYqi0VtvMIFw5efRlm-ghBqOZBXXwV1FR-RYE8btXu1CDq1BFQQn7vtY-1DDnS4Ohe21Gj2YmziEaEzfTmDzNzjELTFTs%3D)
---
Peter,

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.

For this, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film _The 15:17 to Paris,_ directed by Clint Eastwood.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42308f57c8dd458e92da511328b20f4e&_e=9ljfcR1q2TFbaBt7U0Dqj5o0ooKqxgmCDaDYNnrV6rw_vpRyg-RhuTypFunHCiiM0jeGogq6o63iNDzcIB3H38lExUb7J_uvovLO5vmEw-68ttrNsDE2R5pFdvfTrZRAWhHuRPXSGjKWtqw38BTSxNsuwxn5gnWQ9MfPH8EZIxDChFsvmIh_w9SVI-yH4xOL98d9L3osERFnpMSV7HyQL-oNtSfHabeYEYXw1-CKx5IaH0eUnFAx7KhRP_HbeOe-8gP-Myyt7C86UBSvm5azTx9sKsjGL8_WT8zgD2xjoEoMlNktIDTAY2pUbtKABfIf-b2bxiix-ac4rArJrSgLYc_hhjCIxJhNlc_TRbEgeVPGBmOi7cNTBmeHWS-ymRxVWBF52RgxVE752krMvbjyyHL5KBcLAqCAcolRcgAn-SY%3D)Anthony Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California.
But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – **I did it out of duty.** And now, duty is calling me again.

[**My name is Alek Skarlatos, I am a former National Guardsman, an American Patriot, a proud Republican and I am running for Congress in Oregon’s 4th District.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42308f57c8dd458e92da511328b20f4e&_e=9ljfcR1q2TFbaBt7U0Dqj5o0ooKqxgmCDaDYNnrV6rw_vpRyg-RhuTypFunHCiiM0jeGogq6o63iNDzcIB3H38lExUb7J_uvovLO5vmEw-68ttrNsDE2R5pFdvfTrZRAWhHuRPXSGjKWtqw38BTSxNsuwxn5gnWQ9MfPH8EZIxDChFsvmIh_w9SVI-yH4xOL98d9L3osERFnpMSV7HyQL_UpPH1FI_WypAcDkgEtC0wQfpvEEyvzFdvgUyKrMY4HJKddMnltq9iXLlj3z2abd_Vep894WGTBWGtupc7qRHMeQx1Mu-pGxZPXSatBpzljvVw23K8K1oRwaWhGO28i1et7jdAB009P2Cd-Em8qenKLLMe8T8S24XQodMGCnvylWml4UC1Ig58ssN8sITwAQi14mVwP8w-nbhky6tlbUo8%3D)

I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why **I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington.**

[**Will you lend your support to my fight by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or another amount today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42308f57c8dd458e92da511328b20f4e&_e=9ljfcR1q2TFbaBt7U0Dqj5o0ooKqxgmCDaDYNnrV6rw_vpRyg-RhuTypFunHCiiM0jeGogq6o63iNDzcIB3H38lExUb7J_uvovLO5vmEw-68ttrNsDE2R5pFdvfTrZRAWhHuRPXSGjKWtqw38BTSxNsuwxn5gnWQ9MfPH8EZIxDChFsvmIh_w9SVI-yH4xOL98d9L3osERFnpMSV7HyQLy8X5-J1zESptvF_MA5IBQHFXm3VVLzmRvsSWn-qyz9NAhSDeXx-oCznnI03n5Y9faVQeNcXvQBYQYRKj0Zf3mjYnkZXVUmsgqPMesIS4qzYqzhi3HjerjuhxizCz1-OFUT1HlIKat__HmMjkjRTjbi7ihMcyk3sY2Xd6rbiBHGLjXYEG1ifHMM0Veq6_mjkRaiP7icah8pPkqUoShYiRnU%3D)

| [_SUPPORT ALEK_
**DONATE TODAY ›› **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42308f57c8dd458e92da511328b20f4e&_e=9ljfcR1q2TFbaBt7U0Dqj5o0ooKqxgmCDaDYNnrV6rw_vpRyg-RhuTypFunHCiiM0jeGogq6o63iNDzcIB3H38lExUb7J_uvovLO5vmEw-68ttrNsDE2R5pFdvfTrZRAWhHuRPXSGjKWtqw38BTSxNsuwxn5gnWQ9MfPH8EZIxDChFsvmIh_w9SVI-yH4xOL98d9L3osERFnpMSV7HyQLyLd4kLS9TMSFQL4tQwHsoELOAysHnX0SJH1hwcZL_ETxqyPAZfx0S9dephiS7F8r6b5JfqgYQJt3r3nOxHkI_Ewrk9moz6xuE6yRG57xqIK4HFsLtasnC9fhn7XH6dAuOvV_bePff6qNoNirosrvewGawKH-vj09oaqZdXYsitfmW1G0116-NaTng6nu6Q2S0x-HgkrySP4-jk-IImSGV8%3D)
---

**For the first time since 1986** , there is no incumbent running for election in this coastal district, giving Republicans a REAL opportunity to pick up this seat and put it in our column, flipping the House majority in the process.

I am committed to restoring conservative leadership to this district. Southern Oregon’s economy has wasted away due to the Leftist control of the longtime incumbent and his radical-Left allies.

**I am running for Congress to represent the loggers, veterans, moms, dads and families that hold the American dream dear.** The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=42308f57c8dd458e92da511328b20f4e&_e=9ljfcR1q2TFbaBt7U0Dqj5o0ooKqxgmCDaDYNnrV6rw_vpRyg-RhuTypFunHCiiM0jeGogq6o63iNDzcIB3H38lExUb7J_uvovLO5vmEw-68ttrNsDE2R5pFdvfTrZRAWhHuRPXSGjKWtqw38BTSxNsuwxn5gnWQ9MfPH8EZIxDChFsvmIh_w9SVI-yH4xOL98d9L3osERFnpMSV7HyQL7MCPTKxmR7vZcfZk507Y0-mvLMEBWIjF9VUw1Fda0QWt1u-RycsM_m8Do-zoEfjC1XvnP_GOtGVfgEYfnjGFpkom2qb5aUgPgQhHOmGbCLJJaiv3izO6F_jVznXrLUSAtcsA9jGi5uzspROxQcHIG3ulSfHOZoHElBAMv9sHaimHzH0P6acRZXPhRy91fPAlMM3m-4VyN63pEHCG75Mm2A%3D)

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. clean_body: My life changed forever the day I tackled an islamic terrorist on a French passenger train. Do you have a few moments to let me tell you why? I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism, now I want to take on the radical-Left in Washington. Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. For this, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film The 15:17 to Paris, directed by Clint Eastwood. Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California. But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – I did it out of duty. And now, duty is calling me again. I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington. | For the first time since 1986 , there is no incumbent running for election in this coastal district, giving Republicans a REAL opportunity to pick up this seat and put it in our column, flipping the House majority in the process. I am committed to restoring conservative leadership to this district. Southern Oregon’s economy has wasted away due to the Leftist control of the longtime incumbent and his radical-Left allies. I am running for Congress to represent the loggers, veterans, moms, dads and families that hold the American dream dear. The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them. My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. subject: Dump the Senate Establishment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: They did it again.
Democrats needed Republican votes to fund the government. Senate Republican leaders had the leverage to fight for real reforms – building a border wall, boosting U.S. energy production, defunding unconstitutional vaccine mandates.
And what did they do? **Nothing.**
Mitch McConnell and his lackeys not only worked with Democrats to pass the $1.5 trillion bill. They brought back earmarks, too – 4,000 of them! As usual, establishment Republicans sold out their principles, their constituents, and our children.
What did we get? More spending, more debt, and more fuel to the inflation fire.
_**You and I both know that these outrageous Senate votes will not change until the Senators do.**_
**[Let's dump the Senate establishment to save America!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=01a12384946c4e4aa2afb8eacc669077&_e=1rHFo9P0nLmvt3vXqej9ATMyP8ICReKhrJ5hwvI6UeqUK8pRSO2oXKllZbyZNFibgmPnE73hs6grAdFlDkueO421CnaXEn16_TpQsUOAG3ykJwTxXkdNmGW5dBddrHw7_GVKSFufZCnC5sonFaOuI_KIGxDjU31MwNdEzCi8mhcwrF9mT_UOIsU62ioKpPD_llDdc04usX0uNz7cZj2ywvtK4g8iaudccFTWRRiIfg4faG6Ht2KvNzpNoqSnkqr-xGHeerq3Rkl0bk6jZNG6S7NzgOztKCpwLOkbaXijVeId-mmCTs3jU94mmP_LLz9B)**
The Senate Conservatives Fund (SCF) is committed to creating a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. No more corporate cronies! No more party hacks! No more McConnell lapdogs!
In 2022, we can stop the Washington Mono-Party by electing true conservatives to Senate seats across the country:
---
* **MO BROOKS** in Alabama;
* **JOSH MANDEL** in Ohio;
* **TED BUDD** in North Carolina;
* **ADAM LAXALT** in Nevada; and
* Senators **MIKE LEE** , **RAND PAUL** , and **RON JOHNSON**.

---
Fighting, principled conservatives like them – joining America First leaders like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and others – can change the Senate, Washington, and America.
SCF exists to leverage activist energy around the country and concentrates it on the most critical Senate races every cycle. This year, these races will determine not only whether the Senate goes Republican or Democrat but whether it will even matter.

name: FLASH POLL via Derek Kilmer for Congress
subject: Do you support permanently expanding the Child Tax Credit?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter -- Derek wants to know your thoughts: **[Should Congress focus on expanding the Child Tax Credit?](https://act.myngp.com/el/F6XP1WGRI7LxLa7F5eiwv_0g0WyoFVMN7Y_seAu2G6o=/tbdeSwAgiku1B9S5NOyrGj-dORM1o2pMZG8MVMMiRmc=?ms=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**
[YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/F6XP1WGRI7LxLa7F5eiwv_0g0WyoFVMN7Y_seAu2G6o=/tbdeSwAgiku1B9S5NOyrGj-dORM1o2pMZG8MVMMiRmc=?ms=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
| [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/F6XP1WGRI7LxLa7F5eiwv_0g0WyoFVMN7Y_seAu2G6o=/tbdeSwAgiku1B9S5NOyrGj-dORM1o2pMZG8MVMMiRmc=?ms=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
As a dad, Derek knows firsthand that every parent wants their child to have the support they need to be happy and lead successful lives. But, the COVID-19 pandemic was tough on families. That's why Derek helped pass the American Rescue Plan, which included the Child Tax Credit, to provide children and their families with additional relief payments.

**But here 's the thing, Peter: the Child Tax Credit expired last December. Nearly four million children fell into poverty the month after, and today, parents are still feeling the squeeze of rising costs. **

An expanded Child Tax Credit will put more money in the pockets of hardworking parents to help cover necessities like food, childcare, diapers, healthcare, clothing, and taxes. It will help set up our kids for success. But Derek wants to hear from you:

**[Do you think Congress should focus on expanding the Child Tax Credit? Take our one-question poll.](https://act.myngp.com/el/F6XP1WGRI7LxLa7F5eiwv_0g0WyoFVMN7Y_seAu2G6o=/tbdeSwAgiku1B9S5NOyrGj-dORM1o2pMZG8MVMMiRmc=?ms=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/F6XP1WGRI7LxLa7F5eiwv_0g0WyoFVMN7Y_seAu2G6o=/qFkXeas2bk17q7w3Ra9QkjohdPmkbFcFBFHqgR7WbQg=?refcode=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220325_ctc_engg_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/F6XP1WGRI7LxLa7F5eiwv_0g0WyoFVMN7Y_seAu2G6o=/MSQNbgp0ob0pIvNnZaVQDV0jBOQLQRpz2SYgI5zuZw0=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F6XP1WGRI7LxLa7F5eiwv_0g0WyoFVMN7Y_seAu2G6o=/9q3gXnkv-u61j5Ljg6oCVUFtOva7vmdXvWfA0ppMWS4=)
---|---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: I know this isn’t what you want to hear right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Peter, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59943270:6Lh6LpoAN:m:1:3317145305:D258326D6CDBC1C3918F663ACC2412C8:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59943270:6Lh6LpoAN:m:1:3317145305:D258326D6CDBC1C3918F663ACC2412C8:r "Generic Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59943270:6Lh6LpoAN:m:1:3317145305:D258326D6CDBC1C3918F663ACC2412C8:r "Can I count on
you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59943270:6Lh6LpoAN:m:1:3317145305:D258326D6CDBC1C3918F663ACC2412C8:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59943270:6Lh6LpoAN:m:1:3317145305:D258326D6CDBC1C3918F663ACC2412C8:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59943270:6Lh6LpoAN:m:1:3317145305:D258326D6CDBC1C3918F663ACC2412C8:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please,
rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59943270:6Lh6LpoAN:m:1:3317145305:D258326D6CDBC1C3918F663ACC2412C8:r)
---
Dan Crenshaw

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59943271:6Lh6LpoAN:m:1:3317145305:D258326D6CDBC1C3918F663ACC2412C8:r "Can we count

name: Freedom First Project

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znvi3o9c69ov63doh971k3lhntbi5cbt7fq5m6c0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqncp3ie5hm4orhctjmec5nmlrj8olgm8rr1p5jc8rb2dtkc8pn5crmmoqb0obnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjacb0eaomcd776mo6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ge4pj4c9gm0oh5u)
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqr4suul2ablu4hnag5sq4u55ga9ls9100d65q70_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9j68oj1c1h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpdh31ok5f7uniqefg1sdci81slh089pk34psp68_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9j68oj1c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl6r3cc6q865rrq0u25lv73a59o80gfj69pm30t8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0s9j68oj1c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Letitia
subject: FWD: Will you help me make up the difference?
