body:
Peter, did you see my last message?

The fight for gender equality may be far from over, but I vow never to bow and never to break. There is so much work to do to protect reproductive rights, close the gender pay gap, and uplift the voices of Black women who are too often ignored or overlooked – so I need fearless fighters like you to join this important fight.

**Peter, I’m only $829 short of my critical goal, so please, in honor of Women’s History Month: Will you rush a donation of whatever you can spare to help me make history again and win re-election?

Here’s the best link to give: **[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jamesforny-22**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43358918/336876491/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk369-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZiZWY4ZS00NGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFL2zzzQ0cdxxNqFz7N3a6KbFj-41ozEVxZYJmyZuxA=)

Thank you for your support.

Letitia

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43358919/336876492/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk369-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZiZWY4ZS00NGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFL2zzzQ0cdxxNqFz7N3a6KbFj-41ozEVxZYJmyZuxA=)
Peter,

In the last few decades, women have made astonishing strides in the fight for equality. We didn’t wait to be invited to the table; instead, we forced our way into positions of leadership, discovery, and success. And, because of the tireless determination of the women who came before me, we have never been closer to achieving equality than we are right now.

**But this fight isn’t over until every single person has equal pay, similar socio-economic opportunities, and the right to make decisions about their own body. **

I vow to never relent in my fight for equality, but I can’t continue to defend New York without your help. That’s why, in honor of Women’s History Month, my team set a goal to raise $20,000 before midnight on Friday.
[**Peter, will you rush $20 or more now to help me hit my goal and ensure that my re-election campaign has the resources it needs to win in November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43358920/336876493/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk369-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZiZWY4ZS00NGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFL2zzzQ0cdxxNqFz7N3a6KbFj-41ozEVxZYJmyZuxA=)
| | [Make a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43358921/336876500/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk369-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZiZWY4ZS00NGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFL2zzzQ0cdxxNqFz7N3a6KbFj-41ozEVxZYJmyZuxA=)
---
We made history in 2018 when I became the first Black woman _ever_ elected to hold statewide office. And I vowed then to never stop fighting to defend the forgotten and vulnerable. It has been my _honor_ to not only fight for all New Yorkers – especially women of color and LGBTQ+ people – but also to give a voice back to those who have gone so long without one.

I’m running for re-election because my fight is far from over. Across the country, reproductive freedom, voting rights, and LGBTQ+ rights are under attack. And women of color are _still_ fighting for a place at the table.
**Peter, the battle for equality ahead will be tough, but know this: I will not bow. I will not break. Election Day is only a few months away, and I need your help defeating my Republican opponent.

[So please, in honor of Women’s History Month, will you rush whatever you can spare to help fuel my campaign before midnight on Friday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43358922/336876508/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk369-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZiZWY4ZS00NGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFL2zzzQ0cdxxNqFz7N3a6KbFj-41ozEVxZYJmyZuxA=)**
| | [Make a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43358924/336876524/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk369-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZiZWY4ZS00NGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFL2zzzQ0cdxxNqFz7N3a6KbFj-41ozEVxZYJmyZuxA=)

Letitia

Your contribution will have the biggest impact in NH
| | |

**1,017**
That is the number of votes I won by in 2016 – less than half a percentage point. In campaigns, we call that a field margin. In a close race like that, winning depends on being on the ground early and talking to every voter you can.
This year is shaping up to be just as competitive. Mitch McConnell and his allies have spent over $7.5 million on attack ads, and there are millions more on the way. I'm the GOP's number one target – it's why my team started earlier than ever to get staff on the ground, reach every Granite Stater, and build a winning campaign.
**What happens in New Hampshire could determine the fate of the Senate.** That's why it's so important for us to reach our fundraising targets, like our upcoming end-of-quarter goal.
**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or any amount today? clean_body: Your contribution will have the biggest impact in NH | | | 1,017 That is the number of votes I won by in 2016 – less than half a percentage point. In campaigns, we call that a field margin. In a close race like that, winning depends on being on the ground early and talking to every voter you can. This year is shaping up to be just as competitive. Mitch McConnell and his allies have spent over $7.5 million on attack ads, and there are millions more on the way. I'm the GOP's number one target – it's why my team started earlier than ever to get staff on the ground, reach every Granite Stater, and build a winning campaign. What happens in New Hampshire could determine the fate of the Senate. That's why it's so important for us to reach our fundraising targets, like our upcoming end-of-quarter goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being on my team! name: HER Time

body:

This week, we saw Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson testify in front of the Senate Judiciary Committee.
**She faced down Republicans, who directed hours of offensive, ill-intentioned, racist, inane questions (and diatribes) at her. She responded with grace, dignity, and intelligence. And _way_ more patience than they deserved.**
The standards we force women -- especially women of color -- to meet are insane. It's yet another barrier of entry -- and another reason why it's _so_ important to give women candidates extra support.
If we want to see more women in public office, we need to make sure they have the resources and backing they need.
[Our end-of-quarter deadline is just six days away. If you want to help elect more women (and you've had enough with Republican men), now is the time to donate >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/YslD0KCgwYbNuApINAgOzHkeT7ogQpcVKLk12dTdJl4=/YRgfl21vNsve4AP6_xaU0PMDrNjjZ_yYAqlVMwlv-w4=?refcode=X_032422_EOQ_A)
Thank you!

[](https://links.ciscomaniforcongress-mail.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=7a5cc8d31d7f4f1c8b7f8853c41c1ca0&_e=Lc8K9oeEUxYWzdlZrITHj-oamLSs5QByGB3G573w8-70J1xkiTkiLiCpf9-BvkT0McmUDeo0QQdlMoyFcE5U4TiXN2k44sloGAdErng2YG2GH7hIEWI7P5M-sJEOQeOi_Khz1BYAvlsA08fkAWCMpxwwIeKy_Bvlp_XSSWVKOwgc1BI1gcz1RdYBIInNeniy-_2LN3H5QTa7niiQ7NPMRHaHBRhQZ10RXTT3r1DEA-uBWWVB9XgfugBHw6dnzP6t92kzgQzKnt1hbwK6XHuyLZ3Jr00a3mT8cyAl9vZyFgxwQOjRJNFvcJi-_q8Kfpx2GoPtmsBb4vdN8s51U10Ck_zyBAFDDDUes83aulOUvc3bNPjzDKLa9wY_PFvgUeDXqQpe18so_JdfkuF7xOmGIZAOVs_phUhEVir8_kAnZhLtb_vbDXAB8CHcdMA1gmNc13hqcByzxuN6WU06eUdiDkPmdhoVrOzXQQgzp947FYVNHfhR7mxMsAFKAsLBZ_juWnXUrbcLmwwxgL7z9Wm6cQ%3D%3D)
---
But Pelosi isn’t going to let this seat go without a fight, and she’s desperate to make sure one of her liberal puppets wins.
---
I wouldn’t be surprised if she makes this one of the most expensive races in the country. That’s how vital this seat is.
---

clean_body: We can’t afford to elect another rubber stamp for Pelosi. | Peter, I cannot overstate how important our race is. If we lose, our next representative will be nothing more than a rubber stamp for Nancy Pelosi. I’m not exaggerating. The Democrat representative I’m running to replace literally voted with Pelosi 100% of the time. But if we win this race, it will deal a devastating blow to Pelosi's radical agenda... ...and it will mean we only need to flip 4 other seats to retake the majority. There’s a reason this seat is the TOP Republican target in the country. Redistricting turned it from a safe Democrat seat to one that narrowly favors conservatives. The latest data gives us a 3-point partisan voter index advantage. But Pelosi isn’t going to let this seat go without a fight, and she’s desperate to make sure one of her liberal puppets wins. I wouldn’t be surprised if she makes this one of the most expensive races in the country. That’s how vital this seat is. With the fate of Pelosi’s House majority resting on this race (and 4 others), we need every grassroots conservative to do their part to help us WIN. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Conor Lamb
subject: This is about workers, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43380261/336938843/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWYyYTBlMC02OWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7UqgiTbMrNnYMwD4ADZW1T0Qfp4xcBDvNAVhjwSrWTw=)

Friend,

Today, we remember the 146 workers who lost their lives on March 25, 1911, in one of the deadliest industrial disasters in our history – the **Triangle Shirtwaist Factory Fire.**

This largely preventable tragedy was the result of neglected safety standards and lack of workplace protections. The factory owners locked doors and exits in order to keep workers – predominantly young immigrant women – from leaving the factory early. These workers had _no_ protections, and worked grueling 12-hour shifts for a _weekly_ pay of just $15.

The cruel, inhumane treatment of these workers helped to spark a new push for worker safety and union rights. **111 years later, the spirit of the labor movement is still alive, as more workers around the country organize for equal pay, higher wages, better benefits, and safer working conditions.**

I've worked closely with unions across the labor movement since my first campaign, and I will _always_ work with organized labor to help the families they represent. That's why I'm running for the Senate, and why I'm asking for your support.

Look, labor unions continue to be the most effective advocates for working families across America, and the most effective counterbalance to the _unprecedented power_ that corporate interests have accumulated over the past several decades.

But we have _a lot_ of work ahead of us to ensure that all workers can exercise their right to organize and bargain without interference or intimidation. That starts with passing the **Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act,** which would **guarantee all workers the right to organize and prevent employers from taking retaliatory actions against workers advocating for better working conditions.**

**[I was proud to cosponsor and help pass this bill twice in the House with bipartisan support, and one of my _top_ priorities will be getting it passed in the Senate and signed into law. So if you can, I hope you will lend your support and help us win this Senate seat for workers and working families today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43380269/336938851/-993140480?refcode=em22_220325_eoq1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWYyYTBlMC02OWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7UqgiTbMrNnYMwD4ADZW1T0Qfp4xcBDvNAVhjwSrWTw=)**

Thanks for being part of this,

Conor Lamb

clean_body: | | Team, the state-level attack on abortion is rippling across the country. What started with Texas is making its way to extremist legislatures all across the U.S.: → Idaho, South Dakota, and Texas have all recently passed extremely restrictive bans. → Oklahoma, Tennessee, Florida, and Arizona are poised to pass their own soon. Though organizers and providers are doing everything possible to deliver critical reproductive care, the fact is without written legal protections for abortion, patients across the country will inevitably face increasingly restrictive abortion bans. That’s why we’re working with grassroots organizations in Michigan now on a historic campaign that will put reproductive care protections directly in front of voters, returning deciding power to the people most impacted by these bans and restrictions. Your contribution will be split between Cheri Beasley for North Carolina and the DSCC to flip NC and keep the Senate blue.
Friend --

In my life, I’ve had many responsibilities: Mother, public defender, and Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court.

**I’ve broken down barriers, and I’m not stopping now: I’m running to become the first African American woman to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.**

**[But right now, I need your help to make it happen. We’re 9.3% behind our fundraising goal for today, and the deadline is midnight. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and the DSCC to help defend our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/7149?amount=5&t=10&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220325-Beasley-BioSigned-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220325-Beasley-BioSigned-ETG-sl1&akid=3521%2E9716520%2E3TY4ih)**

Let’s face the facts:

1. Democrats have a 50-50 majority in the Senate, and now CNN says Republicans have the advantage in the midterms.
2. North Carolina is one of the CLOSEST tossup races in the country. What happens here could be the difference between a Democratic majority and Mitch McConnell regaining power.
3. If Mitch McConnell wins, he’s already threatened to sink President Biden’s agenda and put a hold on Supreme Court nominations. **We can’t let that happen.**

**Coming up short in North Carolina could mean losing the Democratic majority we worked so hard to achieve.** It’s time to band together, protect our progress, and expand our majority.

**[That’s why I'm asking for your help: Will you split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC to help Democrats expand our Senate majority? body:
You don’t need to be an expert to know things would be different if he was still Majority Leader.
#

Friends —
We really miss Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader. (LOL JK).
Mitch who? This guy:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220325-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2444_6688874_Nq502b&akid=2444%2E6688874%2ENq502b)
You don’t need to be an expert to know things would be different if he was still Majority Leader.
Mark helped pass the bipartisan infrastructure bill — a historic investment in our future.
He fought for the No Surprises Act, protecting families from huge, unexpected medical bills.
And he’s delivered more than $100 million for water infrastructure in Arizona, leading the fight to address drought and wildfire management.
Would any of that have happened with Mitch McConnell in charge?
No.
But if we lose in 2022, it’s all but certain McConnell will be Majority Leader again. That’s a fact.
We can’t let that happen. So please, we’re humbly asking:
[**Will you make your first donation of $3 or whatever you can afford to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign? Do it before our FEC fundraising deadline ends and we’re legally required to report our numbers.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220325-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2444_6688874_Nq502b&akid=2444%2E6688874%2ENq502b)
This is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country. So all of these donations add up. That’s the only way we win.
Team Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220325-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2444_6688874_Nq502b&akid=2444%2E6688874%2ENq502b)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2444%2E6688874%2ENq502b).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

| Thank God for the Fake News Seattle Times...
---
| | |
---|---
|

Earlier this week, a liberal activist pretending to be a reporter named Danny Westneat with the fake news Seattle Times wrote [a hit piece](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NCdzd3GuXscowTJSHD5t2dygKYgp_693VKqdvdVMw5jdbq6l2kQ6Rx1W8EX6O2eT9oR-BplQ3n5XZC53B0JtIMTCHSZbbI0x3aP_SXK3Bk5FvanMBos4Pg5REFycBvOLjegfDns-t3tWGcwS94vtCXpls5mYJJcMr0teWDoG6k1ji3gwn9pVN-MimJlREdKM6fQyz3Sm6wrgW_X4wdHNBKRU6DbOuqGRDnk5wY85jR1nZohcsueuAjHT4UPC4yec8IpFJhyqvybvFfG3ByT8rwYtNnKS9MIHl3yT8nHBRhq_Id4EUJB0vOMSdo4iyV7vo9WatqMKC9NmfFCaD-IWCRzeKR8ayNNwhJxrPhSWwl_Fp6xB0-RqfDWN_ssL1U_U&c=0YXnm5Si-aVJujXiIIiGU5wGXzBHeB9FSuSoJN43p8mqMKY7Ele6yw==&ch=Hy-NXvCO8Kl30F5LG61SZixDFh9iAoOAVBSytJ1N1sJi6BHHa0kgLA==) out of [a tweet](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NCdzd3GuXscowTJSHD5t2dygKYgp_693VKqdvdVMw5jdbq6l2kQ6Rx1W8EX6O2eT61SZ_kCRYciXCpb_03b3YGPK3MogX9CCFx3rR66yx8eP5PaZhDIisLYrDI84eF27nAsxybrxOxNPAzJo4JiT8UBYwrJb6qL7of8PJq2XHQ5p9mHfZC_KysCuB_BNQELN&c=0YXnm5Si-aVJujXiIIiGU5wGXzBHeB9FSuSoJN43p8mqMKY7Ele6yw==&ch=Hy-NXvCO8Kl30F5LG61SZixDFh9iAoOAVBSytJ1N1sJi6BHHa0kgLA==) I put out on March 13th regarding the violent attack on a 62-year-old female nurse by a career criminal called Alexander Jay. According to reporting by Jason Rantz, Jay has been convicted of criminal activity at least 22 times--yet he walked free each time and then randomly attacks a 62-year-old nurse and breaks three of her ribs and her clavicle after throwing her down three flights of stairs. What's worse, the entire event was caught on video. Westneat claims my tweet is calling for violence against people of color, judges, and prosecutors. Here's a quote from Westneat:

"Nobody denounced the comments. People in politics shrugged, barely raising an eyebrow. We've passed some tipping point where it's apparently now accepted that parts of the political right are just going to call for extreme violence, and nothing can be, or will be, done about it."

In my tweet, I used the metaphor "Get a rope." Getting a rope doesn't mean vigilante justice--which was clear to anyone with an IQ above room temperature. Getting a rope means accountability (due process and jail time) for the violent offenders, the prosecutors who enable them, and the judges who set them free. I'm not sure if any of you have noticed how violent and unsafe Washington State has become over the last several years? This violence has exploded and gotten significantly worse since the Democrat-led legislature voted to restrict the power law enforcement officers have to actually fight crime--something Jay Inslee, the Democrat Party, Seattle leaders, and apparently the Seattle Times is unwilling to support. Why is that? Why is it that Democrat-led states and cities like Seattle are unaffordable, unsafe, and unfree? Why is it that the activist clown-show who wrote this hit piece instinctively defended the criminal in his article, said nothing about the victim, and pivoted to attacking me for wanting accountability for criminals and those in the legal process who aid them?

Because they don't care about We the People. They care about perpetuating the problems we have in our nation so they have an excuse to create government programs to address crises they created in the first place. In turn, this allows Democrat-led legislatures to raise YOUR taxes to fund the programs required to "fix" the issues they created in the first place.

And if you love your city, your state, or your nation and disagree with their narrative at any point they label you a racist, an extremist, as stupid. "Shut up, extremist! Stop being so racist and stupid!" It's utterly ridiculous on its face and clown-show reporters like Westneat are completely unaware of how out of touch and disconnected they are from average citizens who simply want to be left alone and go about their daily lives in safety.

Don't misunderstand me; I don't want to seem ungrateful. There is a win here in all of this. I am deeply grateful to the fake news Seattle Times for writing about me so often in the last month--three times to be exact. To show my gratitude I would like to personally thank them for the free media and for revealing time and again to voters across America just how out of touch from reality they truly are. Without these articles, voters might be lulled into believing they are a legitimate news organization.

Folks, attacks like these from the left tell me one thing: We're over the target and they're mad about it. It tells me we are winning. It tells me We the People are being heard. A good friend of mine has a saying, "Keep moving forward; fortune favors the bold." With your help, we're going to continue our fight all the way to Washington DC and Stand Up for America!

We are at the end-of-quarter for fundraising and [I need you more now than ever to keep this fight up.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NCdzd3GuXscowTJSHD5t2dygKYgp_693VKqdvdVMw5jdbq6l2kQ6R0USCyM1aCF0I7P-GIRnbT_TurFMYuHpd0VaNJUaUxiJ05fQH4CRtkkeqULBD0ieuphcnrP53TsY-sae0zVkXpgbrIl315vIZxJMfUlNG_BJV72u518nbB6myGElpG12lY4FBD5kIWRwMLq3Y5Os1nIPLIjMBTa_GFjxz3OOjenuP6P0NMGztmIktSp8XbRmPlDCw8jOKxs5&c=0YXnm5Si-aVJujXiIIiGU5wGXzBHeB9FSuSoJN43p8mqMKY7Ele6yw==&ch=Hy-NXvCO8Kl30F5LG61SZixDFh9iAoOAVBSytJ1N1sJi6BHHa0kgLA==) We've invested $3.5 million into the We the People movement since 2019 standing up for individual freedom and liberty and we've made huge progress. While we don't need to raise the amount of money that Newhouse does to defend his dismal record in Congress, we do need to raise enough money to continue to inform voters and fight back against the left. But we can't stop now! We have to finish what we started. Use the link above or the links below to show your support.

In Liberty,

Loren

The Candidate for We the People. | | | == | | | | Upcoming Events | Watch Loren's weekly show, Loren Live! at 7:00 PM every Tuesday evening on Facebook, YouTube, and now streaming on Twitter! More platforms are coming soon! == | | Grant County Meet & Greet 6 PM - 8 PM Thursday, April 7, 2022 Smulligan's Pizza & BBQ 1111 N. Evelyn Street | Moses Lake, WA 98837 Come join us, support a local establishment in Moses Lake, WA, and meet Loren Culp in person! Loren will be available to answer questions, share his thoughts on the issues that matter to you and your family, and take pictures! Also, you can grab some Culp swag while you're there; including hats, shirts, signs, and more! ==. | | | | | | | | Thank God for the Fake News Seattle Times... | | | ---|--- | Earlier this week, a liberal activist pretending to be a reporter named Danny Westneat with the fake news Seattle Times wrote == out of == I put out on March 13th regarding the violent attack on a 62-year-old female nurse by a career criminal called Alexander Jay. According to reporting by Jason Rantz, Jay has been convicted of criminal activity at least 22 times--yet he walked free each time and then randomly attacks a 62-year-old nurse and breaks three of her ribs and her clavicle after throwing her down three flights of stairs. What's worse, the entire event was caught on video. Westneat claims my tweet is calling for violence against people of color, judges, and prosecutors. Here's a quote from Westneat: "Nobody denounced the comments. People in politics shrugged, barely raising an eyebrow. We've passed some tipping point where it's apparently now accepted that parts of the political right are just going to call for extreme violence, and nothing can be, or will be, done about it." In my tweet, I used the metaphor "Get a rope." Getting a rope doesn't mean vigilante justice--which was clear to anyone with an IQ above room temperature. Getting a rope means accountability (due process and jail time) for the violent offenders, the prosecutors who enable them, and the judges who set them free. I'm not sure if any of you have noticed how violent and unsafe Washington State has become over the last several years? This violence has exploded and gotten significantly worse since the Democrat-led legislature voted to restrict the power law enforcement officers have to actually fight crime--something Jay Inslee, the Democrat Party, Seattle leaders, and apparently the Seattle Times is unwilling to support. Why is that? Why is it that Democrat-led states and cities like Seattle are unaffordable, unsafe, and unfree? Why is it that the activist clown-show who wrote this hit piece instinctively defended the criminal in his article, said nothing about the victim, and pivoted to attacking me for wanting accountability for criminals and those in the legal process who aid them? Because they don't care about We the People. They care about perpetuating the problems we have in our nation so they have an excuse to create government programs to address crises they created in the first place. In turn, this allows Democrat-led legislatures to raise YOUR taxes to fund the programs required to "fix" the issues they created in the first place. And if you love your city, your state, or your nation and disagree with their narrative at any point they label you a racist, an extremist, as stupid. "Shut up, extremist! Stop being so racist and stupid!" It's utterly ridiculous on its face and clown-show reporters like Westneat are completely unaware of how out of touch and disconnected they are from average citizens who simply want to be left alone and go about their daily lives in safety. Don't misunderstand me; I don't want to seem ungrateful. There is a win here in all of this. I am deeply grateful to the fake news Seattle Times for writing about me so often in the last month--three times to be exact. To show my gratitude I would like to personally thank them for the free media and for revealing time and again to voters across America just how out of touch from reality they truly are. Without these articles, voters might be lulled into believing they are a legitimate news organization. Folks, attacks like these from the left tell me one thing: We're over the target and they're mad about it. It tells me we are winning. It tells me We the People are being heard. A good friend of mine has a saying, "Keep moving forward; fortune favors the bold." With your help, we're going to continue our fight all the way to Washington DC and Stand Up for America! We are at the end-of-quarter for fundraising and == We've invested $3.5 million into the We the People movement since 2019 standing up for individual freedom and liberty and we've made huge progress. While we don't need to raise the amount of money that Newhouse does to defend his dismal record in Congress, we do need to raise enough money to continue to inform voters and fight back against the left. But we can't stop now! We have to finish what we started. Use the link above or the links below to show your support. In Liberty, Loren | | | | CONTRIBUTING TO OUR CAMPAIGN IS EASY AND SECURE: | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS | | Culp for Congress | PO Box 726, Moses Lake, WA 98837 | | Sent by mailto:info@culpforcongress.com powered by

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: RELEASE: Protect Freedom PAC Releases Six-Figure Ad For Nathan Dahm for U.S. Senate
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 25, 2022
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@ascent-strategic.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| RELEASE: Protect Freedom PAC Releases Six-Figure Ad For Nathan Dahm for U.S. Senate
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oURr8IrEnMQAy39y-0XJMPtlhCRHd_bIc5y429TkS8eoA3-0H1x2a7vRIfPEnc38foDEkUNKUvWa3j0jLPBb8965KZHh2dtuh4bZtLd_w-Lx2KxPTNPIx9pNf5wEgxNh3oPzJevIdwI=&c=hShTiiQyxql6H7yQHz4dlyRbGnhPI1XV3BGNuw1777v3bv626NW5bg==&ch=NyIgOGsLaXqYSSvr_ulseGtM3BdT1Kj60dJd_AjmSuVQKgh0nQtDBw==)
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, a Rand Paul affiliated Super PAC dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, announced that they will be running an advertisement featuring Senator Rand Paul's enthusiastic endorsement of Nathan Dahm for U.S. Senate.
The ad, titled "Backup," will be a six-figure media buy and the ad will begin today.
Protect Freedom PAC has had independent expenditure campaigns totaling $11.5 million since 2018.
Senator Rand Paul stated in the ad: "Our freedoms are under constant attack from Washington. I've led the fight against Biden and Fauci's COVID mandates, but I need backup. That's why I'm endorsing my fellow constitutional conservative, Nathan Dahm. A proven fighter, Nathan Dahm will join me in demanding that Fauci is fired and removed from office. Together we'll defeat the big government machine."
Full endorsement video is available here: https://bit.ly/3Lc0e24
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal offices in 2018 and 2020 and looks to expand its reach for the 2022 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###

|

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: AZ Legislature just outlawed abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43381439/336944014/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDFiMjhjOC02ZGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qE_hu0J7cIKiFkMokGhN8SVM1NOHlVtNFpxRLrBq-I4=&emci=aa3a0700-c2ab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=541b28c8-6dac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Disappointed? Heartbroken? Nope. **I'm mad as hell.**
**Yesterday, the Arizona House voted to become the second state this year to pass a 15-week abortion ban.** The bill makes _no exception for rape or incest._ Doctors who performed an abortion after 15 weeks would be guilty of a felony if this bill were to become law.
Let me be clear:** there is and never will be a '_reasonable_ ' abortion ban. **
Roe v Wade is expected to be stricken down this summer, and with far right extremists controlling state legislatures in states like Arizona, **the need to protect abortion rights at the federal level has never been greater.**

No one should have their most personal medical decisions controlled by politicians, neighbors, complete strangers, or anyone else. Abortion is healthcare, and healthcare is a human right.

[**Which is why I'm asking you today in earnest, to please join me in the fight to defend reproductive rights by chipping in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43381442/336944017/2089498197?refcode=X_032522_Anti-AbortionLaw&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDFiMjhjOC02ZGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qE_hu0J7cIKiFkMokGhN8SVM1NOHlVtNFpxRLrBq-I4=)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Upcoming Campaign Rally
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m very excited to invite you to our upcoming Campaign Rally in Fort Washington! On Saturday, April 23, Monique and I will be speaking with voters to talk about the kitchen-table issues and share our bold vision for the future of our state. This is a FREE event, and everyone's invited!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2]
If we haven’t had a chance to meet you yet on the campaign trail, then this upcoming rally will be an excellent time to do so! As the Local Candidate for Governor, I’ve had a wonderful time meeting Marylanders all around the state, from coffee shops and restaurants, to small local businesses and neighborhood main streets. No matter where I go, I hear a similar refrain: “We know you. We trust you. We’re with you.”
The people of Maryland know me, and I know them. That’s why recent polls have consistently shown that we’re leading the rest of the field by a strong margin. That’s why we’ve reported the most Cash on Hand of any campaign. And that’s why the overwhelming majority of our grassroots fundraising has come from supporters right here in Maryland.
I hope to see you at our Campaign Rally so we can talk in person about the future we can build together. Our bold vision includes combating climate change by making Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, tackling the student debt crisis, building world-class transit, and so much more.
Together, we’re going to win this competitive race and lift Maryland’s communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. Our Rally will be held at the Tucker Road Athletic Complex in Fort Washington, from 1:00 PM to 3:00 PM. Click here to RSVP. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a8b85c8d-19aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/263de93c-4cac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjNkZTkzYy00Y2FjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GmsBM3D54az51m8Z0YF-GFRDX31za7f1e2_4664jRVg=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

Mayor Kate Gallego has done a great job leading Phoenix since Greg stepped down to run for Congress. She has worked to invest in the city's infrastructure, create new, good-paying jobs across a variety of sectors, and achieve equal pay. **Kate is exactly the sort of committed, principled leader we need in Arizona.**

name: Team Morgan Harper for Ohio
subject: Our biggest debate yet is 3 days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Help us stay on track with our fundraising in the midst of debate prep.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220325-842-footer-ak&t=2&akid=842%2E90090%2Ezrzkdf)
**M****organ is taking the debate stage in just 3 days!**
**She will be debating Tim Ryan next Monday at 11:30am in the one and only Democratic debate, sponsored by the Ohio Debate Commission.** This is a HUGE deal for our campaign. [**Before we tell you more, can you rush a contribution right now to support Morgan as she gets ready for the debate?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30031?t=3&akid=842%2E90090%2Ezrzkdf)
Ohioans have a big decision in front of them, they should be able to make an informed decision, and Morgan is the only Democratic candidate who has been open, honest, and transparent – because she’s been willing to debate _anyone at any time_.
Voters deserve to see their candidates talk about the issues that matter to them — and that’s just what Morgan is preparing to do.
[**With just 3 days left until Morgan takes the stage, she is focusing on preparing to debate. But we can’t risk falling behind in our fundraising efforts. Can you help us stay on track by contributing anything you can right now?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30031?t=4&akid=842%2E90090%2Ezrzkdf)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30037?refcode=em20220325-842&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=842%2E90090%2Ezrzkdf)**
Thank you for everything you do! **Make sure to tune in on Monday and watch Morgan live!**
— Team Morgan Harper

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220325-842-footer&t=24&refcode2=842_90090_zrzkdf&akid=842%2E90090%2Ezrzkdf)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

She will be debating Tim Ryan next Monday at 11:30am in the one and only Democratic debate, sponsored by the Ohio Debate Commission. This is a HUGE deal for our campaign. Ohioans have a big decision in front of them, they should be able to make an informed decision, and Morgan is the only Democratic candidate who has been open, honest, and transparent – because she’s been willing to debate anyone at any time. Voters deserve to see their candidates talk about the issues that matter to them — and that’s just what Morgan is preparing to do. Thank you for everything you do! Make sure to tune in on Monday and watch Morgan live! — Team Morgan Harper | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

name: Alek
subject: 15:17 to Paris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alek for Oregon
body:
My life changed forever the day an islamic terrorist armed with 270 rounds of ammunition and a jar of gasoline tried to blow up a passenger train I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism, now I want to take on the radical-Left in Washington. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_t=1fTUFgU0tXoQwdtP49bWBM2wzh7_nLyL3WGs0lK7_fit5V4sT2awSjIBjMaXEsSIXb4h498qgdYRaEek6eliZx_MyYu4DYLRvFtemcLhB4FrU-7cj4w2CM4x89ptpuZd9BneNREhaEpxRZngbvnFPXhYWsa2Z7hTYUYxEM1MLKM%3D) | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_tfajfGZpN88k56_Em1H4anOMW4GWk80KJbjrH_qUC38dOhoObReRNYOOB9-EOQCSGc28JtqezWJDnYFwNk7bO_V9Kt8R_4GR7DA8ERttYbmnhFHnBQUzxMuFdBKkQcFwd32-s967umKOD3fJfzuaEwF2e42yLyu6yEg3Sa7C2Et2WcGJpMXyExreRMDl9gwOM5mDhn8-IVCo-fipZDchVs%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.

For this, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film _The 15:17 to Paris,_ directed by Clint Eastwood.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_sOs8KT3yXBO0GE-CpkxHlROnl3xwwECtlE7I6dLV0SaViVyhy2wz7CMkx2o4N81WLzFEEm7tWr-w_a1omwUj1InyAa5IXAty2bxQvW7nEKbxpeNEql4Jtz26Y9xxEunL2EqLyWjFamVxSE_eNV77n6XlVbVbI0M7eOoaVvJGDlQwOevvuxdzqkbxXV05MpTgHIR7ftkZ3vrQQ0mv3IoaCg%3D)Anthony Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California.
But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – **I did it out of duty.** And now, duty is calling me again.

[**My name is Alek Skarlatos, I am a former National Guardsman, an American Patriot, a proud Republican and I am running for Congress in Oregon’s 4th District.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_h5Dm7jNCMr0f1Kfy-3jMTWGMWYPINTesTX0jRz16X_FKp67sy42gvQvqM5HVWwPcVTJgO521Lp1e3OkQAuTD8kML5CasFLpaYf7NErNN5AUKTioeyhKb9-0dx5B-gIPly0fqEvmDF1gKZ_ENuNBk2iu4KX4MADS3z3uP0wA0bvRQnVzTzJKDZglrpQXMyvwkojLBoX7M4uavokhzwVOuZg%3D)

I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why **I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington.**

[**Will you lend your support to my fight by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or another amount today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_ndLybaN3-e3yQZJ-EPj-ndLm_ubugBzS9z7zmhmBgX1w9P3hG9kWn8qsx-40jEiVWCzsPwW2tsOPZyP_ou8UvWd8lBXPKPjlCbytPMPUOcI0E7zNkjZpR7vxhNy7ldh_2Iz-Uof23gHm0XAu5mx_8FKDsYRNYlAzk66kpBpdBwJyE3DCAvqoP-au9QvdS3anUPA8mTTg9YA2TsUu2u59T8%3D)

| [_SUPPORT ALEK_
**DONATE TODAY ›› **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_rSxcjjt1oL8dxkNKG-o0LR2MrJ-InS2xAUqV1uymqldpMLCo69o9h4neJ5MgVy8Y2_CC6OFWiKp_tAdfEecbaUFyov4Cvdi7U398vGPHe534Tj-IUzsGLFLNC2odSojrm46wlYnljuJ6rLRQj8T7KYuekLoofAG_vT3NS75xRA8tP8JzOtUL7Llxo6GK-WCmele5g3K6SAmIIw6tiWd400%3D)
---

**For the first time since 1986** , there is no incumbent running for election in this coastal district, giving Republicans a REAL opportunity to pick up this seat and put it in our column, flipping the House majority in the process.

I am committed to restoring conservative leadership to this district. Southern Oregon’s economy has wasted away due to the Leftist control of the longtime incumbent and his radical-Left allies.

**I am running for Congress to represent the loggers, veterans, moms, dads and families that hold the American dream dear.** The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_qArfc4YZ6dMOrWGBs2Lu358616GQ7ycF21xOC8sgzyqLGCMJRXYdVye2sE7WVmFn47OWh06zAhHAZK2pm65ur4bIcdHR-cptFNIMXsqILeLbS2Vlxr4AUg27n7p-htxlxvEKrRpOVyAg6mryC7QnzHDVhGD0C01ok3Z-3Lx9VM6E9QM1ygA8a0X0k41wZS2QIU05EnI6H8j0o9paeDhI1o%3D)

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_niRS5VKQTA1u9dhiEhzf3Lc03HdtYShfWtqoHk_iWzbOdM2VDxcYPReoRFkketBui6AVmm1SRxHIEgmYxv2B6UImmNVLNngR91PUuIbpLuzP5zUy-LWarmd3bxRN3KN-tVv_9r8QdahwpoKfbr10cixWLcXHJdZmG214Ybo5Q4W-T9pjmeQk4jr6VcW1uY7u0UDEQ1LLdR_KXpyHTNtcCc%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $10, $20 or even $50 today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_gaoe8A8G-dxxT1Dtc_wQAhXetdEp3s3wFH3jp7aNu_LyP29kfuqmWY_Hj-O5drKJzJM1S5h_1HoBkYPE_whx5B5cBI2okbZh6STs5PRVt9lH2sMV0DIecJ2N0mBfFqVAd9rlYcvh3hwC19ijO7UQaGUKeKYF2AHPEvIn3VNDREGqYTGsnoXxlDNdGvyQWdeCMBRREjHl7O7tl_eI80gJcI%3D)

[_SUPPORT ALEK_
**DONATE TODAY ›› **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_sBeUuzCLs35A8t8ZGtEzN9nQE6_QOWZISTelkVf40y386R48jRHYGR0etbM-K9SUWPO_BI-wnh9d6OMRxVnktOkuZXmaNQ3zyZnJuQuSN9CUXLNSbpYYq3NIv4g__8LcbpM0OUvvHHS3rdW1g8bF5QxeG43Nl7KPS7r37_ooW6KE2gRRTP9TYyh7dEz0FSusLJ1FjKoK47Ls2G_dlS4fTA%3D)

Thank you,

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. [**To support Alek’s campaign chip in $5 or more today!**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c69a4e0539b7452d9a28cc1afba32a8a&_e=yqKGgmjAFg5Bh3uE3_dsnjSjOIEkIz7_Vpr0TYEjGkXzL_MU55uRCALR70SddJydgu8887CRjZVBrY2JNcsFuIsrJ8dOm2SBnYTZ4u4HbXfHayBt3asfsoR0hel5JJlfsDTJgUhfsFmRvqlNaPF_ATIgaN5QIEVt7EWMrgX6oVesjNZi8WTOflMji9_UymflR_-uTL_RFdeV6u9xxyh7_m2X8tcKE54I0VWVVATelyLzPPUT53jsslMPFepjuTRn5BR2RCh50DDORFJ27Re_55bL8jIfzZ9vkWuqgIwVZMJprdbbBQerHO99VnEwRlJrkaasZzq036YkP9NNSHcL7PPFToF8zF1SxOQL2K94qhK3rbpzUxn4jIbQLlJQOWxaymIlNPntvGFmk_80OjoB923kHTkz9J7W9ViRbISgWKc%3D)

name: Caraveo for CO-08
subject: Can you help Dr. Caraveo take on corporate greed?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43371192/336900287/573003782?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220325eoq2_c4co8_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjJhZDM0My01MGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Owek61GZ_2YTBwF-2J57_3DdUTebnbeEKF3d0Mae6rY=)
---
Families are struggling right now, Peter. But let’s get one thing straight: **Corporate greed is driving up costs and leaving working people to bear the financial burden.** It’s so important that we elect candidates like Dr. Caraveo who aren’t taking corporate PAC money in their run for Congress. Corporate-backed politicians are more beholden to those donors than they are to the people they represent. Under President Trump, our allies respected us and our enemies feared us; our economy was booming, and our border was secure. The Biden-Harris Administration has been a disaster. We have record high gas prices, inflation is wiping out Americans’ hard-earned money, our borders are not secure, and violent crime is surging. **It’s simple. Our country would be a whole lot better if President Trump was still in the White House!** I'm proud to be endorsed by President Trump. As governor, I'll always fight for what’s right, not what’s politically correct or convenient. Our state needs real leadership to push back against the failing Biden agenda and protect our people at home! Will you stand with President Trump and support my campaign?

clean_body: It was great to be with President Trump last weekend. Every day I’m proud to have worked for a president who did every single thing he said he would.| | | Peter, It was great to be with President Trump last weekend. Every day I’m proud to have worked for a president who did every single thing he said he would. If only he was in the White House right now! Under President Trump, our allies respected us and our enemies feared us; our economy was booming, and our border was secure. The Biden-Harris Administration has been a disaster. We have record high gas prices, inflation is wiping out Americans’ hard-earned money, our borders are not secure, and violent crime is surging. It’s simple. Our country would be a whole lot better if President Trump was still in the White House! I'm proud to be endorsed by President Trump. As governor, I'll always fight for what’s right, not what’s politically correct or convenient. Our state needs real leadership to push back against the failing Biden agenda and protect our people at home! Will you stand with President Trump and support my campaign? God bless,Sarah Huckabee Sanders | | | | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | |

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: LOL JK
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
You don’t need to be an expert to know things would be different if he was still Majority Leader.
#

Friends —
We really miss Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader. (LOL JK).
Mitch who? This guy:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220325-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2441_6688874_Lhu2vM&akid=2441%2E6688874%2ELhu2vM)
You don’t need to be an expert to know things would be different if he was still Majority Leader.
Mark helped pass the bipartisan infrastructure bill — a historic investment in our future.
He fought for the No Surprises Act, protecting families from huge, unexpected medical bills.
And he’s delivered more than $100 million for water infrastructure in Arizona, leading the fight to address drought and wildfire management.
Would any of that have happened with Mitch McConnell in charge?
No.
But if we lose in 2022, it’s all but certain McConnell will be Majority Leader again. That’s a fact.
We can’t let that happen. So please, we’re humbly asking:
[**Will you make your first donation of $3 or whatever you can afford to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign? Do it before our FEC fundraising deadline ends and we’re legally required to report our numbers.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220325-1-15&t=2&refcode2=2441_6688874_Lhu2vM&akid=2441%2E6688874%2ELhu2vM)
This is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country. So all of these donations add up. That’s the only way we win.
Team Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220325-1-15&t=3&refcode2=2441_6688874_Lhu2vM&akid=2441%2E6688874%2ELhu2vM)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2441%2E6688874%2ELhu2vM).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: re: The 67 Counties Mobilization Plan + Wednesday’s deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Allow us to fill you in.
#
Derek,
It’s been two days since we launched our first-ever Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank and we are *still* trying to wrap my head around how amazing our supporters are. 🤯
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45924?refcode=em20220325-5126&t=1&akid=5126%2E434096%2E0jQdM6)
Not only did over 125 people attend, but altogether they made 16,800 calls to Pennsylvania voters.
**16,800!!!**
That is INCREDIBLE, Derek. The commitment, enthusiasm, + love these volunteers radiated Wednesday night is going to stick with me for a long time. Plus, they weren’t a bad-looking bunch. 😉
**[Can you please consider chipping in and making a donation of any amount today to help support our organizers + volunteers as they put in the work to reach voters in all 67 counties?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45924?refcode=em20220325-5126&t=2&akid=5126%2E434096%2E0jQdM6)**
**[FUND A PHONE BANK »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45924?refcode=em20220325-5126&t=3&akid=5126%2E434096%2E0jQdM6)**
**Grassroots power is how campaigns like ours win.** And after seeing that power in action on Wednesday night, we know this campaign + the power of our movement are stronger than ever.
Unfortunately, running huge organizing operations like this isn’t cheap. Everything from the big Zoom call needed for training to the dialing tool we use to make calls costs our campaign precious resources.
But we believe that running a campaign like this, one focused on reaching voters in all 67 Counties, is the right way to do it.
It just means we need your help to keep up with this important work on the ground.
**[So, what do you say, Derek? Can you chip in your first $5 donation to help us fund our organizing work so we can reach + mobilize more voters?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45924?refcode=em20220325-5126&t=4&akid=5126%2E434096%2E0jQdM6)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45924?amount=5&refcode=em20220325-5126&t=23&akid=5126%2E434096%2E0jQdM6)**
We’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Thank you, thank you, thank you. ❤️
With love + gratitude,
John + Gisele Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220325-5126-footer&t=24&refcode2=5126_434096_0jQdM6&akid=5126%2E434096%2E0jQdM6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=5126%2E434096%2E0jQdM6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5126%2E434096%2E0jQdM6)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Unfortunately, running huge organizing operations like this isn’t cheap. Everything from the big Zoom call needed for training to the dialing tool we use to make calls costs our campaign precious resources. But we believe that running a campaign like this, one focused on reaching voters in all 67 Counties, is the right way to do it. It just means we need your help to keep up with this important work on the ground. We’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Thank you, thank you, thank you. ❤️ With love + gratitude, John + Gisele Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Help us oust Henry Cuellar, a.k.a. the Kyrsten Sinema of the U.S. House. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q87EBr-MhSrsTZb4_9ePvEj4ieINiDxR0ybTLBBmD0ZXImQUgH3y67ErWTk9j_Gb30P3yAIXFHxQvG6rJPDYv0SdE2FW9Uer8Q7YEZ3wPXPTUEZL-xYbFXQxoIojPwuzkm8Iy9xYyMaE09YVDj9mwniGAw9LAg7Y1fdAU7RhpJ-NPj0upgOXTrY18FmB7uT9mslz3AqzPkPLdskVyJK2IlQDtAP50jXvBDbC42Ru5zreA140WgzseSu9LDh3SVXzqY/3kn/iQAbYe6xQJ66zGqT0iNrzw/h0/QqMNjVFxGQzF5UexpdLsBDISruGfgXEXw9onX1tvjac)
Two months, Peter. Two months from now, voters in Texas’ 28th district will decide a major run-off election between Rep. Henry Cuellar — a.k.a. **the Kyrsten Sinema of the U.S. House** — and his progressive challenger, Jessica Cisneros. Cuellar is one of the most conservative Democrats in Congress. He’s funded by special interests, rarely listens to his constituents, and most concerning of all, has helped Republicans to obstruct President Biden’s agenda, Just. Like. Kyrsten. Sinema. **Peter, we see this Texas run-off as a vital “trial run” for primarying Sinema.** We’re counting on our nationwide grassroots movement to support the Cisneros campaign and unseat this Sinema-like Democrat. **[Will you please split a donation right now between Jessica Cisneros and Primary Sinema Project? Help us build the momentum on the ground — from Texas to Arizona — to oust politicians like Henry Cuellar and Kyrsten Sinema who are interested in only serving the interests of corporations and Republican donors →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSLEC5wHlB5Ee6R6aygocka9yc3r7JfGlj6Bn-wLW8V7AlVyWa03jt-6SNvlUkEKLiHdiLPydTDqtLpyZg7_l_oyKtQRykEfG4wApq0gdLL71iITviwl9W3FbaAHC97SX7BZL9bm4_aiWA9xGffHeKSH7gMGNJ-gkK2YdyuKGqIf8QiJfLbXpAzpiYyJpj1ZWk1OFzAmHqnMaF_t0gWwUv5ij2CrftOdeBlKKeH2cx5oioqYK_JLt8auhKrmatull3gdXLu-gBM6QWCvZhv40ylCJzuWH5neTjIlNnQdXGGFpCNdN0gBLiNubs7NoV8KxpJjj_NeZKA9n-sTAycqZB5l3MKdOWNQAy6LQmD0IRAmw/3kn/iQAbYe6xQJ66zGqT0iNrzw/h1/7cLggREDfuGZy5X_Wo0nY4uyBZK3itbw2PnB2zoZsMA)** **[Contribute $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSLEC5wHlB5Ee6R6aygocka9yc3r7JfGlj6Bn-wLW8V7D76U_w0r88JsJLoWFI-T6Kq_M-NhM3dTh8_opfhVxj68ftLAM9Tby6DqBXyTu41afbdogAGA8mgO1BDJLVZi-uIRPumpaJlnFXMayVAlXTUzjB9hVaTzBx0ug16_F7GU8deP4Iia5wWn-EQtXZ-7BOXG65XtixQ6zbfzAo6vEVpbqYpKTMzi3t4kfDuWv3Qc3ZtB0mSPi38X5iz7ZxEJ9DuE_YV2Vb1XPMBpdqrIFO5xZxekRkEaAjdjSUNJHbDO5xVBnTI97PbQsGme8guyK7oUX6ml-NKn7kQh3FTDVnIBPfu6fT9gSazxAyqekIU8E/3kn/iQAbYe6xQJ66zGqT0iNrzw/h2/fnQRTByzfR5sA0RgltQ8yddZ8OmiS_ROo_tCE35xDCY)** You might be wondering why we’re paying attention to this race at all. Let us explain: We’re building a grassroots movement to primary Kyrsten Sinema because she betrayed the people who elected her. Again and again, she has obstructed key elements of President Biden’s agenda that are also top priorities for Arizona voters, from voting rights to lower drug prices. Well, just like Sinema, Cuellar has betrayed his constituents’ trust. He takes six-figure checks from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and even Republican billionaires — and in return, he fought hard to undermine President Biden’s Build Back Better plan. The bottom line is that we can’t ignore ANY opportunity to strengthen our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. It’s on us to replace politicians like Cuellar and Sinema with real Democrats who will help us pass voting protections, drug pricing reform, climate action, a living wage, and so much more. But primary challenges are notoriously difficult races to win. **Which is why we’re sounding the alarm that Election Day is fast approaching in TX-28.** **[Please give $5 today; your contribution will go towards supporting both Jessica Cisneros as she fights to replace Henry Cuellar and the Primary Sinema Project as we work to oust Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSLEC5wHlB5Ee6R6aygocka9yc3r7JfGlj6Bn-wLW8V7A4qojSEFyGitldLF-UsOinOa9aC5d-fbbtM06LUOnsirVtrDBdcauIc6fRIrRpQANyiXC2dMhmcZbvkqXDaZyIeCtGjrTGiOycjyvMirADHy9sZyc1ifI11QofRBKh2dg5Lu9Au3DJvug-lrUfStagrkbY443sCBwQZ7g1DHFSKbQGp7RWsX1knLqeGC9U-0DjEEgvi9a8pngrVeBrvEEQPfuGpBAUAY5sxV6mOlswga5yTOCuUiykLPEvYWI54s8gPB0pGhb9apHdAni_dMOEuLPcwYRHWoLXndWjKQsxoNMBoeLI8_-lRCgCzDc3-08/3kn/iQAbYe6xQJ66zGqT0iNrzw/h3/MRoxvwobfFHefwxfX4i2SfAy_4Cyc0lcPN4kvTHuPlw)** Thank you, Primary Sinema Project

clean_body: Help us oust Henry Cuellar, a.k.a. the Kyrsten Sinema of the U.S. House. | | | Two months, Peter. Two months from now, voters in Texas’ 28th district will decide a major run-off election between Rep. Henry Cuellar — a.k.a. the Kyrsten Sinema of the U.S. House — and his progressive challenger, Jessica Cisneros. Cuellar is one of the most conservative Democrats in Congress. He’s funded by special interests, rarely listens to his constituents, and most concerning of all, has helped Republicans to obstruct President Biden’s agenda, Just. Like. Kyrsten. Sinema. Peter, we see this Texas run-off as a vital “trial run” for primarying Sinema. We’re counting on our nationwide grassroots movement to support the Cisneros campaign and unseat this Sinema-like Democrat. You might be wondering why we’re paying attention to this race at all. Let us explain: We’re building a grassroots movement to primary Kyrsten Sinema because she betrayed the people who elected her. Again and again, she has obstructed key elements of President Biden’s agenda that are also top priorities for Arizona voters, from voting rights to lower drug prices. Well, just like Sinema, Cuellar has betrayed his constituents’ trust. He takes six-figure checks from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and even Republican billionaires — and in return, he fought hard to undermine President Biden’s Build Back Better plan. The bottom line is that we can’t ignore ANY opportunity to strengthen our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. It’s on us to replace politicians like Cuellar and Sinema with real Democrats who will help us pass voting protections, drug pricing reform, climate action, a living wage, and so much more. But primary challenges are notoriously difficult races to win. Which is why we’re sounding the alarm that Election Day is fast approaching in TX-28. Thank you, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. body:
In case you missed it, Erica has received 6 new endorsements!!
#
**Did you see these powerful endorsements that Erica just received?** Erica received not one but six new endorsements from **Congresswoman Katie Porter, The Collective PAC,** **Sunrise Movement, Way to Lead, Six PAC, and Progressive Democrats of America.******
[**_Can you help us build off the momentum of these endorsements as we rapidly approach the primary election and our end-of-quarter deadline?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46633?t=25&akid=1028%2E3698%2EeS-GKT)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46639?refcode=em20220325-1028&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=44&akid=1028%2E3698%2EeS-GKT)**
**Our momentum keeps building****!** ✨ We are so proud that so many Democratic allies, leaders, and organizations are throwing their full support behind Erica.
It’s absolutely clear that Erica is the strongest candidate to win this seat and fight for the working people in North Carolina’s 1st District and beyond, and our campaign for progress is getting noticed.
From meeting with voters, hosting events, and traveling across our district, we’re working hard to send Erica to Congress — but we can’t do it alone.
**We’re kicking this campaign into high gear in the final weeks before our primary. Every dollar we raise amps up the pressure to protect this seat against our out-of-touch far-right and corporate-backed opponents.**[**_Can you chip in today?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46633?t=45&akid=1028%2E3698%2EeS-GKT)
Onwards,
Erica Smith HQ
Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — _her home district_ – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. **[Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House seat and give power back to working people »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46639?refcode=em20220325-1028-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=46&akid=1028%2E3698%2EeS-GKT)** **[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/46639?refcode=em20220325-1028-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=47&akid=1028%2E3698%2EeS-GKT)**

name: Mark Ruffalo
subject: Hi Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter, it’s Mark
Ruffalo.

Today, I want to talk to you about Charles Booker.

Like so many of you, I am very excited and ready to help send Charles to
the US Senate to represent Kentucky. It’s time to send Rand Paul packing
and bring forth a new era of leadership in the Senate — and together, we
can bring that future forward.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220325?refcode=em20220325-1681&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1681_346206_eNc5P6&akid=1681%2E346206%2EeNc5P6 ]Will you join me today in supporting Charles Booker for the U.S. Senate
and chip in $5?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220325?refcode=em20220325-1681&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1681_346206_eNc5P6&akid=1681%2E346206%2EeNc5P6 ]DONATE NOW →

Charles is running because he knows exactly what it feels like to be
abandoned by our politicians.

He knows what it’s like to choose between paying rent and refilling a
prescription.

He knows what it’s like to be homeless and to watch his mother skip meals
so that he could have enough to eat.

Above all — Charles knows that he’s not the only one who’s gone through
these challenges.

That’s why he fights from the heart. He knows from personal experience how
badly things need to change, and how badly we need leaders at the national
level who unapologetically believe in this change.

We deserve bold, meaningful solutions that match the scale of challenges
we currently face. We deserve a country where everyone, not just the
wealthy and well-connected, has a chance to thrive.

Charles Booker knows this better than anyone. And
Peter, we need him in the
Senate.

In these critical times, it’s up to each one of us to take action in every
way we can. So I have to ask you one last time:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220325?refcode=em20220325-1681&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1681_346206_eNc5P6&akid=1681%2E346206%2EeNc5P6 ]Please make your best donation of $5 or another amount
to Charles Booker’s campaign. Every dollar donated goes towards fueling an
organizing strategy that will send Charles to the U.S. Senate and will
bring transformative change to Kentucky.

This is it. I know we can count on you,
Peter.

Thank you,

Mark Ruffalo
Actor/Activist

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220325-1681-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1681_346206_eNc5P6&akid=1681%2E346206%2EeNc5P6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1681%2E346206%2EeNc5P6

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Patrick Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: And the winner of the Marjorie Taylor Greene Award goes to...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

PA legislators are using the Russian invasion of Ukraine and rising gas prices as an excuse to try to destroy our environment. Can you think of anything more villainous? It's hard, right?

That's why the March Marjorie Taylor Greene Award goes to everyone who backs the PA Energy Independence Act! This proposed effort to screw the earth was set forth by Republican candidates for governor, State Sen. Doug Mastriano and State Sen. Scott Hutchinson. BUT if it passes into law, EVERYONE who supports this terrible legislation is responsible, and so they've all won this award.

Forget climate change, the future of our earth, and our well-being — they want oil and gas! They want to strip our planet of its resources at the expense of our health and safety.

The PA Energy Independence Act will open new state lands for energy production, exempt PA plants from the EPA’s wastewater and pollution rules, and establish an intrastate coal/natural gas use provision, so that any natural gas or coal from PA will be regulated by the Commonwealth, not the federal government.

They're working on all of this while blaming Pres. Biden and Gov. Wolf for high gas prices — which, if you've been at the pump today, you may have noticed have declined. Only the most rotten, cruel people would use a horrific tragedy overseas and Americans struggling at the gas pumps to find a way to destroy our land, air, and waterways.

And that is why these horrible lawmakers are the biggest winners of the worst award.

Please help us with a donation today, so that we can mobilize progressive Pennsylvanians to vote out people like this. We need better leaders who will actually work for us!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-gtm?refcode=032522 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-gtm?refcode=032522]

Thank you,

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/2790cd38-63ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/35ab3f0e-74ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1YWIzZjBlLTc0YWMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8s_qM-cacLD0eOwLEF1P12zgw0FXqcG6v9W-BvIEczg=&id=111098838 .

The PA Energy Independence Act will open new state lands for energy production, exempt PA plants from the EPA’s wastewater and pollution rules, and establish an intrastate coal/natural gas use provision, so that any natural gas or coal from PA will be regulated by the Commonwealth, not the federal government. They're working on all of this while blaming Pres. Biden and Gov. Wolf for high gas prices — which, if you've been at the pump today, you may have noticed have declined. Only the most rotten, cruel people would use a horrific tragedy overseas and Americans struggling at the gas pumps to find a way to destroy our land, air, and waterways. And that is why these horrible lawmakers are the biggest winners of the worst award. Please help us with a donation today, so that we can mobilize progressive Pennsylvanians to vote out people like this. We need better leaders who will actually work for us! [] Thank you, Patrick Clark Keystone Progress [] Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My friendship with Madeleine Albright
disclaimer_text: Paid for BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://elissaforcongress.com/ [https://elissaforcongress.com/]
Friend,
Earlier this week, the country lost a true trailblazer and pioneer when Madeleine Albright, our first female Secretary of State, passed away. There have been, and of course will be, many official remembrances of her, where she will be recognized for the leader that she was. But over the last 3+ years, I‘ve had the opportunity to call her a mentor and a friend, so I thought I'd take a second to recognize some of the lesser-known things about her. I was exceptionally lucky that she accepted my invitation to spend a few days together in Michigan a few years ago, and I can say with certainty that she was all the things you will hear about her on the news, but she meant quite a bit more than that to many people around the globe, including me.
Even though I was a CIA officer who did a rotation at the State Department, I hadn’t met her until a few weeks after I was first elected in 2018. She was one of the guest speakers addressing the huge incoming freshman class, both Democrats and Republicans. I had served with her wonderful Chief of Staff, Jacob, at the Pentagon, so I ended up taking her around the room, introducing her to all the new Members of Congress. What I saw immediately was how everyone, no matter what side of the aisle they were from, wanted to meet her and get a photo with their families. In a very polarized time, she seemed to supersede politics. What I also saw firsthand was just how decent and charming she was. As someone who has served Presidents and Cabinet secretaries, I have certainly seen my share of senior officials whose egos live somewhere up in the stratosphere. But for all her accomplishments, she was as warm and interested as anyone I had met.
After that, she invited me to speak at her home at one of her famous small group dinners. She invited me to events. She accepted my invitation to events in DC. We saw each other at national security conferences. I must tell you that, for someone who spent her career in national security, there just aren't that many senior women you have to look up to, who have navigated the complicated waters of working and leading in male dominated fields. And here was someone who had a million stories, a million lessons to share -- both hard lessons but also positive ones. She had figured out how to use her unique position as one of the first women in American national security to her advantage. To find new ways of leading the conversation and new opportunities that others didn't see, or couldn't pull off. She had negotiated with dictators and war criminals and therefore had one of the most deft minds I have ever met.
When I heard that she had been invited to speak at Michigan State, I knew I had to ask her to stay and spend some time in Michigan. I remember just how elated I was when she accepted. So, in February of 2020, on the very eve of COVID hitting us, she made the trip to Michigan.
I remember introducing her at MSU, in front of a packed auditorium. I said she was “total badass hero of mine,” and she was. She had a wicked sense of humor, bordering on saucy. There were times when her sharp barbs or even explicit commentary would make me blush. The college students just ate it up.
After that, we helped her into my car and we drove across the state. It wasn't quite Thema and Louise, but it was two ladies barrelling down a Michigan highway, volleying back and forth for hours, with jelly donuts in tow because it was 'paczki day.’
She went on to speak in front of students from the local high schools in Rochester and then to a packed audience at Oakland University. The audiences just loved her. She meant something to people, especially the young women. After that, this 80+ year old lady went on to do two more large events, the last one in Ann Arbor, where so many people wanted to attend that some sat cross-legged at her knees to hear her. Everywhere she went, she inspired people.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87595/images/IMG_4239.jpg]
Her story is one of those only-in-America feats -- a refugee who came to the United States, succeeded, and became the Secretary of State, using her position to help persecuted people around the world. And for us in Michigan, with so many Michiganders who left the Balkans to come to the United States, she truly was a hero. It is now etched firmly in the history books that Secretary Albright was the driving force behind engaging the United States in stopping the genocide in the Balkans. She used her moral authority to get American might into that fight, and then later negotiated the peace that, ever-tenuous, still holds. Her visit to Michigan was filled with people whose fates were quite literally changed by her having a seat at the table as Secretary of State.
So this is how I remember her. As a down-to-earth, warm, saucy leader, who meant something to perfect strangers and world leaders alike. I am so grateful that I had a few years to get to know her and introduce her to the next generation in my state. And I grieve the passing of someone who had so much to teach us, and teach me.
Thank you for reading,
Elissa

[https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/-/spacer.gif]

Elissa Slotkin for Congress
PO Box 244
Holly, MI 48442

Many Republicans seem to have forgotten for what we stand.
---
### Economic Prosperity
The Mississippi Republican Party supports policies that encourage economic development and job creation as a way to give more people the opportunity for financial success, a better quality of life and a more secure future. We believe that free enterprise will thrive, flourish and benefit more people through a framework of low taxes and sensible but not overburdening regulations, which both encourages the expansion of existing businesses while also attracts new companies to locate in Mississippi. Mississippi Republicans recognize the direct link between tax and regulatory policies, our legal climate, education systems, workforce training, transportation network, energy availability and affordability, and economic prosperity. Because of the interrelation of these important issues, we believe that local, state and federal government should always consider these factors when it comes to implementing policies to encourage economic growth.
