name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: Super exciting news about our recent advocacy!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
I'm so proud of what we've accomplished.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4297?t=2&akid=12957%2E53494%2E_-7H5y) Friend, This is a long email, but it's a good one: I have super exciting news about our recent advocacy efforts! **(TL;DR: From all of us on Team Evergreen, thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your advocacy—it's making a real difference.)**
* * *
**6,617 official public comments opposing the Willow project** Recently, we asked our community to step up and to submit an official public comment opposing the Willow project—a Trump-era plan that would lock us into 30 years of new oil and gas drilling in Alaska. **We officially submitted your comments to the Bureau of Land Management—and I'm so proud to announce that we sent 6,617 official public comments from Evergreen Action activists like you!** This was a rare opportunity to directly influence decision-makers in the fight for our clean energy future. Together, we ensured that our collective voice will be heard loud and clear in this critical decision.
* * *
**1,090 letters to the editor submitted about _West Virginia v. EPA_** We also recently asked supporters like you to use our tool to submit a letter to the editor to your local or regional newspaper. Editorials are still the most widely read section of the paper, and we desperately need to spread the word about the upcoming Supreme Court case that could undermine federal climate power. **Our jaws dropped when we saw that our grassroots community submitted 1,090 individual letters to 233 different news organizations across the country!** I'm excited to say that these letters have begun to be accepted and published, including one in the _Seattle Times_ , which reaches more than half a million people daily! (Maybe you'll even see one in your local paper...) Your voice is your most powerful tool in the climate movement. Thank you to the hundreds of you who used yours to elevate this issue and unite the vast majority of Americans who support the EPA and the _Clean Air Act_.
* * *
When we send out these calls to action, all we can do is hope that people will take a few minutes of their day to help out—and Evergreen advocates like you have never let us down. **That's why this grassroots community is special.** We're taking thousands of real, substantive climate actions every single week. Know that when you take action with us, there are thousands of other climate activists right there alongside you, raising their voices for a just, livable clean energy future. Proud to be in this with you, Lena Moffitt
Chief of Staff, Evergreen Action | **_Want to support our next round of direct actions?_ [_Make a grassroots contribution today to make sure we have the resources to keep organizing effective actions._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4297?t=3&akid=12957%2E53494%2E_-7H5y)**
---
| [DONATE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4297?t=4&akid=12957%2E53494%2E_-7H5y)
---
**_Want to support the next round after that?_** We're going to fight for our clean energy future in every way, at every level, until we have the just, inclusive, and livable world we deserve. If you want to help us strategically plan for the long-term, [_**become a recurring donor and start a monthly contribution today.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4297?t=5&akid=12957%2E53494%2E_-7H5y)
| [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4297?t=6&akid=12957%2E53494%2E_-7H5y)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=12957%2E53494%2E_-7H5y). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2022 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/287?t=1&akid=12957%2E53494%2E_-7H5y)

# **Friend — I’m at the southern border today and I’m seeing the chaos Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock have unleashed firsthand. **

---
Watch this 8-second video to see the invasion of America that Biden and Warnock’s policies have allowed.

I will not be a “yes” vote on anything in the U.S. Senate until we get to “yes” on securing the border — because if we don’t have a border, we don’t have a country. [**If you agree, then I’m asking you to join me in this fight. Donate whatever you can right now, before our End of Quarter fundraising deadline.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/80cb3569ce7f901e/85896004b5f67887c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Peter,
**A quality education—from early childhood to high school and beyond—is the key to preparing students for the jobs of today and tomorrow.**
That’s why Roy has long been an advocate for making tuition at North Carolina’s 58 community colleges _free_ for in-state students.
With the help of federal pandemic relief funds to support education, Roy launched the Longleaf Commitment, which will provide some recent high school graduates with grants to support education at NC community colleges.
**But North Carolina students in future years will also need help making higher education more affordable and accessible.** If our state is going to continue to compete on the global stage, our people need to have the option of seeking higher education.
Roy wants to hear from you directly: **[Do you support making in-state community college FREE for all North Carolina graduates?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43383801/336954964/1941059472?refcode=ea.18ef4227-76ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.18ef4227-76ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGVmNDIyNy03NmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04-s_JCXrlHaqKOqjWchi8HuqTJ0EaczTfKR2n0Ihuc=&emci=edd74416-edaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=18ef4227-76ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)**

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf&Schofield From the Trail 03/25/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=1)
---
Friend, This was an exciting week for our campaign as we announced our "New Start for Illinois" policy agenda. Our New Start for Illinois has six pillars:
* “No Tax On Tax” Constitutional Amendment that would prohibit governments from charging sales tax (or any percentage-based tax) on taxes and fees.
* A constitutional amendment clarifying that parents, not the government, determine their children’s education and healthcare.
* Make “Curriculum Transparency” a requirement for any receipt of state P-12 education funding.
* Law enforcement (including corrections officers) and first responders are a protected class under Illinois Hate Crimes Law.
* Emergency administrative regulations and any administrative regulations that increase or create fees and penalties require an affirmative 7-member approval vote from JCAR in order to become effective.
* Assessors may only increase property value assessments upon legal transfer of the property or a change in the property’s zoning.

You can listen to my interview with Greg Bishop on WMAY discussing our New Start for Illinois agenda by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZVkzukGgcjilMaPzGjmyUA&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=2).
You can listen to my interview with Tom Miller on WJPF by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=v4cHwepctZ_HmTnYxcHT9sr5FncMCOHOlMrAdxIH_rkqJeAf5Wu0ubLsUixFtxbeOq4AdCq0YU_Rbip3oUXWWwSLR8RdAF5RGZUnWD4b-pEhIwq9tY9paF9yiqfXWmktyR_NlDgsynQCvNMejHxyBa2Rps7gBcTAlA_43GncIkcJC5VcGTCqXN8H4vTPFbs3mQ6o5SH3bwvOWoqk3qtnZg&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=3).
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Our volunteer to highlight this week is Jennifer Martin. Jennifer has not only circulated petitions and distributed yard signs for us, she is also very active with the Kendall County Republicans. Motivated individuals like Jennifer are why JB Pritzker is going down to defeat in November!
****[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=4)
* * *
**Upcoming Events** You have two upcoming opportunities to support us in Southern Illinois. On April 22nd, we will be having our Spring Reception in Belleville. You can find out more and purchase tickets by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/belleville_spring_fling_reception?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=5).
On May 7th, we will be having a BBQ in Nashville. You can get more info and purchase tickets by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/nashville_bbq?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=6).
* * *
**Get Involved** We are proud to have the endorsement of Randolph County Sheriff Shannon Wolff! You can click on the picture to watch the video of this endorsement.
[](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA8zRGf3j8aHubR2oq28tQJlBnQas-E2uWjSSaZnut6Do&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=7) Our campaign runs on the efforts of volunteers and community leaders--not political operatives. If you'd like to record a video testimonial of why you are supporting us, please send an email to endorsement@schimpf4illinois.org and we will do our best to have a video taken with you! As always, thanks for your continued support! Semper Fidelis, Paul
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=8).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=9) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25mar2022_eblast&n=11), software for leaders.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Mitch McConnell has a plan for what he’ll do in 2023 if he takes back the Senate: Nothing. Nothing to help families, nothing to grow our economy, nothing to meet the needs of the American people — because if he can make sure nothing gets done, it would make President Biden look bad. McConnell’s plan is all politics, all obstruction, all the time. Sound familiar? Yep, because it’s the same play he ran against President Obama, including refusing to consider his Supreme Court nominee in 2016. We can’t let it happen again, but we’re going to have to fight, because our Democratic majority hangs by a thread. **Next week marks our first FEC deadline of 2022.** After that, we’ll have to publicly report how much money we’ve raised as a grassroots team — our first chance to size things up and see how ready we are for this election year. >
Now, I get it: Even with Democratic control, everything hasn’t exactly been sunshine and rainbows. Even though we’ve taken big strides with the American Rescue Plan, and the Infrastructure Act, it’s bone-deep frustrating that we haven’t been able to protect voting rights or get climate action and child care over the finish line already.
But the answer isn’t to give up.
There’s one way to make it easier to get more done: expand our Democratic majorities.
And there’s one way to guarantee that NOTHING else gets done: hang back and watch Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy grab the reins.
A Democratic Congress — with stronger majorities, and more members who understand what working families need — means we have a chance to keep up the fight. A chance to level the playing field for families. A chance to protect our democracy.
**So here’s my plan:** I’m going to spend the rest of 2022 fighting to get as much done as possible with the Congress we have now, and working to elect more Warren Democrats up and down the ballot so we can expand our majorities and get more on the table.
But our success is going to come down to grassroots organizing and grassroots fundraising.
[_**So before next week’s FEC grassroots fundraising deadline, I have to ask: If it makes sense for you right now, can you make a donation to help support our campaign and grow our movement?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43383667/336954602/-65007495?refcode=EMZ3X_EOQ_E_20220325_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY0NTFlNi03NWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlJGAWsLIYY_JuIZNIdNP0jFKOQQ_7IXGbusRGIZfEY=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: I’m going to spend the rest of 2022 fighting to get as much done as possible with the Congress we have now, and working to elect more Warren Democrats up and down the ballot so we can expand our majorities and get more on the table. But our success is going to come down to grassroots organizing and grassroots fundraising. | | | Mitch McConnell has a plan for what he’ll do in 2023 if he takes back the Senate: Nothing. Nothing to help families, nothing to grow our economy, nothing to meet the needs of the American people — because if he can make sure nothing gets done, it would make President Biden look bad. McConnell’s plan is all politics, all obstruction, all the time. Sound familiar? Yep, because it’s the same play he ran against President Obama, including refusing to consider his Supreme Court nominee in 2016. We can’t let it happen again, but we’re going to have to fight, because our Democratic majority hangs by a thread. Next week marks our first FEC deadline of 2022. After that, we’ll have to publicly report how much money we’ve raised as a grassroots team — our first chance to size things up and see how ready we are for this election year. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | Now, I get it: Even with Democratic control, everything hasn’t exactly been sunshine and rainbows. Even though we’ve taken big strides with the American Rescue Plan, and the Infrastructure Act, it’s bone-deep frustrating that we haven’t been able to protect voting rights or get climate action and child care over the finish line already. But the answer isn’t to give up. There’s one way to make it easier to get more done: expand our Democratic majorities. And there’s one way to guarantee that NOTHING else gets done: hang back and watch Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy grab the reins. A Democratic Congress — with stronger majorities, and more members who understand what working families need — means we have a chance to keep up the fight. A chance to level the playing field for families. A chance to protect our democracy. So here’s my plan: I’m going to spend the rest of 2022 fighting to get as much done as possible with the Congress we have now, and working to elect more Warren Democrats up and down the ballot so we can expand our majorities and get more on the table. But our success is going to come down to grassroots organizing and grassroots fundraising. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Hi, team! Did you know you can sign up to vote by mail in the 2022 elections? **Voting by mail is convenient, safe, and reliable** — and you can always vote in person if you change your mind. The deadline to request your mail-in ballot before the primary is May 10. [**Bucks Votes is working to make sure Bucks County residents who want to vote by mail get their applications in on time and can make their voices heard. Sign up to request your mail ballot today for the May 17 primary →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43373930/336912888/1639461161?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzAwNDIwOC01NmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ILHl2pXlQL3dFxz-tEDNq0AtGtdbGeAEN5v9cYftru8=&emci=47a70026-acab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9c004208-56ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643323) | [SIGN UP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43373931/336912922/1639461161?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzAwNDIwOC01NmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ILHl2pXlQL3dFxz-tEDNq0AtGtdbGeAEN5v9cYftru8=&emci=47a70026-acab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9c004208-56ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643323)
---
**Don’t live in Bucks County?** [You can sign up to request a mail-in ballot here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43373940/336912927/-1119215658?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzAwNDIwOC01NmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ILHl2pXlQL3dFxz-tEDNq0AtGtdbGeAEN5v9cYftru8=&emci=47a70026-acab-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9c004208-56ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643323)
Remember to check the "annual mail ballot" box when applying to automatically receive a ballot for both the primary and the general elections.
**If you’ve already signed up for your mail ballot, share this email with friends and family to make sure they do too!**
The more folks we turn out to vote, the better chances we have to flip PA-01 from red to blue and save our democracy.
Thanks,
Ashley

subject: Just checked ActBlue…

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team, my name is Abbey, and I’m on the DASS finance team.
Part of my job is monitoring our ActBlue, which is why I was worried when I logged in this morning to check the progress towards our $75,000 Q1 grassroots goal: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
We’ve got to turn things around soon, or we’ll end up falling short. Will you rush $20 right now to help us hit this goal and elect Democratic Secretaries of State across the country? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
Let me explain the stakes: unless we get things back on track, we’ll be at the mercy of the far-right’s vast fundraising machine ahead of this year’s critical midterm elections.
They’re prepared to spend whatever it takes to defeat our Democratic Secretaries of State and elect ‘big lie’ supporters to election positions nationwide. Already, our opponents at the RSLC announced a record-breaking fundraising haul of $33 MILLION! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
But the good thing is we have plenty of time to turn things around.
I crunched the numbers, and if 17 Democrats from Ohio step up and rush $20 or more before midnight, we’ll be back on track to hit this goal by the deadline next Thursday.
What do you say? Will you pitch in $20 right now to help us elect Democratic Secretaries of State dedicated to protecting our democracy from the ‘big lie’ and the far-right? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
RUSH $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
RUSH $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
RUSH $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=100&refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D]
ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?refcode=EM_FR_032522_B2_AC_30D&amount=5]
Thank you,
Abbey
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

clean_body: You know how excited we are about electing Lisa Scheller to Congress... but we’re not the only ones who know that Lisa is the right choice to represent Peter, You know how excited we are about electing Lisa Scheller to Congress... but we’re not the only ones who know that Lisa is the right choice to represent PA-07 in Congress. Recently, several of America’s TOP conservative leaders have weighed in to endorse Lisa and share their overwhelming support for our campaign. Let’s recap some of the MAJOR endorsements our team has received in the past few weeks alone: Kevin McCarthy, U.S. House Minority Leader Mike Pompeo, former U.S. Secretary of State and former CIA Director The Congressional Leadership Fund Steve Scalise, U.S. House Republican Whip Lisa was also named to the National Republican Congressional Committee’s Young Guns program – identifying her as one of the TOP TIER U.S. House candidates in the entire country! These are just a few of the dozens and dozens of endorsements our campaign has already received. America’s biggest names are taking notice and going all in to support Lisa. What about you, Peter? These kinds of people and prestigious organizations don’t give out endorsements easily. They’re only supporting the best and brightest candidates who truly have what it takes to win their races. It’s clear from this new wave of endorsements that our campaign has more momentum than ever before. Here in Pennsylvania and all across America, people are jumping at the chance to join Team Scheller because they know that Lisa is a proven conservative leader who will actually get things done for the American people. They also know that our district is CRITICAL to the GOP’s chance to restore a Republican House Majority in these midterm elections. Thanks, Team Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

Here’s what we’ve learned: Ginni Thomas, wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas, sent 29 — _twenty-nine_ — text messages to Trump Chief of Staff Mark Meadows in November of 2020, urging him to take extraordinary measures to overturn the presidential election results.
But it doesn’t stop there: Clarence Thomas was the sole dissenter in a Supreme Court decision that rejected Trump’s attempt to block the release of presidential records to the House committee investigating the Jan. 6 attacks, records that _included_ correspondence between his wife and Mark Meadows.
It’s not hard to connect the dots here: Justice Thomas wanted to prevent the release of records because they showed that his wife was directly involved with the White House Chief of Staff in their failed attempts to disenfranchise 80+ million voters.
Washington is drowning in corruption: Corporations buying politicians’ votes, the suppression of rights for political gain, and now a Supreme Court Justice putting anti-democratic, anti-American interests before his sworn oath of office.

We need people in Congress who will stand up for US, and fight back against the corruption we see on every level. **Melanie is unbought by corporate PACs, and you can count on her to defend our democracy from the likes of insurrectionist Ginni Thomas.**

clean_body: | | | | We're surrounded by corruption on all sides, Peter Willis. Yesterday, news broke that Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas breached his oath of office in an attempt to cover up his spouse’s significant involvement in the Jan. 6 insurrection. He MUST be impeached and removed from the Court. Melanie is running to root out the corruption in Washington, and you can count on her to push for Thomas’s impeachment and removal — If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Here’s what we’ve learned: Ginni Thomas, wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas, sent 29 — twenty-nine — text messages to Trump Chief of Staff Mark Meadows in November of 2020, urging him to take extraordinary measures to overturn the presidential election results. But it doesn’t stop there: Clarence Thomas was the sole dissenter in a Supreme Court decision that rejected Trump’s attempt to block the release of presidential records to the House committee investigating the Jan. 6 attacks, records that included correspondence between his wife and Mark Meadows. It’s not hard to connect the dots here: Justice Thomas wanted to prevent the release of records because they showed that his wife was directly involved with the White House Chief of Staff in their failed attempts to disenfranchise 80+ million voters. Washington is drowning in corruption: Corporations buying politicians’ votes, the suppression of rights for political gain, and now a Supreme Court Justice putting anti-democratic, anti-American interests before his sworn oath of office. We need people in Congress who will stand up for US, and fight back against the corruption we see on every level. Melanie is unbought by corporate PACs, and you can count on her to defend our democracy from the likes of insurrectionist Ginni Thomas. Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. clean_body: If you average all the recent polls in the Georgia Senate race, Team Herschel is up by one point. We need your help to stay ahead and expand our lead. | Fellow American - Have you seen the polls in our Senate race lately? It's VERY tight. RealClearPolitics.com averages every public poll that is done for a particular race and puts out what is known as the "RCP Average" - a term every campaign staffer and reporter knows well because it indicates trends in a race. Please see below for the RCP average in OUR race: As you can see, we're up over our opponent on average by ONE POINT. We're asking for just $1 today to help us expand our +1-point polling average lead in the Georgia Senate race. Thanks, Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Val Demings
subject: For 27 years, I put on my uniform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I can’t fight these attacks alone. I need grassroots supporters like you to help me
Friend, did you see my email about the GOP’s latest attacks on my law enforcement career?
---
For 27 years, I put on my uniform and set out to protect the community I loved. The work was never easy, but I pushed through every midnight shift and dangerous situation because I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Orlando.
**But while I was working as Orlando’s chief of police with my officers to reduce violent crime by 40%, Marco Rubio was planning out his next move as a career politician.**
**Now he’s attacking my nearly three decades of service in an attempt to further his political career** – and he has the GOP’s dark money machine on his side. The Senate Republican campaign arm has already spent millions on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement.
**Friend, I can’t fight these attacks alone. I need grassroots supporters like you to help me set the record straight.[_Will you donate $5 so I can reach more voters with the truth and flip Florida blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43385208/336961494/-892300846?amp;amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2682-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2I0Y2MwYy03YmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjYnr189MIOstFdG4uD786hguE7sJNHhnhE1538onDs=)**
Thank you for your support,

Val Demings
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Chief Val Demings**
Subject: my 27 years of dedicated service

---
| | Friend: This is an especially important message about my 27 years of dedicated service as a police officer. As Marco Rubio launches desperate attacks on my law enforcement career, I hope you'll read this to the end.
---
I entered the police academy because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. After graduating at the top of my class, I woke up and put on my uniform every day, ready to risk my life because _ _ I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida.
**While I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. **I’ll put my record up against his any day – but the problem is, Rubio has the powerful influence of the GOP dark-money machine on his side.
As national Republicans spend millions of dollars on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement, I need your help today to set the record straight: [**Will you donate $5 or more to help me reach more voters and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43385209/336961496/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2682-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2I0Y2MwYy03YmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjYnr189MIOstFdG4uD786hguE7sJNHhnhE1538onDs=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43385210/336961498/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2682-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2I0Y2MwYy03YmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjYnr189MIOstFdG4uD786hguE7sJNHhnhE1538onDs=)
Back in 1983, **I was one of only three women in my police academy class**. But after years of hard work and dedication, I rose to the top of the department and became the first woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.
My story doesn't stop there. When I was appointed chief of police, Orlando was in crisis. The murder rate was at an all-time high, but I brought the department together and built relationships within the community. Standing with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department, we reduced violent crime by 40%.
To protect the city of Orlando, it took long, sleepless nights. And if I'm elected to the Senate, I'm ready to spend long nights protecting our right to vote, reproductive rights, access to health care and so much more.
I'll never stop fighting to protect and serve. If you're with me, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to flip Florida blue.

Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43385211/336961499/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2682-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2I0Y2MwYy03YmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjYnr189MIOstFdG4uD786hguE7sJNHhnhE1538onDs=)**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Val Demings

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Showing up for everyone, everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We’ve spent the last two weeks on the road, holding town halls throughout
Texas to talk with the people who will determine the future of this state.

I begin most of these meetings by briefly introducing myself and sharing
what this campaign is about — how we aim to get Texas on the right track,
focused on the big things we can do together. We talk about the kinds of
jobs we want in our communities, the quality of our kids’ schools and how
much sense it makes to expand Medicaid so that more people can see a
doctor.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54353?refcode=ema20220325-182025&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=182025%2E444211%2EQB-6p2 ]Talking to Rose in Lubbock

Talking to Rose in Lubbock

Then I turn the microphone over to the people who’ve come out, to hear
what they have to say. Depending on where we are and who steps up to talk,
we might have a conversation about the foster care system and Child
Protective Services, or rural hospital closures; we might talk about
mental healthcare or access to abortion; people will ask about my position
on guns, on energy, on the criminal justice system and very often they’ll
tell me theirs.

We’ve had these conversations in big cities like Dallas and Austin,
Houston and El Paso. I’ve been impressed at how many people have turned
out and how many good ideas and thoughtful questions we’ve heard at these
forums.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54353?refcode=ema20220325-182025&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=182025%2E444211%2EQB-6p2 ]Austin, Texas

Austin

But I’ve also shown up to listen in places like Weatherford, Olney and
Vernon. Childress, Dalhart and Amarillo. Lubbock and San Angelo. And it’s
really been amazing to see so many good people — Democrats and Republicans
— turn out to take part in their democracy in a part of Texas that
Democrats have traditionally written off and Republicans have usually
taken for granted.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54353?refcode=ema20220325-182025&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=182025%2E444211%2EQB-6p2 ]Dalhart, Texas

Dalhart

You can’t serve the people of Texas unless you show up for all the people
of Texas, listen to them, learn from them, find a way to work together on
the things that we can agree on. Find common ground even on the issues
where we might have some differences.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54353?refcode=ema20220325-182025&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=182025%2E444211%2EQB-6p2 ]Beto, Amy, and the kids

With Amy, Ulysses, and Henry

Amy and our kids joined me on the road last week as we traveled through
the Texoma region, the Panhandle and West Texas. Maybe not their ideal way
to spend their Spring Break, having to cram into the truck with their
folks and drive hundreds of miles from town to town, but I bet they won’t
forget going to the St. Patrick’s celebration in Shamrock, Texas last
Saturday. Or gathering with nearly 400 people on the Potter County
courthouse steps in Amarillo under a beautiful sky as the sun set on the
high plains. I love that they’re seeing this with me and understanding why
this work is so important, why we need to win, and just how we’re going to
do it: showing up for everyone, everywhere.

clean_body: We’ve spent the last two weeks on the road, holding town halls throughout Texas to talk with the people who will determine the future of this state. I begin most of these meetings by briefly introducing myself and sharing what this campaign is about — how we aim to get Texas on the right track, focused on the big things we can do together. We talk about the kinds of jobs we want in our communities, the quality of our kids’ schools and how much sense it makes to expand Medicaid so that more people can see a doctor. [ ]Talking to Rose in Lubbock Talking to Rose in Lubbock Then I turn the microphone over to the people who’ve come out, to hear what they have to say. Depending on where we are and who steps up to talk, we might have a conversation about the foster care system and Child Protective Services, or rural hospital closures; we might talk about mental healthcare or access to abortion; people will ask about my position on guns, on energy, on the criminal justice system and very often they’ll tell me theirs. We’ve had these conversations in big cities like Dallas and Austin, Houston and El Paso. I’ve been impressed at how many people have turned out and how many good ideas and thoughtful questions we’ve heard at these forums. [ ]Austin, Texas Austin But I’ve also shown up to listen in places like Weatherford, Olney and Vernon. Childress, Dalhart and Amarillo. Lubbock and San Angelo. And it’s really been amazing to see so many good people — Democrats and Republicans — turn out to take part in their democracy in a part of Texas that Democrats have traditionally written off and Republicans have usually taken for granted. [ ]Dalhart, Texas Dalhart You can’t serve the people of Texas unless you show up for all the people of Texas, listen to them, learn from them, find a way to work together on the things that we can agree on. Find common ground even on the issues where we might have some differences. [ ]Beto, Amy, and the kids With Amy, Ulysses, and Henry Amy and our kids joined me on the road last week as we traveled through the Texoma region, the Panhandle and West Texas. Maybe not their ideal way to spend their Spring Break, having to cram into the truck with their folks and drive hundreds of miles from town to town, but I bet they won’t forget going to the St. Patrick’s celebration in Shamrock, Texas last Saturday. Or gathering with nearly 400 people on the Potter County courthouse steps in Amarillo under a beautiful sky as the sun set on the high plains. I love that they’re seeing this with me and understanding why this work is so important, why we need to win, and just how we’re going to do it: showing up for everyone, everywhere. [ ]I hope that I can count on you to continue to support this work, to keep me on the road, connecting with the voters who will decide the future of Texas. [ ]Contribute $3 Thank you for making this possible. Beto

body: | | | | Brett's On A Roll! --- [](www.votelindstrom.com) --- Friends, Last night, Brett completely dominated the Nebraska Public Media Gubernatorial debate. He made the case for a New Generation of Leadership and his pro-growth record of tax cuts. I wanted to share with you some highlights from what may be the only Republican debate for governor: [_**KETV Omaha: Four Nebraska gubernatorial candidates face off in debate**_](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsOUG9sYFEOhngUx2t0CtPP7r2M0mpSoLaOOroWCTbbxcLZrTpCWPPC9SPxcjKxStnVpgOQp92NeO9pzObPxVOoWZW8pr7u8AuT1cnOSlb630KRs4_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6zxJO3VTNW-2FYmj7KPVulwacQtDXy3EC3-2FNw9VdaErTTs-2FAZgBXp-2FSLdAwAiLlxSGBx54pxV2G2VUiJOKdCRkNxnw0CbV5LOQZ2yv7SazN6p0bTpsVuqNszj8v2itGxOknhWylD6BOgxWwUW-2Fr3zi-2B0tb2jOSr7XjclWKcrEVqU6TGLJaw6Yg-2FX-2BdVME7tyhgtUIvgoUsjnI0q7ZGdR766t6YKGg0j-2Fe-2Fm20lfT0DWYIUp0AhxNPvE9oQjEL-2BmpPV4GV82JksE4EIfUZoxC8PcUK4ZBnMnlnD0fsIi5YagZIe36CJ2fttqGoDRA0mIEwHuKmDO3aNw4XqYR7dB95yeISC13CMyF7ODPVRctvsUscuQgN6gxyGHfb7rtMnY9oL7o8UpPB3rZabHBAK35FrBWtFMc5i3tvtUO4iU-2FcMUxVRnTD6xQVt4Br0SmqHNTLyQZjGbqErTXZxMNmFZnc-2BbAWgAJHZxdV9A71ZiOnAW5c6hKx1YQwvUMYK6s2hwYFOkA1ofT8dF-2F7ADafbA0MkHjD8-2F83l7YZbAC6E0DE5ElHzrZ5k-2FDg35rA3vgG5d-2Bw9vuKkUYWXdOb-2BLj43VTzJWE7dkGza87RxUrxp9BJNBky6yT375pRBA5fMkxsB0xv8-2FN80lNHt5cVhy0hDIkdh81myDogLiZ4Irn16OQCgPdHPxmzsSMh8sM-2Bn-2BMhfKlnTzZxVraEu1hnUDs6oM-2BtZ-2BNdHNzqj7OugFmJCRPw1sT7qdQTJXkYISjcitwtBVOjIKPB-2FzKgqOIONLype83G6ycxHHn-2BVDfFjFzKqggPmZcGsK0fTgHr14X71OtN9xr8U5) _“I'm the only proven tax cutter that is running for governor on the Republican side. I've done it with Social Security tax, LB 64 last year, which was the largest tax cut we've done in decades. I'm doing it this year to speed up that same Social Security tax to end it in 2025,’ said Brett Lindstrom.”_ _ _ [_**KLKN_TV Lincoln: Herbster touts leadership, Lindstrom cites tax-cutting record in Pillen-less GOP debate**_](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsD-2FVsTKqdcglwAma81kJjVp4iJFhsOk7GTXJQxC1aRVl0QF8S79iyiMfS4ZxH4nFg4P2wF40eRsMzSpWaoiknVOiWtyxhdoLTXsJKcGBmbFh2MpPUA8UW4kFiWF73klMXdDWqf5yLQm505RMLJ6SSQo-3D6ATg_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6zxJO3VTNW-2FYmj7KPVulwacQtDXy3EC3-2FNw9VdaErTTs-2FAZgBXp-2FSLdAwAiLlxSGBx54pxV2G2VUiJOKdCRkNxnw0CbV5LOQZ2yv7SazN6p0bTpsVuqNszj8v2itGxOknhWylD6BOgxWwUW-2Fr3zi-2B0tb2jOSr7XjclWKcrEVqU6TGLJaw6Yg-2FX-2BdVME7tyhgtUIvgoUsjnI0q7ZGdR766t6YKGg0j-2Fe-2Fm20lfT0DWYIUp0AhxNPvE9oQjEL-2BmpPV4GV82JksE4EIfUZoxC8PcUK4ZBnMnlnD0fsIi5YagZIe36CJ2fttqGoDRA0mIEwHuKmDO3aNw4XqYR7dB95yeISC13CMyF7ODPVRctvsUscuQgN6gxyGHfb7rtMnY9oL7o8UpPB3rZabHBAK35FrBWtFMc5i3tvtUO4iU-2FcMUxVRnTD6xQVt4Br0SmqHNTLyQZjGbqErTXZxMNmFZnc-2BbAWgAJHZxdV9A71ZiOnAW5c6hKx1YQwvUMYK6s2hwYFOkA1ofT8dF-2F7ADafbA0MkHjD8-2F83l7YZbAC6E0DE5ElHzrZ5k-2FDg35rA3vgG5d-2Bw9vuKkUYWXdOb-2BLj43VTzJWE7dkGza87RxUrxp9BJNBky6yT375pRBA5fMkxsB0xv8-2FN80lNHt5cVhy0hDIkdh81myDogLiZ4Irn16OQCgPdHPpofrv7qSPSfrVbYkS4ratKiGr3EIj5H22YQqYnTnr-2F1ebqjzqzKF-2BCGGM-2B2LXiiMlqojq6n1sFTRzN2U3dGAeXEXruTCXnX-2B-2FE44tPSSX1JkIxOywJg1jlwDprkbX6OFplI2sfRU0-2BYM-2B0Qi2VZaq) _“On Thursday, he made his case for governor by citing his record of cutting taxes and expressing his belief in investing in Nebraska’s youth. He believes that the two go hand in hand.__ _ _ “I’m a tax cutter. I’ve slashed taxes over my years. I’m currently slashing taxes and will continue to do so as governor,” _ _Lindstrom said. “We need to recruit, retain talent. clean_body: | | | | Brett's On A Roll! www.votelindstrom.com Friends, Last night, Brett completely dominated the Nebraska Public Media Gubernatorial debate. He made the case for a New Generation of Leadership and his pro-growth record of tax cuts. I wanted to share with you some highlights from what may be the only Republican debate for governor: “I'm the only proven tax cutter that is running for governor on the Republican side. I've done it with Social Security tax, LB 64 last year, which was the largest tax cut we've done in decades. I'm doing it this year to speed up that same Social Security tax to end it in 2025,’ said Brett Lindstrom.” “On Thursday, he made his case for governor by citing his record of cutting taxes and expressing his belief in investing in Nebraska’s youth. He believes that the two go hand in hand. “I’m a tax cutter. I’ve slashed taxes over my years. I’m currently slashing taxes and will continue to do so as governor,” Lindstrom said. “We need to recruit, retain talent. We need to be competitive.” Lindstrom said he would ‘stand up against any type of mandate, both federal and state, and make sure that we are always siding on individual rights and freedoms for all Nebraskans.’” “Lindstrom, who has staked his campaign on running a positive race, focused on the future. He avoided attacking his peers and emphasized his efforts to cut taxes, including state taxes on Social Security payments. He has proposed a bill this year to cut them faster.” This morning Brett is back at the Unicameral, where he is working his bill (LB825) which will be the largest tax cut in Nebraska History. "Or as the press are calling it a “Super Whopper” tax cut." We couldn’t be prouder of Brett and his positive, optimistic message. Last night he demonstrated that he was the only candidate with the knowledge and experience to lead Nebraska. But with 46 days left until the primary, Brett can’t do this alone. He needs your support to keep spreading his message to every corner of Nebraska. All the best, Tori Mahoney Campaign Manager Lindstrom for Governor | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S. 130th Cir, Omaha, NE 68144

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TaCx7V1YC0nFPcBm7YEFaZDYTutfYZES0IPxMRMP6Ho=/csY0bFYXfEqP2jKpM-FqxPA-mT3J7tDkaVEfU-CjM28=?refcode=E14716-20220325-CamilleEOQ-header-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, As Josh's Campaign Manager, I want to keep you in the loop about what you've helped us accomplish so far, and the road ahead. [**By the end of this email, I hope you 'll make a donation to help us achieve our strategic goals.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TaCx7V1YC0nFPcBm7YEFaZDYTutfYZES0IPxMRMP6Ho=/csY0bFYXfEqP2jKpM-FqxPA-mT3J7tDkaVEfU-CjM28=?refcode=E14716-20220325-CamilleEOQ-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) **Where we are:** Right now, we are ending the first quarter of the election year having made significant progress. We've hired a small but mighty staff of talented and diverse backgrounds - including our Latino Constituency Director - because of your generous support! We've also opened our campaign HQ in Stockton to serve as the hub for our grassroots volunteer efforts. Now we're in the "ramp up" phase of the campaign and we have **three strategic imperatives** to make sure we protect Josh and keep this seat blue. **FIRST:** Because of redistricting, 2/3rds of our voters are brand new to Josh - they don't know anything about Josh, his family or his values. We need to hire more organizers this spring to expand our voter outreach on the phones and doors. **SECOND:** Our district is over 30% Latino, and we must listen to and engage with this important community early and often. We are running one of the earliest Latino organizing programs in the country, but we can't stop there. With your help, we will expand our Latino organizing program into other mediums like TV, radio and digital. **THIRD:** We are on the frontlines of combatting GOP misinformation online. Republicans are spending millions to spread conspiracy theories on social media, a lot of it in Spanish, and we must respond with our own messaging just as aggressively. Every contribution we receive will help us communicate with our own Spanish-language ads to dispel these lies and continue our outreach to key voters. [**So I 'm asking you to please chip in now before Josh's first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2022 and help us achieve our strategic objectives to keep this seat (and the House) blue. Your support will make a huge difference.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TaCx7V1YC0nFPcBm7YEFaZDYTutfYZES0IPxMRMP6Ho=/csY0bFYXfEqP2jKpM-FqxPA-mT3J7tDkaVEfU-CjM28=?refcode=E14716-20220325-CamilleEOQ-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/TaCx7V1YC0nFPcBm7YEFaZDYTutfYZES0IPxMRMP6Ho=/csY0bFYXfEqP2jKpM-FqxPA-mT3J7tDkaVEfU-CjM28=?express_lane=true&refcode=E14716-20220325-CamilleEOQ-EL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Melissa?=
subject: Momentum is starting to build
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HART FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
We had a very busy week on the campaign trail, and we can feel the momentum start to build! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5e474da0abc1/momentum-is-starting-to-build?e=86d8bd4028)
---
| |
---
| |
# Dear Friend,

I have been around more than a few political campaigns, and there is an unmistakable feeling that comes when a campaign starts to pick up momentum.

That’s the only way to describe the last week for our campaign.

[I spent a tremendous day in Erie on Wednesday with my long-time friend and campaign Chairman, former Congressman Phil English.](https://redhyp.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f32fe9779a27a7755da0693aa&id=cd178eb58f&e=86d8bd4028)

I was part of a great candidates’ forum there, as I was the following night in Langhorne, and at both I drove home the central messages of my campaign: in a political season full of idle talk,**_I am the only candidate who can point to real accomplishments advancing a conservative agenda—and I am the only candidate to have won time after time in a Democratic district._**

No one can miss how determined Republicans are to win in 2022, and as more than one journalist reminded me this week **it has been sixty years since Republicans elected a nominee for Governor who was not from Western Pennsylvania.**

_**I am the only candidate from Western Pennsylvania running for Governor, and frankly the only one who has laid out a vision of what they are for rather than what they are against.**_

We’ve made real progress, but your help can make a critical difference by making it possible for us to keep moving forward.
---
| [CHIP IN TODAY](https://redhyp.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f32fe9779a27a7755da0693aa&id=22e779084a&e=86d8bd4028 "CHIP IN TODAY")

name: Team Tom
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, March 25th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, March 25th, 2022**
Peter,
This week we were excited to announce the release of our first TV ad airing statewide!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43385836/336964260/-386176065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ1MWU4Ny03ZWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hMlLLXi4piRbiSCfbq41IevvRDt0HN68dTEN6qj2FQ=&emci=5e879306-60ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6ad51e87-7eac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Barack Obama has said that Tom Perez is "...one of the best secretaries of labor in our history...” because Tom has dedicated his life to fighting for jobs, justice, and opportunity for all people. As Governor of Maryland, he will continue to do just that.
We are so grateful for your support, and we look forward to staying in touch as we continue to build across the state.
Many thanks,
Team Tom

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, March 25th, 2022 Peter, This week we were excited to announce the release of our first TV ad airing statewide! Barack Obama has said that Tom Perez is "...one of the best secretaries of labor in our history...” because Tom has dedicated his life to fighting for jobs, justice, and opportunity for all people. As Governor of Maryland, he will continue to do just that. We are so grateful for your support, and we look forward to staying in touch as we continue to build across the state. Many thanks, Team Tom Women for Tom! Tom and Shannon were proud to be joined by so many inspiring and powerful women from across Maryland including Senator Joanne Benson, Bonnie Cullison, Delegate Robbyn Lewis, and so many others to share the Perez-Sneed vision to deliver jobs, justice, and opportunity to all women. The Perez-Sneed Blueprint for Maryland Women is a multifaceted agenda for advancing women’s rights. Together we will make sure that women, no matter what zip code they live in, have access to opportunity. We are so excited that over 250 Maryland women across the state have officially joined #WomenForTom and believe that the Perez-Sneed team is the best ticket to govern our state for all people. Sign up to join Women for Tom! On the Campaign Trail Tom kicked off his weekend with AFSCME Local 434 in Towson. We are so grateful to have AFSCME’s support on #TeamPerezSneed. Thank you President Epps for allowing Tom to join you and your members! Later, Tom sat down with leaders from Baltimore County including former Delegate Steve Lafferty and Baltimore County Councilmember Izzy Patoka where they discussed how we can work together to create a Maryland that thrives. Shannon enjoyed her Saturday morning with our good friend and supporter, Montgomery County Council President Gabe Albornoz at the 2022 Gaithersburg St Patrick’s Day Parade. She was also able to join another #TeamPerezSneed friend and supporter, Montgomery County Council Vice President Evan Glass, for his fundraiser in Derwood. Saturday evening, Tom caught up with past, and future, Prince George’s County Councilmember Eric Olson at Denizens Brewing in Riverdale Park. Tom was honored to join Charles County Commissioner President, Reuben Collins Sunday morning to worship at Christian Unity Baptist Church in Waldorf. Thank you Pastor Hutchins for welcoming Tom to your Sunday service! Our campaign is traveling to every corner of our state and as governor, Tom will fight for Marylanders in every county. That is why Tom was thrilled to meet with Democrats and community leaders in both St Mary’s and Calvert County this weekend. Together, we will build a Maryland that works for all. There is no better way to end your weekend than getting out in the community and meeting new Marylanders! Shannon enjoyed joining supporters Sunday for another canvass in East Baltimore. Thank you Dolly Kildee and the Rockville Mid County Democratic Breakfast Club for allowing Tom to join you Monday morning to share his vision of bringing Marylanders access to jobs, justice, and opportunity. Tom and Shannon stood with Women from across the state, including Senator Joanne Benson, Delegate Robbyn Lewis, and Delegate Bonnie Cullison, as they announced the release of the Perez-Sneed Blueprint for Maryland Women. Shannon has made public service her life’s work. On Tuesday evening, she was honored to join the NAACP Maryland State Conference for a virtual event celebrating and honoring historic African American women. We are so proud to have received the support of SEIU 500 and SEIU 32BJ. On Wednesday afternoon, Tom spoke with members of “SEIU 500 Forever”, a group of SEIU retirees who have continued to serve as activists in their community. Thank you, Charles County! Tom headed back to Charles County later in the week to join Commissioner President Collins and other community leaders for an event in Waldorf. Together, we will create a Maryland that thrives! Endorsements In the News “He is tireless; he is wicked smart,” Obama says in the ad. “If you look at his body of work on behalf of working people, he has been extraordinary.” "His resume includes stints on Montgomery County Council, as Maryland and U.S. Labor Secretary, and overseeing the Democratic National Committee in a time where the party took back the White House and Congress. Now, Tom Perez is running in the crowded field for Maryland governor. He joins Jim on "The Final 5" to talk about the race." “In this latest installment of our series of , Tom's guest is , who has had a career in politics in elective office and in the executive branches of both the state and federal governments.” Schedule of Events Saturday, March 26 | 12:00 PM 7027 Brookville Road, Chevy Chase, MD Sunday, March 27 | 1:00 PM Veterans Plaza, Silver Spring, MD body:
Team,

One of my favorite things about being on the campaign trail is getting to talk with Ohioans in every corner of the state.

So whenever I can, I hop on the phone to chat with some of the grassroots supporters like you who power this campaign and ask what’s on their minds right now.

**[Please – if you can, chip in $5 to help us defeat Mike DeWine – and if you get a call from an Ohio number, it might be me!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43386167/336964888/-1772282165?refcode=nw_em_220325_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTQzMWU4ZC03ZWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bqsMFXEfbnm_1E73uABKv85CJXq7QkobKdPUwjK7Gg=)**

I'd love the chance to connect with you about what matters most to you. I know that together, we can create a future for Ohio that puts Ohioans first.

**[Thank you so much for being part of this fight – if you chip in right now, you might be on my call list in the near future!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43386168/336964889/-1772282165?refcode=nw_em_220325_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTQzMWU4ZC03ZWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bqsMFXEfbnm_1E73uABKv85CJXq7QkobKdPUwjK7Gg=)**

Onward,

Nan Whaley

subject: 🚨 One Week Away 🚨
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress.com/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6182041?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| **We are less than one week away from a critical financial deadline. ** I have kicked off my re-election campaign. I have already traveled throughout the new district, and **everyone I talk to is saying the same thing: **
* Joe Biden is a failed and weak leader
* Gas prices are too high
* Groceries have become too expensive
* And they are worried about the future of our nation

Joe Biden and one-party rule have been disastrous to America. Biden killed our energy independence - he made the decision to drive up costs for your family. **We cannot allow him to continue his reign over the American people** \- things are already bad - think about how much worse it could get if we do not take back the House in November.... **Could we see gas prices in New York go even higher? ** **Will food shortages continue or become more severe? ** **Will more of our small businesses close from over-regulation and taxation? ** These are very real concerns I have, and I know they are that much more likely if we do not stop Biden in his tracks right now. [_**> >>With just one week until our 1st quarter deadline, I am looking for my most dedicated supporters to help us finish strong. | Peter-
Supreme Court Justices are supposed to be some of the smartest people America has to offer.
But wokeism makes smart people say dumb things.
That's why when the left's Supreme Court nominee, Ketanji Brown Jackson, was asked a very simple question she gave a very stupid answer.
SENATOR: "Can you provide a definition of the word 'woman'?"
JACKSON: "No, I can't"
SENATOR: "You can't?"
JACKSON: "I'm not a biologist"
You might not be a biologist, but are you smarter than a nominee for the United States Supreme Court? Let's find out.

subject: Taking a step back to say thank you

Derek — The past few months have flown by, and we’re so grateful that you’ve been with us every second of this journey.
As we prepare for the primary, we wanted to take a step back and say _**thank you**_.
Together, we are showing the power of our movement by putting the people of western Pennsylvania first. So here are a few recent highlights of Chris on the campaign trail and all the hard work of our supporters who stepped up for us:

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: How the sausage gets made
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220325&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220325&amount=28]
Team,
Before I ran for Congress, my family was known for one thing: hot dogs. My great-grandfather started a meat company after he immigrated to the U.S. and then went on to create the Ballpark Frank when we got the hot dog contract at Tiger Stadium.
So in honor of my family history and with our end-of-quarter deadline coming up on March 31, I thought I’d take you behind the scenes and show you how the sausage gets made as we approach one of these major deadlines.
Four times a year (March, June, September, and December), candidates are required to report how much they’ve raised and how much they have sitting in the bank. The weeks leading up to “EOQ” typically involve a last minute push for contributions – that means more calls to make, events to attend, and more emails in your inbox.
But you may have noticed my emails are a bit different than the ones you get from other candidates. Since I first ran for office in 2017, I’ve committed to running an email program that I’m proud to put my name on. I really do write or edit each email, sometimes with the help of Rocky or Boomer, as you can see below
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220325&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220325&amount=28]
I like to keep you updated on what’s going on and try to give you a behind the scenes look at how the political process actually works – not spam you with fake deadlines, made up goals, or “sky-is-falling” rhetoric. Which is why when I tell you about a real upcoming deadline, you know it’s actually important.
We’re looking to have a strong showing for our first “EOQ” of 2022, to show those (already!) heavily investing in flipping my seat that they’re wasting their money. Will you chip in today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220325&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220325&amount=28]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Contact Elissa

name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Our progress this quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
At midnight on March 31, we close the books on our official FEC report. Chip in today to not only support Alexandria’s reelection, but to help us post the strongest FEC report possible before Thursday.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220325-2893-header&t=1&akid=2893%2E2526796%2ER8q6rq)
From day one, Alexandria has said she’s not going to take a cent from corporate PACs or fossil fuel executives. That is why we are asking you for a boost before our end-of-quarter deadline. At midnight on March 31, we close the books on **our final FEC report before the New York State primaries this June**.
**Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress.** Next Thursday, the report we submit to the FEC will not only be used to measure her public support, but it will also be used by political opponents, pundits, and powerful special interests to measure the strength of the entire progressive movement.
[Will you make a donation before Thursday’s deadline to help us show the strong support for the movement? Every contribution – no matter how big or small – is what keeps Alexandria in Congress and builds strength for our priorities.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220325-1?refcode=em20220325-2893-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2893_2526796_R8q6rq&akid=2893%2E2526796%2ER8q6rq)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220325-1?refcode=em20220325-2893-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2893_2526796_R8q6rq&akid=2893%2E2526796%2ER8q6rq)**
**Over the past few months, Alexandria has helped move forward a lot of progress, and now we’re on the brink of going all the way. Just this quarter, Alexandria:**
– Successfully pushed back the restart of student debt payment. Now we need to push President Biden to cancel them all together.
– Pushed House leadership to support a bill banning conflicted stock trading for members of Congress who boast an unfair advantage. Now we need to pass it.
– Helped elect Greg Casar to Congress and helped push another Texas progressive challenger – Jessica Cisneros – into a run off. Now Jessica has just a few weeks to go all the way.
We’re so much closer to changing this country for the better. Making a donation now is critical to keeping up this momentum and making these changes reality.
[Can we count on you to chip in whatever you can right now to help post the strongest FEC report possible before next Thursday? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220325-1?refcode=em20220325-2893-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2893_2526796_R8q6rq&akid=2893%2E2526796%2ER8q6rq)
Our campaign would not be possible without all of you, and we’re so grateful for your support.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220325-1?refcode=em20220325-2893-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=23&refcode2=2893_2526796_R8q6rq&akid=2893%2E2526796%2ER8q6rq)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220325-2893-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=24&akid=2893%2E2526796%2ER8q6rq)**

body:
I was only one of three members to vote against endless war | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/can-i-count-on-you?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=87f575899c&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

I am facing relentless attacks from the mainstream media, Democrats, and RINOs. I was **_one of three_** members in the House to vote against Congress’ recent resolution which is pushing America into another expensive, endless war.

Do you support the spending of **billions** of your hard-earned tax dollars to fund a country 6,000 miles away? _President Biden has ignored the Southern Border crisis but plans to send $13.6 BILLION to Ukraine_.

I did not support this measure because I am an unapologetic America-First Republican. Our nation needs to stop prioritizing the wellbeing of foreign countries before our own.

[**If you support fixing our nation before others, chip into my reelection campaign**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4700ecac14&e=645b3b1338).

True America-First voices are rare in Congress and it is instrumental that your beliefs continue to be represented.

[**Donate today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ebbeaa0c51&e=645b3b1338) so I can fend off the attacks of the media and continue advocating for problems that truly affect our country. I **_need_** your support!

**_The last thing our country needs right now is another endless war_**.

Biden’s regime, supported by weak Republicans, is leading our nation into direct war with Russia. American troops should not fight for Ukraine or any country besides America!

[**Donate $10, $20, $50, or as much as you can contribute if you support my America-first policies**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b4b1885fe0&e=645b3b1338)!

Thank you for your support!

_**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0ae568c2cd&e=645b3b1338)**_
---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d32648f1f9&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District

P.S.: Few politicians are truly putting America first. Our weak political establishment is vying to put American lives at stake by inching us closer to war with Russia.

**[I want to fix our country’s open borders, school systems, and protect the first amendment before spending tax dollars on a foreign country. Support me in my reelection campaign if you agree](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=64dc7e1151&e=645b3b1338)**!

body:
This is just the beginning

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377018/336925831/-742096553?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDExOTBjZi01ZmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FG92DbveS_eUN-VqNga1ue1-tcrx6xBvK_SmhQF5pn4=)
---
Peter,

Last week, I had the honor of marching with hundreds of LGBTQ+ youth and allies taking a stand against the despicable Don’t Say Gay bill on Ron DeSantis’s desk.

Seeing so many young Floridians refusing to be silenced by the GOP’s hateful agenda was nothing short of inspiring. **It reminded me why I’m in this fight—not just to make history as a Black queer woman, but to _make a difference_ for the people of Florida.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377019/336925832/1562563835?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220325_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDExOTBjZi01ZmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FG92DbveS_eUN-VqNga1ue1-tcrx6xBvK_SmhQF5pn4=) Sadly, Florida is just the tip of the iceberg. Republicans in Congress are emboldened—**and it’s just a matter of time before they pass cruel legislation like this at the federal level.**

[Peter, I’m determined to protect LGBTQ+ youth in Congress, but I can’t get there without the help of strong grassroots supporters like you. clean_body: This is just the beginning | = Peter, Last week, I had the honor of marching with hundreds of LGBTQ+ youth and allies taking a stand against the despicable Don’t Say Gay bill on Ron DeSantis’s desk. Seeing so many young Floridians refusing to be silenced by the GOP’s hateful agenda was nothing short of inspiring. It reminded me why I’m in this fight—not just to make history as a Black queer woman, but to make a difference for the people of Florida. = Sadly, Florida is just the tip of the iceberg. Republicans in Congress are emboldened—and it’s just a matter of time before they pass cruel legislation like this at the federal level. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Peter, I’m confident that love will win in the end, but it’s going to be a long and difficult fight. And to win this fight, I need you on our side! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Proudly, = Michele Rayner Democratic Candidate for Florida's 13th Congressional District | | Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida P.O. Hello, I wanted to take time to hop on my email and check in as we get closer to the end of the month. A few years back I noticed that the park ac | | | Hello, I wanted to take time to hop on my email and check-in as we get closer to the end of the month. A few years back, I noticed that the park across from our house was polluted, contaminated, and dangerous. Our young girls could not play in their own neighborhood park because it was so polluted and it turned out to be lethal for the local wildlife. Despite the obvious danger to our community, the city bureaucrats refused to take action. **That’s when I decided that I needed to step up and do something.** Marco Rubio has not done anything in a DECADE to protect Floridians from Climate Change and pollution. **[We can’t afford to re-elect politicians who don’t take action. It’s time for change. name: Greg Casar
subject: My first event as your nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Peter,
Thanks to you, we won our primary election in a landslide. But the work doesn’t stop there.
We can’t stop organizing. For my first public event as the nominee for Congress, we rallied at all four Starbucks stores that are unionizing across Texas to support the workers.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=03.25_email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=03.25_email]
During our tour, I sat down with Starbucks staff in San Antonio and Austin to talk about their unionization efforts. Overwhelmingly, the staff were thankful to have the support of elected officials, labor leaders, and their community.
Texas is often talked about as a corporation-run state; as a red state. But I don’t think of Texas as a corporate, red state. We are an under-organized state. And when we organize in our neighborhoods and in our workplaces, that’s how we change the course of history .
I am committed to using my voice and my vote to support workers across our state. In my very first days in DC, I will put my name on the PRO Act and support every person in this country who wants their voice heard through a union.
CHIP IN TO HELP US GROW THE LABOR MOVEMENT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=03.25_email]
If you have an opportunity this week, visit one of our unionizing Starbucks in San Antonio or Austin and order your drink under the name “Union Strong.” The organizers and workers appreciate all the support we can give them!
We are still raising small dollar contributions from supporters like you to keep the movement going. If you can chip in $35 today, it will keep us moving forward! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=03.25_email]
Let’s continue this work.
Thank you,
- Greg

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: re: Vermont and the GOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We’re building a grassroots coalition of people who are passionate about making Vermont and America a better place.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=149%2E61531%2EzQwc2z)
We’re not taking anything for granted in this race.
Only one Democrat has ever won a Senate race in Vermont’s history: Senator Patrick Leahy. This year, he’s retiring after decades of distinguished service. And in 2020, Vermont’s Republican governor won by 41 points.
Plus, the Senate Republicans’ campaign chair is on record calling this a “sleeper” race, meaning they think they can pull off the kind of devastating victory that would give them control of the Senate.
From Medicare for All and a Green New Deal to the future of our Supreme Court and lowering prescription drug prices—there’s so much at stake with winning this race and holding onto a Democratic Senate majority.
That’s why we’re growing this grassroots movement—and that’s only possible because of grassroots donors like you.
[**Can you pitch in $15 or whatever makes sense for you right now to help elect Peter and keep the Senate Republicans at bay?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1689?t=3&akid=149%2E61531%2EzQwc2z)
Vermont’s popular governor has already said he supports the Trump appointee running for the GOP Senate nomination. With Senate control on the line, special interests could flood Vermont with millions of dollars of negative ads against Peter.
Losing the Senate to the GOP would be disastrous for everyone who isn’t wealthy and powerful, and for all the working families who need a government that works for them. As Peter puts it, Mitch McConnell fights for failure—he’d be guaranteed to stop us from addressing our nation’s biggest challenges.
We’re building a grassroots coalition of people who are passionate about making Vermont and America a better place, because we know that passion is what it’ll take to win this election. [**If you’re able to, please chip in $15 to ensure we’re the best position to keep this seat blue.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1689?t=4&akid=149%2E61531%2EzQwc2z)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Thank you!
Team Welch

And it's up to real Americans like you and me to STOP them. **Turning Point USA is on the front lines of the American Culture War. Turning Point USA -- the LARGEST and MOST RESPECTED youth activism group on the Right -- is doing more than ever this year to win the American Culture War. Only TPUSA has MORE THAN 500,000 America-loving young people on our side at high schools and colleges across the country. Only TPUSA reaches MORE THAN 90 MILLION people online with our powerful social media content that exposes the toxic lies of the radical Left. And only TPUSA will reach MILLIONS of students to inspire them to love America again this school year and turn their back on the racist, sexist, Marxist agenda of the radical Left. [**I'm coming to you for help, %FIRST%/Fellow American. Please become a valued supporter by giving $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or any amount you can afford to invest in this pro-American cause at Turning Point USA now. **](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150469&L=81956&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS9mOTY2ZDExMS0zYTYyLTRhZWUtOGJlZS1jZDc3MTJjOTc2OTU/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V1JEMjYzNjI=) Here's what's happening TODAY. Professors nationwide are no longer focused on educating the next generation, but indoctrinating them to believe the Leftist cultural agenda and denying objective reality. In classrooms across the country, the Left has taken over curriculums with their twisted goal of racializing, radicalizing, and sexualizing education -- which is utterly disturbing. **_Are you willing to make a small sacrifice for this country to help these students — an investment toward a new generation of American patriots? _** [**Invest in America today. Become a TPUSA supporter now by making your valuable contribution now of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more.**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150469&L=81956&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90dXJuaW5nLXBvaW50LXVzYS9mOTY2ZDExMS0zYTYyLTRhZWUtOGJlZS1jZDc3MTJjOTc2OTU/c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V1JEMjYzNjI=)
