If we don't reach the next generation ... if we don't teach young people to love our country, respect our Constitution, and stand up for our freedoms ... then I'm worried the future of our Republic is at stake! But there is hope. Turning Point USA -- the LARGEST and MOST RESPECTED youth activism group on the Right -- is doing more than ever this year to win the American Culture War. Only TPUSA has MORE THAN 500,000 America-loving young people on our side at high schools and colleges across the country. Only TPUSA reaches MORE THAN 90 MILLION people online with our powerful social media content that exposes the toxic lies of the radical Left. And only TPUSA will reach MILLIONS of students to inspire them to love America again this school year and turn their back on the racist, sexist, Marxist agenda of the radical Left. = Here's what's happening TODAY. The Leftist elite are forcing children to unnecessarily wear masks in schools, while they parade around with celebrities at massive events with no masks in sight. Professors nationwide are no longer focused on educating the next generation, but indoctrinating them to believe the Leftist cultural agenda and denying objective reality. In classrooms across the country, the Left has taken over curriculums with their twisted goal of racializing, radicalizing, and sexualizing education -- which is utterly disturbing. Are you willing to make a small sacrifice for this country to help these students — an investment toward a new generation of American patriots? = = The “Woke” regime -- which viciously attacks conservatives while claiming to promote tolerance -- is being EXPOSED thanks to the hard work of Turning Point USA. No other group in America today, Right or Left, reaches more young people than Turning Point USA. = We must continue restoring and protecting the rights and freedoms of our fellow Americans, especially the young people who need us most. name: Max Steiner
subject: Why is a Democrat going to a gun show? Let me explain:
body:
My military experience has given me a healthy respect for the Second Amendment |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377737/336928820/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmFjMGQ0Yy02M2FjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OT9x5v--0hZwUvKND_XDOM11mVUczqi-BzejaD3oew=)
Friend, I’m going to be spending this weekend at the Gun Show in Red Bluff. If you like gun shows and live in Tehama County, feel free to swing by. If you live in Tehama County but don’t like gun shows, send me an email if you’d be interested in meeting Saturday or Sunday afternoon. If we get enough interest, I would be happy to stick around and meet some of my constituents.

So, why is a Democratic Congressional Candidate going to a gun show? You may be thinking that a “typical Democrat” wouldn’t go to this type of event. You’d be right! But here’s the thing: “typical Democrats” lose elections in places like CD-1. My military experience has given me a healthy respect for the Second Amendment. Moreover, talking with Republican and Independent voters across the district has made me realize that this is an issue we can win on.

**I spent a weekend at the Chico Gun Show last month. I had hundreds of conversations with gun-owners. Many of them voted for Trump. Many of them despised LaMalfa as a “welfare farmer” hypocrite who never talks to voters. We, as a Democratic Party, can win these votes. We just need to get out and talk to people who have written the Democratic Party off. **

We have let the Republican Party “own” the Second Amendment for too long, just like we have let them “own” the military and what it means to be a patriot.

As a Centrist Democrat and a veteran, I am well-positioned to get these voters back in play. Talking at gun shows is sadly not enough. There are 740,000 people in our district – and it takes money to reach them. That’s why I need your support.

Thanks for hearing me out,
Max | **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43377738/336928848/360059203?refcode=em-3.25.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmFjMGQ0Yy02M2FjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OT9x5v--0hZwUvKND_XDOM11mVUczqi-BzejaD3oew=)**
---

We're sure that we can all agree that our district is overdue for a leader who gives a damn about the people who live here. For too long, the Republicans and their corporate interests have let their greed overshadow creating real change for our communities and families.

**In November, Ann will bring an end to that, because Ann will be a representative who will actually represent us.**

Just take a look at their career paths: Ann has spent her career getting things done as a small business owner, educator, and working mom. She embodies the best of Wisconsin – someone who knows the value in making an honest living and putting her community first. From restructuring a board of directors to uncovering purchasing and accounting errors at a Fortune 500 company to helping students get into their dream schools, **Ann has spent her career creating real solutions to the big problems our community faces every day.**

Bryan Steil has only had two jobs: one where he shipped critical jobs out of this district and overseas to line his pockets and another as a politician in D.C, hand-picked by Paul Ryan to keep their conservative stronghold on our district.

Ann is not getting involved in this race for the blood sport of politics, unlike her opponent, but she is running to serve the people of this district.

| | [ Recapturing American Leadership in a Chaotic World : A discussion with KT McFarland ](http://click1.srnemail.com/nqkkdpccdbtnbbmcnttzqnjbgdnrpggbypzmgytfwwrpjr_xdsbbpphpvhctdbpsvpcvgg.html)
### _Friday, March 25, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by KT McFarland. She has an amazing story that started with a college job at the White House working with Henry Kissinger and has taken her back to the White House as the former Deputy National Security Advisor. KT has a straightforward no holds bar take on the state of the world and what we must do to recapture American Leadership. ### _Wednesday, March 23, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by John Soloman, the CEO of JustTheNews.com. John and I take an in depth look at the death of investigative journalism among the Mainstream Media and how their political bent is now obvious in their reporting. We also share ideas on how Conservatives can get our message through to a world waiting to hear the truth. Please subscribe and share the podcast [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/kpmpvsbbvzrjzzqbjrrgljfzwvjdswwzhsgqwhrmttdsph_xdsbbpphpvhctdbpsvpcvgg.html)

| [ Warnings from Past Part 2: Taking a look at Presidents Washington and Eisenhower final Addresses to the Nation ](http://click1.srnemail.com/fyqyjnccjpbwpplcwbbfdwrptjwgnttpsnfltsbhqqgnyj_xdsbbpphpvhctdbpsvpcvgg.html)
### _Monday, March 21, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a look back to get a picture of the future. I do a deep dive into the final speeches as President of George Washington and Dwight Eisenhower. These two great men, who lead this Country through very difficult and trying times, left a great deal of wisdom in these addresses for us today. I believe that we can learn from looking back at these documents and applying the truths found to our problems today. Please subscribe to and share this podcast with your friends as we learn together. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/msppndzznjtljjvzlttkclsjmnlbdmmjqdkvmqtywwbdpd_xdsbbpphpvhctdbpsvpcvgg.html)

clean_body: | | | | | | Friday, March 25, 2022 Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by KT McFarland. She has an amazing story that started with a college job at the White House working with Henry Kissinger and has taken her back to the White House as the former Deputy National Security Advisor. KT has a straightforward no holds bar take on the state of the world and what we must do to recapture American Leadership. ---|--- | | Wednesday, March 23, 2022 Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by John Soloman, the CEO of JustTheNews.com. John and I take an in depth look at the death of investigative journalism among the Mainstream Media and how their political bent is now obvious in their reporting. We also share ideas on how Conservatives can get our message through to a world waiting to hear the truth. Please subscribe and share the podcast | | Monday, March 21, 2022 Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a look back to get a picture of the future. I do a deep dive into the final speeches as President of George Washington and Dwight Eisenhower. These two great men, who lead this Country through very difficult and trying times, left a great deal of wisdom in these addresses for us today. I believe that we can learn from looking back at these documents and applying the truths found to our problems today. Please subscribe to and share this podcast with your friends as we learn together. | | | SUBSCRIPTION INFO This e-mail is being sent due to your subscription from TheDougCollinsPodcast.com or in the Salem National network OR a friend might have forwarded it to you. | Team, late yesterday, the AZ GOP passed an **extreme 15-week abortion ban, styled after the one in Mississippi. This makes Arizona the third state to pass such a bill.**

_This is the same type of bill the Supreme Court is currently reviewing and in which far-right extremists think will overturn Roe v. Wade._

The AZ GOP isn’t waiting for the court’s decision, and neither should we. We need to send a **strong message TODAY that we’re ready to fight – state-by-state – to protect women’s health and a woman’s right to choose.**

**[Team, we cannot wait for courts to decide the fate of women’s health. We have to FLIP the AZ governor’s office and the state legislature and pass our own laws PROTECTING women. Can you donate $10 today so we can win and reverse these bad bills?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xHv6UsLw6FYC0O8QDDeAy6RN-OeQNskuui58VJpJqQQTJQksbYAdKb1sJQwNiMUBRiIfUPl2RSmLPpX5eJyMpCFIiccoKf-n1BoheiktIDvJ_0-12Y9FtzmNp_-0qMLHxsx_xx9IvqWdUYyLWjU93fuwfOzOvd_LWU4h1lH1lpZDZ81dqvcDGE8AVvwhKEZogxxDBz4qsbiK7NfXdyFwe7xhyWgKZkxVY3M7R4FjUjB7HOCz00rNYyNK7FzXfuBtMjaGp4A8qjIJibf72Da3TofhMyEdU9_P01fVKhckA0AVYtNhFTuaWoLR_hw4KPk3ewfH0TIY2LsGyTui_kH262mCxFEdfV83DhBxx_SEPc0NiQ9uAnlfWiD1-0_YlYkiU-K3LBC3T18GlebfYLExdeO5_ujIZSzfKZgxP_0eUpMo0WCY4XicUPxJ3fcuKjKasKqdQYJgN85FuAc6Wwo_9FGGnmSrlYvMV3YI-gyey-vQOdyMVtuPKtfQW91Ykiu-U/3kn/OcKGCauQQWOU3Y6-u-4h4g/h1/3RyjvjfWEOU6SS7z1rP8umQ2Au4LnP5vHrv5oz_uK1Q)** [
DONATE ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xHv6UsLw6FYC0O8QDDeAy6RN-OeQNskuui58VJpJqQQTJQksbYAdKb1sJQwNiMUBRiIfUPl2RSmLPpX5eJyMpCxhdgHITC9ETsNSqi1kR7Jq2IGDACci-2Ryzd1sqW21kwXB4mHyA9nS5jTgpqTcrrFdQaZnonPrw386bKR4Kc5mMQ4lJP-qQSrSpAwL5EN3E8Qoq0B2R7odwRT-HXTURrG5eZjbUoHBnhpeamvaT7E0kqs97q-HIvoVwW91Gi8ibJnInQbgGe1xTpKLOxhaezdGGS5WCR0BCuJNqUJxM42PYoC3D_MLCJf7Xzwo-C1zZPUPNQPUTvSlCqz3aruq6AT4HpGgZkOPoelDytQ6ay_zP9MRoxkBsDw6E--DkJQqbFhBuOtkiJ-eL-6sGQfLTiIjuNi5dBrhZd74ep49WL72mt-RVycSWtMDa7VBz_ua92PuYs-8vg0e5fswdmWfUpmsgjJfSAYTJkRYAWVuiTnSd9_XabbzS_WMoZY9N6fgM/3kn/OcKGCauQQWOU3Y6-u-4h4g/h2/00NhaYV47eEckxrsEPV3M9pkul1SxueHkQKte4irmb0)
These 15-week abortion bans are truly extreme. This bill contains **no exceptions for rape or incest or for a medical emergency.** It would also bar abortions for families that learn later on that a fetus is not viable – **seriously putting the mother at risk.**

_We cannot go backward when it comes to women’s health._

Our race to flip the Arizona governor’s office is a toss-up, and we are just 1 seat away in both legislative chambers from flipping them.

Far-right extremists will defend the AZ GOP with everything they have to keep these extreme abortion bans on the books. We have to fight back to win control and overturn them.

**[Team, women’s health is on the ballot in Arizona in 2022. If we fail to flip the governor’s race and the legislature, the AZ GOP will pass even more extreme bills. Rush a $10 donation right now to help us fight back against these extreme measures.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xHv6UsLw6FYC0O8QDDeAy6RN-OeQNskuui58VJpJqQQTJQksbYAdKb1sJQwNiMUBRiIfUPl2RSmLPpX5eJyMpCATPkU5A4u1AXt5tonbXGNd2-uD6Lmu-WgHmywJT5X2-q4PaPnHQh9ULaX7yxLnj1zI1HD8ZIhom6hCFLL6FFAFbJjh3oeuXhtEzoVDEFphrQ2JgXZ6rLp1VKaaNFiGgvdL73u6X0sS6Pisk_RnmF9jrsjFQGEuM3FLiT_AZS1e-sukmrZ9Kw39SMFeUAm3NrOCDd0qsw0UgnI7dOy_uCjhahlzmg3Iwmf9Mt4_vAi6uHeEv_tRH-2bifHnwxGqHTIgsqzINUwtpCh-kw4L6broOZlOk2BUzDrf7MK35lisCgIypQYZKv9LOHyxX5p8Lo0--IcfXnCqnkZaPyqSlzC7Nq3dtFh-1n2XMBK63g3ofsDbvEDoOuuVLxeEzFGyqnLKRHsQoWVT3tOI0J6U_MqpCkpo9tght4SvQ3jFkY23s/3kn/OcKGCauQQWOU3Y6-u-4h4g/h3/iRQ_Av6SIzZY6vAd0BlLnxLYgxBGdU8ZxuR_AcvBYts)**

clean_body: | | | Here's how you can help | | | Team, late yesterday, the AZ GOP passed an extreme 15-week abortion ban, styled after the one in Mississippi. This makes Arizona the third state to pass such a bill. This is the same type of bill the Supreme Court is currently reviewing and in which far-right extremists think will overturn Roe v. Wade. The AZ GOP isn’t waiting for the court’s decision, and neither should we. We need to send a strong message TODAY that we’re ready to fight – state-by-state – to protect women’s health and a woman’s right to choose. These 15-week abortion bans are truly extreme. This bill contains no exceptions for rape or incest or for a medical emergency. It would also bar abortions for families that learn later on that a fetus is not viable – seriously putting the mother at risk. We cannot go backward when it comes to women’s health. Our race to flip the Arizona governor’s office is a toss-up, and we are just 1 seat away in both legislative chambers from flipping them. Far-right extremists will defend the AZ GOP with everything they have to keep these extreme abortion bans on the books. We have to fight back to win control and overturn them. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We promise to always fight for you, AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . clean_body: We have a critical update for you, team, and we wanted you to hear it from us first: | | | = We have a critical update, team, and we wanted you to hear it from us first: 1) CNN is reporting that Maggie Hassan's New Hampshire seat is one of the most likely to flip, which means this is a must-win race for the Senate majority. 2) The GOP sees Maggie's seat as a top target, spending MILLIONS in attack ads against her! And this race is going to be close: A poll now shows her statistically tied with a Republican opponent. 3) This people-powered movement relies on grassroots donors like you. Without your support, we just can't compete against the GOP's dark money. With our first fundraising deadline of the election year around the corner, Maggie needs your support now more than ever! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for stepping up. Hey Peter, it’s Tyler (the Marine who did four overseas tours and is now on a mission to secure a seat in Congress). [**I need a quick favor.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc665de0e19642838f906af9e7d291d6&_e=Y62golgrIG7S5jBk_Kc9e4wtPxaEFWHgQFU2Ik2RCbFA-QFB5ShB3Mk8v23zljzfojdHoa1QESryIibFS1myTPwXbp8gnnZego6Rk0U_EeqzgVUoh0tWeQpQSZ7NR3GSwEB5hLiJDgBgilE_RQOT2bM_9jNZp1OZc8M8pHzSYaY6ILPz1538qew1wrIGVb0ggKPWy0sIJNqgSjV63TomxXO5PFhBUqqBqKtEWmXBTWRslZJ2Cvo0kUCWcoqtn_jFzj_pTKwvzwHEV89OEuVISFZyX6ussaKxk6aGt6NWZJAaas8izyTJdOSoV_0bcZwfJmimkxvenwoxxiOyvSas5zU4qJkb36Fj8gmMWfr4hEn7bzrEwiy6HViUmB4WIvfwwz3KHVPNUJwgzVMZLn8jwA%3D%3D)

**The short version:**
I’m facing my biggest deadline yet at the end of March, and I need to know if you’ll [**have my back**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc665de0e19642838f906af9e7d291d6&_e=Y62golgrIG7S5jBk_Kc9e4wtPxaEFWHgQFU2Ik2RCbFA-QFB5ShB3Mk8v23zljzfojdHoa1QESryIibFS1myTPwXbp8gnnZego6Rk0U_EeqzgVUoh0tWeQpQSZ7NR3GSwEB5hLiJDgBgilE_RQOT2bM_9jNZp1OZc8M8pHzSYaYCQ5Qeaqku6j3KUfzZLCFZB9XqFdHgZU2ohPlW94eA0zaHbsBY-uHm8Az5NxKMIjQIIy2cEQ_bR3zpZG7fRXGC8wOquOqQS45Fy01uLsgwh4x5VJdn6Q3QrJJ9-umleITvNLajL7QlRVxwShe8kRopsCBFzRWsHLrT1SMreCxDYcJfmhJ9Ylix0TBczAayZr3bn45q4oQvKcyeumlvozHk6TX6pEE3SjN0c6uwDzW-WA%3D%3D) in the next 15 minutes.

**The long version:**
This is what I didn’t want to have to send to you, but my team and I are going over the numbers before our big end-of-quarter deadline, and essentially, I need to pick up the pace on our fundraising numbers. **We are 41% short of meeting our biggest goal yet** , and I don’t know what we’re going to do.

I’m sure you know how bad things are...

My super-DEM opponent and liberal media will be patiently waiting to comb through my next round of publicly accessible finance reports so they can spot potential weaknesses or shortcomings that they can use against me.

**Dark money groups have already poured MILLIONS into my opponent’s bank account, because they know she’ll rubber stamp Pelosi’s America-last agenda.**

This is the same far-left Democrat who beat me in 2020 by just 2% _and since then has voted with Pelosi 98% of the time._

So now you see why I had to email you and ask for your immediate support. [**Will you tap the secure link and make an emergency donation to help us pick up the pace?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc665de0e19642838f906af9e7d291d6&_e=Y62golgrIG7S5jBk_Kc9e4wtPxaEFWHgQFU2Ik2RCbFA-QFB5ShB3Mk8v23zljzfojdHoa1QESryIibFS1myTPwXbp8gnnZego6Rk0U_EeqzgVUoh0tWeQpQSZ7NR3GSwEB5hLiJDgBgilE_RQOT2bM_9jNZp1OZc8M8pHzSYabxzEK-4LsUV9HClbqLyPz3glG8ZKd-RdIx50sPoill4zOZxnkWcBB-2ISJMVGPd6Y9l5pv0sG0jMOiB0HBC5Ye2D_vnSYdLzv4MuBxMSo9IYlKL0UJnpDdZQc_mMfJbIbDnWHzNn7xf9u9w9b82m471LlJzoebChjTEQSU6QYsJ-h3DoOPY_DJxOQKa0lb76_KkrNUYBEYbJQMb2THxwC71t4UXohjdxbCBcRmyhth-A%3D%3D)

[**EMERGENCY DONATE**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc665de0e19642838f906af9e7d291d6&_e=Y62golgrIG7S5jBk_Kc9e4wtPxaEFWHgQFU2Ik2RCbFA-QFB5ShB3Mk8v23zljzfojdHoa1QESryIibFS1myTPwXbp8gnnZego6Rk0U_EeqzgVUoh0tWeQpQSZ7NR3GSwEB5hLiJDgBgilE_RQOT2bM_9jNZp1OZc8M8pHzSYaZor4z2VcIcYZIgbtcSudOvpaoDiSDd-gTOENaJT_JBj5yfZa5KpiBaDmeJE54ZyZcRMOFT3xsNZpuDiXr9Pdmfs-oMcaRLYppVJX26ieEsqgHZl5MAJXCpG-AzbspWdxpq3rQho_9qzVqMdQhAk1PRfdrb2y7CUJsic0da6gbTbXDyahujGI6ljDAw9UVWz9liyaRhx1T9IzaS1GGCMU59-dYRcVKNfyCAhRrLog2LIA%3D%3D)
All eyes are on this seat, Peter. Dems and Republicans have qualified this as **one of the most competitive races this cycle.**

If Republicans are going to retake control of the House, then it’s essential to win seats in suburban district like the one I’m running in. With just five seats needed to take control, we must PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY.

If Dems hold the House majority in 2022, they’re going to go wild...

Winning this seat is the key to regaining the majority - [**which is why I’m asking for your help today. Will you spare any amount today so that I can hold my ground?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc665de0e19642838f906af9e7d291d6&_e=Y62golgrIG7S5jBk_Kc9e4wtPxaEFWHgQFU2Ik2RCbFA-QFB5ShB3Mk8v23zljzfojdHoa1QESryIibFS1myTPwXbp8gnnZego6Rk0U_EeqzgVUoh0tWeQpQSZ7NR3GSwEB5hLiJDgBgilE_RQOT2bM_9jNZp1OZc8M8pHzSYaa2-OA1n4BWrkIAMfcYnWsrv7tBdNbBgrQEDQUyKkBl_k4bKggjGpjR5BQ-v9paV50rMdsRGr59OmbX1IGvcuziTkiCo1yfFYGLvLfunc8thJm6_b8eq-x6DHp_SXvz4hzvzZatjsOW5aJ-fEZPiamWFVRAHWW5OaR9g1SKel_4IBjyhyPZ6_G-AHiD8EPU0aThszocgGAHi-WYxb2me_CC-aUQZWmCxE-gVV7kD4MHsg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Hey Peter, it’s Tyler (the Marine who did four overseas tours and is now on a mission to secure a seat in Congress). | Hey Peter, it’s Tyler (the Marine who did four overseas tours and is now on a mission to secure a seat in Congress). The short version: I’m facing my biggest deadline yet at the end of March, and I need to know if you’ll in the next 15 minutes. The long version: This is what I didn’t want to have to send to you, but my team and I are going over the numbers before our big end-of-quarter deadline, and essentially, I need to pick up the pace on our fundraising numbers. We are 41% short of meeting our biggest goal yet , and I don’t know what we’re going to do. I’m sure you know how bad things are... My super-DEM opponent and liberal media will be patiently waiting to comb through my next round of publicly accessible finance reports so they can spot potential weaknesses or shortcomings that they can use against me. Dark money groups have already poured MILLIONS into my opponent’s bank account, because they know she’ll rubber stamp Pelosi’s America-last agenda. This is the same far-left Democrat who beat me in 2020 by just 2% and since then has voted with Pelosi 98% of the time. So now you see why I had to email you and ask for your immediate support. All eyes are on this seat, Peter. Dems and Republicans have qualified this as one of the most competitive races this cycle. If Republicans are going to retake control of the House, then it’s essential to win seats in suburban district like the one I’m running in. With just five seats needed to take control, we must PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY. If Dems hold the House majority in 2022, they’re going to go wild... Winning this seat is the key to regaining the majority - I hope I can count on you in this critical moment. In service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. clean_body: Calling on you one more time | Friends, Our End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline is fast approaching. Once the reports come out, my opponents will measure our momentum based on our fundraising. This isn’t the time to slow down. | I know you’ve helped so much with our campaign, but I know you care about our state and our country, so I’m calling on you for help ONE MORE TIME. I’m asking for your help because I genuinely believe our state and our nation will be in PERIL if we don’t get conservative leadership into DC. I can't overstate this\-- our freedoms in America are dependent on getting Conservative Fighters in DC. No one will protect our values from the Democrats if we don’t wake up. So please, chip in anything you can, and I’ll do my part to fight for you! Sincerely, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
I'm reaching out to you personally:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43388449/336974857/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk812-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTY5MzQzNi04OWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yd_lRtYauOrKAx7IYeWxr7oBSEp8Fnv802PfZOzdbS4=)
Peter,

I just wanted to reach out personally to say thank you for being a part of my grassroots movement to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and protect our Democratic Senate majority.
Thanks to you, we are ready to take advantage of record-low approval ratings and polling that shows only 27% of likely Iowa voters would reelect Sen. Grassley. If we defeat him, you'll have helped elect the youngest woman ever to the U.S. Senate – a woman who will fight every day to lift up the voices of working families.
**A win in Iowa would also virtually guarantee a Democratic Senate majority.**
Right now, we are facing the biggest test for our campaign yet: our first public FEC reporting deadline of the election year – where our fundraising numbers will be made public. Everybody from Mitch McConnell and his allies to the political pundits and Sen. Grassley himself will be watching to see if we _actually_ have the resources to flip Iowa's Senate seat.
**I know we can pull it off, but here's what it's going to take:****[raising $100,000 before the month is up. That's why I'm reaching out to supporters like you. I know you may have been waiting to chip in your hard-earned dollars, but right now is mission critical. Can you spare a first-time donation of $5 today so I can defeat Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43388451/336974859/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk812-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTY5MzQzNi04OWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yd_lRtYauOrKAx7IYeWxr7oBSEp8Fnv802PfZOzdbS4=)**
Thanks so much. I'll be sure to keep you updated on where we're at. This is a big moment for our campaign, so I appreciate you stepping up.

Abby

While the GOP candidates in our race are focused on attacking one another and currying favor with National Republicans, I remain focused on the issues that matter most to Washington families in the 4th District.

From fighting for affordable housing and healthcare, to securing our water sources, to strengthening our economy, to improving education – **I know Washingtonians want a representative who prioritizes solving problems over picking petty political fights.**

[Help us take advantage of this unique opportunity to secure our Democratic House majority and keep extremists out of Congress by chipping in before the FEC deadline!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43379791/336937100/-1439264554?amount=10&refcode=DW_EM_FR_90DO_220325_1_1&refcode2=9a86d85b-68ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=h1RHv3eFeuMrLJwCEFXszIB8YJzAOf+6urbttAqo6XGP6z/Vk4UNtb+Ms/d9tEQK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTg2ZDg1Yi02OGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jFTCemg4CJKRMgQ5eUoKfjEg2GzbVzBDKP40_4dxam8=)

body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=26e3016eea&e=89fb4d5220)

| Friends,

We wanted to let you know about several opportunities to meet**David Perdue** and **Newt Gingrich** on Tuesday, March 29.

Earlier this week, Newt Gingrich **officially endorsed** David for Governor of Georgia, and we're thrilled to have him on the team.
[](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=98e5c2f578&e=89fb4d5220)
**_CLICK TO SHARE on [Facebook](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=6acb0f61bf&e=89fb4d5220) and [Twitter](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=b6b4026410&e=89fb4d5220)!_**
Newt Gingrich is hitting the campaign trail with David, and we hope you're able to join us!
_**Fayetteville Meet & Greet**_
Fayette GOP Headquarters, 174 Glynn St N, Fayetteville, GA 30214
Tuesday, March 29, 11:45 AM
[RSVP](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=dcb5450f7b&e=89fb4d5220)[ HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=6dab620c2c&e=89fb4d5220)

1818 Club, 6500 Sugarloaf Pkwy, Duluth, GA 30097
Tuesday, March 29, 2:15 PM
[RSVP](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=c798677f50&e=89fb4d5220)[ HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=06d6afb5b4&e=89fb4d5220)

**_Marietta Meet & Greet _**
Cobb GOP Headquarters, 799 Roswell St NE, Marietta, GA 30060
Tuesday, March 29, 4:45 PM
[RSVP](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=0cf6ce1666&e=89fb4d5220)[ HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=e5e3c5d1a8&e=89fb4d5220)

Election Day is rapidly approaching
| | |
---
**This is urgent.**
**As of 6 p.m. ET, I'm short of my daily fundraising goal – and I can't afford to fall behind now that Election Day is rapidly approaching. So I'm coming to you personally, friend:**

clean_body: Election Day is rapidly approaching | | | This is urgent. As of 6 p.m. ET, I'm short of my daily fundraising goal – and I can't afford to fall behind now that Election Day is rapidly approaching. So I'm coming to you personally, friend: = Senate control hinges on what happens here in Florida, and we have a real chance to flip this seat blue. Florida's last Senate race was one of the closest in the country. That's why Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are spending millions to defeat me and prop up Marco Rubio. If I'm going to have the resources to win, I must reach my midnight goal. The next donation could be the one that closes my fundraising gap. So with polls showing Marco Rubio and me neck and neck, I've got to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for your support, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. Friend, In just a few days, we’re going to file our petition signatures with the Secretary of State to get on the ballot. [Will you please click here and add your name?](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=7b2fdfcefe5b4cec8c4ce313cdd2952a&_e=tVW3UEA-MfkBcmypoNRYtHx6L6raXC8trs1bwzN0vFIwh1Etz27UsvKJcnhAe4uhObP2NEA_KfvFf1agrkkmh-5Pw1H5V6341CN7cZBKwK2TLmEezkZDvENy3CbfxZCaNGC8IUA66U3eA5s1WqT4oyRpG3BBmFoKp3WNDEJy-dHz46CuzysOY5WFWsCZHOcusbWS38h6lKiNcHNtnPb4lXd_lxFcACJXk3X5OywfZJk2Rib7Lx7DEk163WWlFSx-qo0dT-mpKY-bTjN6qpW4xQ%3D%3D) **Arizona is facing an invasion at our southern border, our constitutional rights are under assault from an out of control federal government, and parents are being labeled as domestic terrorists for daring to speak up against indoctrination in our schools. ** We desperately need an Attorney General who understands these issues and has the backbone to do something about them. **My promise to the people of Arizona is simple:** ✔️ We will secure our border and stop the invasion ✔️ Biden’s not taking my guns and he is not taking yours either ✔️ We will stop the indoctrination in our schools and protect parental rights [Please let me know I have your support, and sign my petition online before time runs out.](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=7b2fdfcefe5b4cec8c4ce313cdd2952a&_e=tVW3UEA-MfkBcmypoNRYtHx6L6raXC8trs1bwzN0vFL7SqdcHVotjSzNrLRGR3cGvk8cBs7u2CXbyFgC2OhC7RQVVNMBCxoNNuF9O8XCMVoIXSRmx2_zq9Lt-HA4OokvLM6_Y_GYZO0l92DQMN5BJohPiuYRuA9g6juUjpqPwA_0EkXEaWQXUbczUusatPwGfrAoA1zXWecT6zNXoFRxzf3DL9fkz75_b09TWlPW8AxtxJm564GvUpDOsDlGd-cAy_wRlg9BOVKbF4uGrsXzmA%3D%3D) I have asked my team to provide me a list this weekend of everyone who has signed, and I hope to see your name on there! clean_body: Your support is crucial. | | | Hi there! It’s Jordan, Finance Director for Team Cisneros. In less than one week, our campaign will face our first end-of-quarter deadline of 2022. And in just 60 days, Jessica will face off with Henry Cuellar in a tough runoff. Before we make an official goal, our finance team has been working nonstop to compile records of donors — and we just came across your file, Peter. | Supporter Record for Peter Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com March 2022 Donor?: No — not yet! Suggested donation: $5 Every grassroots donation matters. No matter how big or small. We refuse to accept corporate PAC contributions because Jessica promised to fight for the people, not corporations. A grassroots contribution of any amount has an immediate impact on how hard we’re able to fight for our vision. Defeating Henry Cuellar in the runoff won’t be a walk in the park by any means. We’re going up against decades of entrenched incumbency and big-money relationships. And even though our opponent has taken thousands in donations from corporate PACs, Big Oil, and the Koch Industries — the one thing he doesn’t have is you, Peter. We have an opportunity to elect a leader who truly understands the challenges in our communities and has the solutions big enough to match the urgency of the crises we face. To do that, we need new leadership in Congress. We appreciate your support, Jordan H. Finance Director, Team Cisneros To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

| [DONATE TO HELP EXPOSE ELECTION FRAUD](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r "DONATE TO HELP EXPOSE ELECTION FRAUD")
---
| Mike just filmed this urgent video message that I told him I would share with everyone I knew:
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)
---
| **I am proud to have Mike Lindell's endorsement for my campaign to be an America First U.S. Senator from Missouri.** Frankly, the RINOs in DC are too chickenshit to do anything about the massive election fraud in our country, so I'm running to change that!

Do you remember this?

In June of 2020, 350 to 500 Antifa rioters attacked my home while my wife, daughter, and I were there alone. We exercised our 2nd Amendment right and held off the mob...
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)
---
| Many in the same situation would likely have left their home, but I didn't back down. I doubled down, protected my family and secured my home.

But the mob wasn't done yet.1,000 rioters came back days later. With the help of almost two dozen armed patriots, we stood up for what is right despite the dire personal risks! We turned back the mob and achieved peace through superior firepower when they reached our house the second night.

Now, as a lifelong strong Christian constitutional conservative, I am running for U.S. Senate in Missouri to defend our country with the same strength that I defended my family and home!

**I will never** **back down,** **and I will never let the socialists achieve their goals. Mike Lindell knows this, which is why he is supporting my campaign.**

**But we need your help to continue our mission to expose election fraud and restore Donald J. Trump as President of the United States! Will you send in a generous contribution of **[**$10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)[**,**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)[**$25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)[**,**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)[**$50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)[**,**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)[**$100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)[**, or**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)[**even $200**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)[**to help us get it done?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944538:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r)

Patty and I are outsiders. I am the only person running for U.S. Senate in Missouri that is not now and has never been a politician. And the day of the career politician is over.

If you agree, please, help us take back our country:
---
| [DONATE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59944539:JoAhbpoTN:m:1:3253819041:E7DE96548C18B4CCB61D77F3E435CFC8:r "DONATE $100")

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43380858/336941109/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=ca6299fd-6bac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=MY68IrJ3ISYcAd0JlPmWwAQwdjAGxxjJa/WDaGmoad2/Lbksvk/pcp1tTe7D7Naz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYyOTlmZC02YmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4zI2_ar6egRq5sTw7EGsTwt-YkTZqvlbu9yLGMC0uy8=)
This week Americans eagerly watched the confirmation hearings for a new justice to our nation's highest court. And what they saw on their screens was shameful.
They saw relentless Republican attacks on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson, including on her role as a public defender, and the grandstanding of a handful of GOP Senators who chose to attack her without merit and lob outrageous accusations that only demeaned themselves. Their performance was not about justice or our highest court — it was about political ambition and press coverage.
Through it all Judge Jackson’s brilliance stood out. She did not back down. She stood up for the law and the Constitution. She did it with grace and grit. And in the process she showed Americans why President Biden selected her to sit on the Supreme Court at this critical moment in our history — and why she belongs there.
An independent judiciary is one of the hallmarks of a vibrant democracy and something that separates us from the Putin's of this world. We need to preserve it and protect it from those who seek to undermine the Constitutional protections it is meant to safeguard.
I will be fighting for Judge Jackson until this process is over. And we all need to be fighting to ensure that we have a Senate going forward that will vote to confirm highly qualified jurists, like Judge Jackson, to our federal courts. Because, without them, we can't fully protect the rights and democracy we hold dear.
I'm ready to see Supreme Court history be made. How about you?
Onwards,
Chris Van Hollen

* * *

Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Senate majority.
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43380859/336941110/-149995803?refcode=em220325-1-a&refcode2=ca6299fd-6bac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=MY68IrJ3ISYcAd0JlPmWwAQwdjAGxxjJa/WDaGmoad2/Lbksvk/pcp1tTe7D7Naz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYyOTlmZC02YmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4zI2_ar6egRq5sTw7EGsTwt-YkTZqvlbu9yLGMC0uy8=)****
** **
** **

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/621675c5-5cac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/ca6299fd-6bac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYyOTlmZC02YmFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4zI2_ar6egRq5sTw7EGsTwt-YkTZqvlbu9yLGMC0uy8=&id=102988412), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: Team Gwen HQ
subject: It’s been a long time coming! (awesome news inside!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
| | |
---
Because of Gwen Moore, the 855 Black women who served in WWII will finally receive the Congressional Gold Medal! It’s been a long time coming, but the “Six Triple Eight” are getting the recognition they so deserve. These women delivered some of the most important communications to U.S. officials and troops during the war. We are so grateful for Gwen Moore’s unrelenting mission to give these women the credit they deserve but didn’t get when they returned home after the war. Join us in giving a big THANK YOU to Gwen!
---

clean_body: | | | Because of Gwen Moore, the 855 Black women who served in WWII will finally receive the Congressional Gold Medal! It’s been a long time coming, but the “Six Triple Eight” are getting the recognition they so deserve. These women delivered some of the most important communications to U.S. officials and troops during the war. We are so grateful for Gwen Moore’s unrelenting mission to give these women the credit they deserve but didn’t get when they returned home after the war. Join us in giving a big THANK YOU to Gwen! Friend,

If you know me, you know how important my family is to me. This week, in particular, is a very special week for us as it is **my Abuela’s 90th birthday!**

When I set out on this journey to represent the men and women of Virginia’s 7th Congressional District, my Abuela asked me what she could do to help me reach this goal. I replied, _“all I need are your prayers and a dollar for every year you have been alive.” She quickly replied, “only if others do the same.”_ This is why I am reaching out to you on this special week for my family.

clean_body: Sign her card! | Friend, If you know me, you know how important my family is to me. This week, in particular, is a very special week for us as it is my Abuela’s 90th birthday! When I set out on this journey to represent the men and women of Virginia’s 7th Congressional District, my Abuela asked me what she could do to help me reach this goal. I replied, “all I need are your prayers and a dollar for every year you have been alive.” She quickly replied, “only if others do the same.” This is why I am reaching out to you on this special week for my family. | My Abuela is the epitome of a selfless leader who never shy’s away in times of trouble. My goal in life is to emulate her selflessness. Please join me in wishing her a happy birthday! God Bless, Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. * | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.

body:
How are you affected? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/668136da0cca/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6797117?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=2d6088d846&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Friend,

These skyrocketing gas prices are **unbelievable** and **unaffordable**.

Ever since Joe Biden took office, the American people have slowly been robbed by _record-breaking inflation_ , a _slowed supply chain_ , and now _surging gas prices_.

[_**So I want to hear from you; are Biden’s unaffordable gas prices affecting your daily life? >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=a868db22c5&e=c87c5d8d97) [****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=c2cd6fd8ef&e=c87c5d8d97) There’s no end in sight when it comes to the rising prices at the pump; in parts of the country, gas has even hit above $7 a gallon.

And the American people are the ones paying the price for the Biden Administrations' failures and devastating policies.

[_**Take our survey today, and let me know how badly Biden’s gas hike is affecting you. >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=75cf23d2fe&e=c87c5d8d97) [****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=bd7670a60d&e=c87c5d8d97)
Thank you,

Lori Chavez-DeRemer

clean_body: Alisha has always been one to stop and help people whenever they need it. | = | Hi there, Peter! My name is Naeemah Goldson. My older sister Alisha is running for Congress in our home district in Nebraska, and she wanted me to reach out to see if you can chip in to support her campaign. = = | = Alisha and I grew up in Omaha and lived in subsidized housing along with our siblings and parents. We are just one year apart in age, so we went to school together and participated in many of the same activities. Alisha has always been one to stop and help people whenever they need it, and I know she’ll bring that same spirit to serving the people of our home state. She has a big team rooting for her, and I’m glad you’re a part of it | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for supporting my sister, Naeemah Goldson * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

| | Peter, Twelve years ago this week, President Obama signed the Affordable Care Act (ACA) into law. This hallmark bill changed the lives of millions of Americans, providing affordable and accessible health care. As a two-time cancer survivor and father of two sons who live with Crohn’s disease, Andy understands the toll inaccessible and expensive health care costs can take on a family — that’s why he’s fighting with the Progressive Caucus to pass Medicare for All in Congress. Health care is a human right, and people shouldn’t have to decide between affording their life-saving care or putting food on the table. [_**Peter, please add your name if you agree: We must fight for all Americans to have affordable, accessible, and universal health care.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43381887/336945530/206510772?refcode=em_20220325_f_t_aca&ms=em_20220325_f_t_aca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjRlYTgzMS02ZWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2sJzSFGcUuoPxOvnCDmR6zDD1jaQdRCs8542086yWA=&emci=e6ee54de-4aac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=764ea831-6eac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926) While in Congress, Andy led the fight against Trump’s effort to deprive Michiganders of health care access — and won. Andy pushed for lower costs and expanded access to health care by holding the line to pass the Build Back Better Act through the House. Peter, as Democrats, there’s a lot we’re up against — Republicans are taking to the courts to try and repeal the ACA, amidst an ongoing pandemic that has left many individuals without jobs or employee-sponsored health care. If Democrats don’t hold their majorities and progressive voices in November, people’s care will be at stake. [_**Peter, it's time to pass progressive health care reform in Congress. Sign the petition to join our movement here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43381888/336945531/206510772?refcode=em_20220325_f_t_aca&ms=em_20220325_f_t_aca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjRlYTgzMS02ZWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2sJzSFGcUuoPxOvnCDmR6zDD1jaQdRCs8542086yWA=&emci=e6ee54de-4aac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=764ea831-6eac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926) Let’s go! Team Levin

body:

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43382046/336946203/-1540418300?code=jtk1191-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzgwMWM3Yi02ZWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v988PbrXVgRQ_BjWBDkoxeDHTtyd0LgblcSZ7as8w64=)

| | _**UPDATE: Retail stores in New Mexico will start selling cannabis on April 1!**_
---
**New Mexico is one of 18 states to legalize cannabis – and as advocates push for federal legalization, Gov. Lujan Grisham wants to know what you think about this issue.**

**_We need 20,000 Team MLG supporters to answer our poll before it closes at midnight, so tell us now:_**
---

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._6ry1ep0EOog)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._bP1gg)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._CoDOQ)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

| Dear Patriot, Things are falling apart quickly. Joe Biden is a horribly incompetent President, and America is paying the price for it. And I'm afraid that if he manages to defeat me in my re-election campaign this year, I will be unable to stop him from making a catastrophic mistake that endangers America. **I need a victory against Biden and his Democrat henchmen. And there is a crucial deadline coming up that could change the direction of the entire race.** You see, at the end of this month, I will be required by law to report how much money I have raised. It is a test that separates the strong candidates from the weak ones. And the Democratic National Committee will be watching my report like a hawk, scavenging for signs of weakness. I fully expect that my Democratic opponent's number will be in the millions. After all, he has the support of Left-wing special interest donors across America. I do not have access to those same donors. That's why I must rely on conservative patriots like you. You see, I've taken some politically unpopular stands over the last couple of years. **I've taken on Joe Biden, holding him accountable for his refusal to make America energy independent so that our gas prices can go down.** I've taken on Anthony Fauci, exposed his secret funding of the Wuhan lab, and called for a criminal investigation into him for lying to Congress. I've taken on the crippling COVID restrictions of this Administration that are destroying the economy and wrecking the Constitution. These stances have made me popular with Constitutional conservatives like you -- but not with establishment elites in Washington, D.C. And now, with the world in a state of chaos, it's never been more important to have a level-headed President who is capable of making sound and smart decisions. Unfortunately, though, our President is Joe Biden, and none of those things can be said about him. Do you really trust him not to make a catastrophic mistake? I certainly don't. Luckily, our system in America contains checks and balances, so that the President doesn't hold all the power. But my ability to check Joe Biden's power depends on my ability to defeat my Democratic opponent and remain in the U.S. Senate. [Will you stand up and join me before this End of Quarter Deadline so that I can remain in the U.S. Senate and fight to save America? A generous donation of $100, $50, $25, or $10 would help immensely.](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DyHCW_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi72nFVf6juo0avLy5gA5o7taTj0h-2BFFIDQg4v9GWt5S-2BVELcFKs5iIsC-2BCLR9dtO2WWHGVKaH-2FLv-2Bb0XaVijWgxlBOoPKhOxjL6ZtAEHaD-2ByCVG-2B6tggJQAqcTZf71DOxD7KWt1K9dmetfa1ncEfPk5jGMw915l5j5wlYZjsO6w1iI6FPeW9dJzCqTnOeKvKPzJfQU1LV7RHhBM7-2BuaESvREyzsid7xzj2LywJQrxRiSvNUX762Mmz9c8GQTq6MAyrWuEsZdscDG7xVFYkfTprSc6YpzXH7YfNadDXYiSAGapkF5jp7xh3Fa2uH2Ad7snPfG-2BcjUnOybwN1CYsUBVHNQ-3D-3D) Not only is Biden creating a mess around the world, his Administration is now spreading panic -- yet again -- about COVID. I don't need to tell you how threatening Fauci's latest scam is to America and our beloved Constitution. COVID is now statistically less deadly than the flu on an individual basis, and yet public health bureaucrats are ready to lock us down and mask us up again. I can guarantee you this \-- if it doesn't stop now, it will never stop. **Do you want to have to deal with seasonal lockdowns and mask mandates for the rest of your life? I absolutely do not.** That's why I am fighting back as hard as I can in the U.S. Senate. But if you don't stand with me, my Democrat opponent and his special interest donors will smell an opportunity to take me out. And if that happens, I will be unable to fight back against Biden or Fauci any longer. That's why this End of Quarter Deadline is so crucial. [Will you join me by chipping in $100, $50, $25, or $10 before the deadline passes?](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DKc6q_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi72nFVf6juo0avLy5gA5o7taTj0h-2BFFIDQg4v9GWt5S-2BVELcFKs5iIsC-2BCLR9dtO2WWHGVKaH-2FLv-2Bb0XaVijWgxlBOoPKhOxjL6ZtAEHaD-2ByCVG-2B6tggJQAqcTZf71DOxD7KWt1K9dmetfa1ncEfPk5h10ffB1NujZ0djW-2FD0haqgw0yDAKVylZqtcXLha0-2B5DYC54moMErMRm4AVRdXhMX5YzzA0mqsqB3-2F-2F-2BdaqVMeuqLAwwJ2qOcqPumoHX-2Bt6JJkpzH6vUaWl8m5DeIMiiPpDL3za-2Fw4pyllpMZTQfRv3FPqLsZRosS05eZv-2Bok3rcjIm3KNRAnPeFE8MTu88ATQ-3D-3D) In Liberty, Rand Paul

| | Team, I’m excited to share our campaign’s latest endorsement from the AAPI Victory Fund! They are an important and powerful partner in our bold coalition for change. And as the first Asian American State Senator in Massachusetts, this endorsement is personal. As rising violence continues to target the AAPI community, it’s clear we need elected officials who will lead the fight against racism and act with urgency to win real change for our communities for the long term. That’s why I’m running for Governor of Massachusetts, and that’s why I’m proud to earn this endorsement of the AAPI Victory Fund. Their mission to empower and mobilize our community is critical to delivering universal, quality education for every student, passing a Green New Deal, and building the future we all want our kids to grow up in. I’m honored to have their support in this campaign. [_**We’re hard at work building a strong coalition that will be crucial to winning this race. Can you join the AAPI Victory Fund and chip in $15 to say you’re ready for change in Massachusetts now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43382293/336947530/-1995710501?refcode=em_20220325_f_s_avf&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI4YTg4ZS03MGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JJ9DTYR6oa60uh8wCv8TGp-iiPuIyI3Tzv3Hrjfx5RU=) Talking to people across the Commonwealth, it’s clear what matters most — affordable housing, education, A Green New Deal, better transit, racial justice. Our endorsements from elected officials, community leaders, organizations across the state, and national supporters like AAPI Victory Fund show our commitment to delivering exactly that. I know we have a real chance to make Massachusetts work for all of us, but I need your help to keep the momentum going. [_**Can you chip in $15 now to help us win? We can deliver a Massachusetts that works for all of us.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43382294/336947531/-1995710501?refcode=em_20220325_f_s_avf&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI4YTg4ZS03MGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JJ9DTYR6oa60uh8wCv8TGp-iiPuIyI3Tzv3Hrjfx5RU=) Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: We have a real chance to deliver a Massachusetts that works for all of us, let’s keep this momentum going. | | | | | Team, I’m excited to share our campaign’s latest endorsement from the AAPI Victory Fund! They are an important and powerful partner in our bold coalition for change. And as the first Asian American State Senator in Massachusetts, this endorsement is personal. As rising violence continues to target the AAPI community, it’s clear we need elected officials who will lead the fight against racism and act with urgency to win real change for our communities for the long term. That’s why I’m running for Governor of Massachusetts, and that’s why I’m proud to earn this endorsement of the AAPI Victory Fund. Their mission to empower and mobilize our community is critical to delivering universal, quality education for every student, passing a Green New Deal, and building the future we all want our kids to grow up in. I’m honored to have their support in this campaign. = Talking to people across the Commonwealth, it’s clear what matters most — affordable housing, education, A Green New Deal, better transit, racial justice. Our endorsements from elected officials, community leaders, organizations across the state, and national supporters like AAPI Victory Fund show our commitment to delivering exactly that. I know we have a real chance to make Massachusetts work for all of us, but I need your help to keep the momentum going. = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. name: Crystal Cavalier for Congress
subject: What does it mean to be a warrior?
body:
From my perspective...

| [ ](http://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/?e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=1)
---
Friend -- Being a warrior is all about service, generously offering our unique gifts, skills and passions to nurture the community. It requires both humility and bravery, defending the marginalized and speaking truth to power. [](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=wR9crmXCl7yvYlRWVEGnSj3f2frvjOvqNlNgudpExEPyy39Y555AOGNlSJF9W1dy&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=2) I am more convinced than ever that my service – as an American Indian working-class mother and frontline Water Protector – is needed in Congress, to fight for the changes our lives and our Earth depend on. Unfortunately, the road to Washington, DC is expensive and in order to get there, I need your help. **[Can you chip in $27 to help fund our grassroots campaign?](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuTtq6BLBRUD6SEaC3P1wXfEuY0SY4YHYuQH3bQV4pE4g&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=3)** Every dollar given is a gift and an expression of your support. Thank you for believing in me. In service, Crystal [www.crystalcavaliercongress.com](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=wR9crmXCl7yvYlRWVEGnSj3f2frvjOvqNlNgudpExEPyy39Y555AOGNlSJF9W1dy&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=4)
Crystal Cavalier for Congress · NC 27302, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=5).
You can also keep up with Crystal Cavalier for Congress on [Twitter](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNNDnqCJTTPwt2XTazggGMJ2tjMJ8nUphYEgLQPHRthUj&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=6) or [Facebook](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6hKi9T2gEgzqocTncjoK-7Cbpo1uCcNsZXcxWLiy_Wo1&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: BREAKING: Donald Trump is coming back to NC.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
He just announced this afternoon that he is coming to North Carolina
#

**Donald Trump is back.**
He just announced this afternoon that he is coming to North Carolina on April 9 to hold a rally for Ted Budd. This is his second rally here already this cycle and the clearest sign yet that this race is heating up.
Trump is personally invested in winning North Carolina, and he will do absolutely everything he can to ensure his hand-picked candidate Ted Budd holds this seat.

body:
This has gone beyond political opinions: this is a threat to our public health. | | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg7ewztLQxzTpb09sELe2ccuPcsyLcmy771aFbmP21oonzd0PkEQvIXnnDLbxymdgrcTud-rqq2PwedUQeMCEDCuVdJtrxd0SyCWuJpbLBJQa/3kn/BXMfsbfbTzW402Tb-JnMdg/h0/2XvFg1Bh3jrqlsLJBE9muB4M4pMA6h0IZriUosybiww) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
I’m DISGUSTED.

[ **Republicans are launching disgusting attacks against Dr. Fauci...**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlclrhfZDu7H8BeiZto5oXVTSL48xhkq0tZ0qcHtCMJ8Y0eUqQsveL6jekc53SzqIlvAllYCpeXcASHgvacPPSmsFp_p76gfm_RVRQWGT-kdIbLv_TjaF8y7lDeh9IHQyivajF1N8Jo_wCisF1bLuIgR3yUgT_q_MaSJqNWE58f91GKT21L19iTwF-gxMM6PMFwjo36sbuDNHdqw4WuhJZAJ7XA7yjzCtmSteb_UgqqyoxQRNJwFAJ2fCG-yfFe-byAZpIJH77DDeWhxHJL0zJO/3kn/BXMfsbfbTzW402Tb-JnMdg/h1/PtYK5Tzi1uKnL-TRp71ryvbLOzIu7QUbOK8eToKq_Mk) [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlclrhfZDu7H8BeiZto5oXVTSL48xhkq0tZ0qcHtCMJ8Y0eUqQsveL6jekc53SzqIlvAllYCpeXcASHgvacPPSmsFp_p76gfm_RVRQWGT-kdIbLv_TjaF8y7lDeh9IHQyg0rVTIqoEEg2OqbvFF-CAJXrQRopCnoTNZFlL-W11sMjxkeLrqj1ftHkKpRt3lhN5pyvHWwvSGeuXd6V_GYPol_MiHRmLYENnTTyq5b5gMMV_PGrkUrXkS2lJsADt5_djI5dsa6VpyNmLsVvrK5Oxe/3kn/BXMfsbfbTzW402Tb-JnMdg/h2/J1_Wwmr1mIOG4sPzzNzmVf6Bg1n9oNH_6_TDrMLzpZA) Attacks on Dr. Fauci are beyond politics: they threaten our entire public health apparatus.

Dr. Fauci’s long-time colleagues have even said this is the most visibly hurt they’ve seen him – _he needs our support now more than ever!_

[**_So I’m personally asking you to join me and add your name to stand strong with Dr. Fauci. Will you sign now?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlclrhfZDu7H8BeiZto5oXVTSL48xhkq0tZ0qcHtCMJ8Y0eUqQsveL6jekc53SzqIlvAllYCpeXcASHgvacPPSmsFp_p76gfm_RVRQWGT-kdIbLv_TjaF8y7lDeh9IHQyi22PBqT6prGHUBiy2DIhoWHvoSZ_20K4ngwzngqAd7R7-44BALphvpBfEKw6pQsVwagihr2ramys3-Std0nt3CsNz56ZnTq7PKKjwA90PEx8H7PkkhsL6IX3tykRxIDxrNmcv5O97PsTZK-o2CcgD_/3kn/BXMfsbfbTzW402Tb-JnMdg/h3/zuuFNCZdjq_IjIdkOghVCCvgKxbMwijsAXpkFfUkLtw) | [ADD MY NAME: I STAND WITH DR. As a Congressman and as a doctor myself, I’ve seen the devastating impacts of COVID-19 on our country.

I can confidently say that Dr. Fauci’s leadership has been essential in leading us through this pandemic.

But anti-science Republicans like Rand Paul will do **ANYTHING** to destroy his reputation and spread misinformation.

So it’s up to us to protect Dr. Fauci’s legacy and continue our fight against COVID-19. I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |

clean_body: This has gone beyond political opinions: this is a threat to our public health. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I’m DISGUSTED. Attacks on Dr. Fauci are beyond politics: they threaten our entire public health apparatus. Dr. Fauci’s long-time colleagues have even said this is the most visibly hurt they’ve seen him – he needs our support now more than ever! | As a Congressman and as a doctor myself, I’ve seen the devastating impacts of COVID-19 on our country. I can confidently say that Dr. Fauci’s leadership has been essential in leading us through this pandemic. But anti-science Republicans like Rand Paul will do ANYTHING to destroy his reputation and spread misinformation. So it’s up to us to protect Dr. Fauci’s legacy and continue our fight against COVID-19. Thank you for your support, Dr. Raul Ruiz Cincinnati.com: Rand Paul calls Anthony Fauci a 'menace;' latest in increasingly personal feud | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Dick Durbin
subject: Just wrapped up Judge Jackson’s hearing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
This week, I had the honor of presiding over Judge Jackson’s Supreme Court nomination hearing. She carried herself with grace, humility, and dignity. And she was thoughtful and forthright in her responses.
The next step is for our Committee to discuss and vote on Judge Jackson’s nomination, followed by a full Senate vote. I will continue to keep you updated on this process.
In the meantime, I also want to thank you. Without supporters like you, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans would be leading this process.
**[Peter, will you make sure Democrats continue to lead Supreme Court confirmations? Contribute $5 now to reelect our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43383381/336951961/1901419541?refcode=dd_em_220325_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDk0YWM0MC03NWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLaB8aH9Zk1MQAhFLeTVZfVil2w4VmgMRZ9apeQff_8=)**
You hardly need me to remind you that the last time we had a Supreme Court vacancy under a Democratic president, McConnell refused to hold even a single hearing.
And despite calling himself the “Grim Reaper” of the Senate and blocking progress on nearly every bill, he rushed through Federalist Society-approved Trump judges to remake our federal judiciary.
Since becoming Chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, we have made huge strides in appointing judges who will balance the bench and who share our values. But our work is far from over.
**[Contribute $5 right now to reelect a Democratic Senate and keep Mitch McConnell from taking back control of our federal judiciary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43383382/336951962/1901419541?refcode=dd_em_220325_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDk0YWM0MC03NWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLaB8aH9Zk1MQAhFLeTVZfVil2w4VmgMRZ9apeQff_8=)**

My best,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43383383/336951963/1901419541?refcode=dd_em_220325_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDk0YWM0MC03NWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLaB8aH9Zk1MQAhFLeTVZfVil2w4VmgMRZ9apeQff_8=)****

Join us Friday, April 1 at 6 PM at Northampton County Community College | | | | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=62f579ffe8&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | |
# **Congressional Debate Next Friday, April 1**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

**Lisa Scheller and I are finally having a debate. **

After almost two months of urging, prodding, and coaxing by GOP officials and local voters, Lisa Scheller has agreed to debate me on the public stage. We will be meeting at Northampton County Community College (3835 Green Pond Road, Bethlehem Township) next Friday, April 1st. Doors open at 6 p.m. and the debate starts at 7 p.m. in Room 130 of the the Gates Alumni Center, which is across the street from the main campus. Everyone is welcome to attend but seating is first-come-first-served. Thank you to the Northampton County Republican Committee for organizing and sponsoring this important event.

If you want to hear your two Republican candidates for Congress discuss the issues face-to-face, please take advantage of this opportunity. I've called for six debates before the May 17th primary: one each in Carbon, Lehigh, Monroe and Northampton counties, plus a virtual forum and at least one televised event. I think its important that voters have a chance to see their Republican candidates together in person, and most people I speak with concur.

So far, Lisa has only agreed to this one debate in Northampton County. Let's hope the voters have the chance to see more. You deserve it.

Here is a [link](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d712751ecc&e=1090c5c412) to an article with details about the debate. I look forward to explaining my plans for Safe Communities, Good Jobs and Strong Families. I hope you can make it next Friday.

In the meantime, please visit [www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=5f53a7a8f8&e=1090c5c412) for more information about my campaign to KEEP AMERICA FREE.

Sincerely,

---
|
---
| We are having a reception and fundraiser for the Kevin Dellicker for Congress campaign on March 31 at 5:30 PM at [Sage Alley Brewery](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b10708d7a0&e=1090c5c412) in Coopersburg, Please click on the link [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=4ee8090ebe&e=1090c5c412) for details. Hope you can make it!

**Last Quarter, Chief of Staff Katie Boyd Britt raised $1.2 million. Career Politician Mo Brooks raised $382,000. Me?_I only raised $165,000._**

**We can’t afford to let that happen again.** We need you to chip in any amount you can NOW to ensure that we win. That Alabama wins. That America wins.

[**Rush in your support >>>**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=f3b04311ecad4b7b938cc9d8d8dcbbf6&_e=cHc1D8b8xlHi8gB8vEw_xIblYadIF4T1FNMTT53UrVc_oOyKLhdHCwb9I8if6IwyuRApyL8A9jYlkLrrbol0KrWOwI7L1tI6HoMH8FpyBheMCx2iY-aYXsZeFzZwWcHzEQ2-KhmBDumCNBTWfRew73h7pnVGRr2R8cEyYhka2VULXoJis5tAsByGRrqWcxFo2kSmx99a3ujh5Qt1FvJpog_A2Q5wk9qIHo7bvotsmQP8E5UjuDfvofjPy3PiY12tbVONC_ufSyArhJY1peOSBSyltTZpFKL1yvNzNETd0JkYBDgvITVzF8fzSDt1XPZAQM1R6GRdlIBYGZQz_HaE1x8yeE-ZtvQYeQLfgutOJDFGO8Ra4OWjnlcVCrIWXMZ2S-2vtjmy0koOJ_rwabpLuy-UFo79lZjcVPFFgHzzKacSKa0mdvFvZoMplg1EqqMgSjB_WuvSKgeq0q4DfWOD3Sii5cyCTNhW97_ZOE0QZy0UWdnqtVVJZl51OIreM480SOnfErLFemT5kZkTAB9-2A%3D%3D)

If we’re outraised and beat, the good people of Alabama will be left with a Career Politician who only cares about special interest groups.

On the other hand, I have fought for our country and will gladly do so again. I’m signing up for one more tour of duty: one to serve my country and the great state of Alabama.
**Claim your 300% MATCH immediately.
We can’t lose.**

clean_body: Triple your impact | Friend, We’re coming up on our END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline, and I need your help to reach our goal. From now until midnight, I am activating a 300% MATCH on all donations. I’m nervous. At the End of the Quarter, we’ll have to make our fundraising numbers public. It’s me against the Career Politicians. Last Quarter, Chief of Staff Katie Boyd Britt raised $1.2 million. Career Politician Mo Brooks raised $382,000. Me?I only raised $165,000. We can’t afford to let that happen again. We need you to chip in any amount you can NOW to ensure that we win. That Alabama wins. That America wins. If we’re outraised and beat, the good people of Alabama will be left with a Career Politician who only cares about special interest groups. On the other hand, I have fought for our country and will gladly do so again. I’m signing up for one more tour of duty: one to serve my country and the great state of Alabama. Claim your 300% MATCH immediately. We can’t lose. | Thank you, Mike Durant PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. DURANT FOR SENATE PO Box 11548 Huntsville, AL 35814 Mike Durant is retired from the U.S. Army, where he served for 22 years. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Departments of Army or Defense.

$1.

It is time that we get back to putting America First and in 2022, we can do just that, by electing Ted Budd for US Senate in North Carolina. Thanks for fighting back against the Radical Left! America First Updates | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. body:
Here’s what’s next for me, Peter. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQTMJu9IZWurr0e1V7f1n0sODZ2FHKYLElcio5SYG9KhC0HwSvqXqszuJYgUL11SpTK6VktCdCO1xgr1ibVaks4FQOhe_ZptZY2Pt5T_OnLUIVFX-E7F_ZUJ72TvpSo_8UztbXWwO1UtbIoP0djnJJfVyBODldmTXgg3bOTtGb9-wUYE2tvCQkJafjKtMPcsFP0pWD17OenAUTLF5eO-KOPtKl0Ch_guhS_IuVWbFFJTxYfoJSrMzOrOigUN6gzPRoBpYYcK60DNJFJf-RdxT6Rwxws_2CDPmEYsmwjjnua0S5px_5oWCq8ip_eYbV9Iroe0i_cvzV8yboakl6-GM0DzWMdX6_ya4swlETHO_CR1LrCmDsQQYRBEIdBPnhSgY/3kn/-ZKRLF98QJS5HADKxVt7Eg/h0/Op4o9E8lgwxKAXMvgUBoYFgf7wIh4Ro5MusKPe7oP38)
