Hello Peter!

This is Jessica Mason. As part of the BTE Team, you’ve probably heard of me. I ran for Texas’ 30th Congressional District as an endorsed Barrier to Entry PAC candidate.

Although we didn't get the results that we had hoped for in the primary election, I’m incredibly proud of the fight we fought together. I started from scratch without any major funding or campaign resources, and I lacked the advantages, the rolodex, the connections, and the mega-donors that others had. **But I had grassroots supporters like you and the help of Barrier to Entry PAC to run a bold, competitive campaign.**

Together, dollar by dollar, we built a movement that inspired the hearts and minds of working-class people across the country. We outraised the competition in individual small-dollar donations, which speaks VOLUMES of who our coalition was built and run by -- everyday people, like _you._

We were brave enough to demand ambitious, progressive solutions like universal healthcare, a Green New Deal, workers’ rights, and more. We called out corporate corruption and dark money. We lifted up the voices of the underserved and underrepresented and elevated their stories, OUR stories. **_We refused to be silent._**

And now, we will continue to fight — we will keep breaking socioeconomic barriers and work to build an equitable government that reflects people of ALL backgrounds and end the elitist culture of status quo corporate politicians.

**_That’s why I’m so proud to announce that I’m joining Barrier To Entry PAC as the new Director of Campaigns!_** I’m thrilled to have the opportunity to support low-income candidates like me who want to make an impact but lack the startup funds and resources to run for office. But we can’t do this without you.

[**The fight isn’t over, Peter. Please join us today in helping to dismantle barriers to entry and elect more working-class candidates by rushing a contribution to Barrier to Entry PAC right away >>**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQTMJu9IZWurr0e1V7f1n0sODZ2FHKYLElcio5SYG9Kg5S8MxAHrNNS-QKkAc_seL6R7xmAvxf1chmgRCnOCi9NK6pNs8Ezua2wPUkL6xyvfMCBBfXMuMoPsQYsv9U7LqezWfMllIkzHN26DMCoa3D87tXKy3W_6mp5EUQ3ukA26elax72gazMjcP6O0Qt_yx5ALSc4ZfAhsxqmiiRJrV7QAS95kr1r0JhtS3aLGA5B5uXVSRP5uS5pYn1imUjKsqcAD9bd_U6pDDGcBtk2xGB6_VEEIWk5jUH2fBYeyeblrlCqwx8QWCd6Be6ZWdMIUmMNOMWz6wcI8aHGhVpZHyKeDJba-tyGUGrkd-L-r8zlKrRm-cQSyd2VufhC1sYg9ipt52Zelr3GXQns5sjKS6K/3kn/-ZKRLF98QJS5HADKxVt7Eg/h2/up5_0AJ7i-Fne4QMQZar6oLiNmpBgnPJLbfWTkiZve4) clean_body: Here’s what’s next for me, Peter. | | | Hello Peter! This is Jessica Mason. As part of the BTE Team, you’ve probably heard of me. I ran for Texas’ 30th Congressional District as an endorsed Barrier to Entry PAC candidate. Although we didn't get the results that we had hoped for in the primary election, I’m incredibly proud of the fight we fought together. I started from scratch without any major funding or campaign resources, and I lacked the advantages, the rolodex, the connections, and the mega-donors that others had. But I had grassroots supporters like you and the help of Barrier to Entry PAC to run a bold, competitive campaign. Together, dollar by dollar, we built a movement that inspired the hearts and minds of working-class people across the country. We outraised the competition in individual small-dollar donations, which speaks VOLUMES of who our coalition was built and run by -- everyday people, like you. We were brave enough to demand ambitious, progressive solutions like universal healthcare, a Green New Deal, workers’ rights, and more. We called out corporate corruption and dark money. We lifted up the voices of the underserved and underrepresented and elevated their stories, OUR stories. We refused to be silent. And now, we will continue to fight — we will keep breaking socioeconomic barriers and work to build an equitable government that reflects people of ALL backgrounds and end the elitist culture of status quo corporate politicians. That’s why I’m so proud to announce that I’m joining Barrier To Entry PAC as the new Director of Campaigns! I’m thrilled to have the opportunity to support low-income candidates like me who want to make an impact but lack the startup funds and resources to run for office. But we can’t do this without you. body:
What if all it took was $3.80?
| [](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=20dd8929ffc143a38657abdec2a1f167&_e=pvkSD5GX3lvbi8lnXZaQilvyxAsmWp5LhfFu8gDufa-4rp16IE-lbMUHPOp8WUHrFAAqeutmJEijuX0jNwWeQWSSm4y86t87Cgr7M6mDwiAlWrYAKYJPWyeQwHfFH5LgXMvdtH7jOaq1Et6WtTRn_lScOsi3qnYlRdkp0-gz-LQNb-mRk78ZWfiYK4ClhkdR5fcQ2WL8oAWBhFrAbSAzPbiKCNhybMVl9T5Agq1IjjKCX6IXfvy_djsO16aGfcO8AKrZU24spqR0vqUQLiuBwucebjnLuRaJpynnid6906vmpzODGf_RbN01Q2HX2jqUhs9h10XlnmumCbt10rp4bOLjH_XvcbeDwDIV3pmpAdX0sD6k5xLwr-BaO_pDZzCMEqkkcXha7OG69qaE0OkTpnAxhLlLooA68_VvE43UfYeAS8gfhBaYIbKByJKW10OgPPqG-Azqj6T7hQzUv4bVxlkdMVgCHlSmMopnOFKmAX6-WfHPkXC9vyPf5gSNU4SD0HqLGV8iHDbjA66rtdO2nA%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
While Nancy Pelosi thinks she can simply _buy_ Texas’ brand-new 38th district for her liberal puppet, let me assure you, she has another thing coming...
---
_If we hit our Q1 goal before we have to close the books at this FIRST FEC deadline, then we can hold our own against her barrage of smears and lying attacks ads._
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: “Manchin/GOP”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Joe Manchin
is blocking legislation that would improve the lives of working families.
And the Squad knew it from the very beginning — that’s why AOC, Cori,
Jamaal, Rashida, Ilhan, and Ayanna voted AGAINST the Democratic
establishment in order to try to save progressive priorities in the Build
Back Better Act.

One of the cornerstone policies Democrats passed last year was the
expanded Child Tax Credit. Now, because corporate Democrats trusted Joe
Manchin, the tax credit expired, child poverty spiked, and there’s no real
signs that the credit can be revived.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/100978?refcode=em20220325-22560&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22560%2E1203867%2EhkFEfA ]Tweet that reads: the expanded Child Tax Credit has been dead for
almost 3 months now due to Manchin/GOP opposition and as far as I can tell
there's no reason to believe that changes. ~4 million kids thrust back
into poverty; child poverty rate up ~41% -- totally disappeared from DC
discourse

AOC, Cori, Jamaal, Rashida, Ilhan, and Ayanna all urged Democrats to make
sure Manchin couldn’t pass the bipartisan infrastructure bill WITHOUT also
passing Build Back Better. The Squad even voted against the establishment.
But the corporate Democratic Party went with Manchin’s plan anyway.

And now the core social and economic reforms of the Democratic Party
agenda are (still) being blocked by Joe Manchin. All leading up to
critical midterm elections.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/100978?refcode=em20220325-22560&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22560%2E1203867%2EhkFEfA ]We need to show that Justice Democrats and the Squad are the future of
politics, and the ones that will truly fight for economic, social, racial,
and environmental justice. Can you chip in a $3 donation
today to stand with the Squad and highlight the failures of the Democratic
Party?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/100978?refcode=em20220325-22560&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22560%2E1203867%2EhkFEfA ]Contribute $3

The Squad was right not to trust corporate Democrats like Joe Manchin.
Democrats promised the people they would pass Build Back Better if
Congress just passed a bipartisan infrastructure bill first. Now, Manchin
simply sneers at Build Back Better.

Cori, Jamaal, Alexandria, Rashida, Ilhan, and Ayanna were the only
Democrats to vote with the people.

When it comes down to it, many corporate Democrats do not want to pass
popular progressive policies. It’s on the Justice Democrats in Congress —
and the grassroots movement behind them — to hold the line in the fight
for working people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/100978?refcode=em20220325-22560&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=22560%2E1203867%2EhkFEfA ]We need to back up the Squad. We need to show that we are the future
of the Democratic Party, not the same old politicians voting with
corporate lobbyists and maintaining the status quo. Can you make a
$3 donation to Justice Democrats today to protect and
expand the Squad in Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/100978?refcode=em20220325-22560&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=22560%2E1203867%2EhkFEfA ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=22560%2E1203867%2EhkFEfA ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=22560%2E1203867%2EhkFEfA ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220325-22560-footer&t=1027&refcode2=22560_1203867_hkFEfA&akid=22560%2E1203867%2EhkFEfA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=22560%2E1203867%2EhkFEfA

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

---
### **Join INDems for our[2022 Crossroads Summit on Saturday, April 2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43384569/336958980/884541636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDQ0YzBiNS03OGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzu9mnVMU-tDBGS3CHvfpnJ7H4JpL-HxfGdywns45DA=&emci=31d677ee-6cac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e444c0b5-78ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) in Indianapolis for a day-long training for party leaders and candidate campaigns.**
**\- INDems Slam Mike Braun’s un-American Remarks on Interracial Marriage -** "Mike Braun’s words and views are not only un-American, but beneath any respectable person wishing to hold public office. The United States Supreme Court has affirmed many times that marriage equality in our country extends to any committed couple regardless of sex, race, orientation, or religious affiliation, and to question that legitimacy questions the very fabric of America and its people. When Indiana Democrats say the Indiana Republican Party's culture wars are diminishing our nation's future, this is exactly what we mean. Democrats implore all Hoosiers to ask themselves if they want to be associated with someone as embarrassing as Mike Braun and a form of partisanship that endorses white nationalist views — because these are the same views that led to the insurrection against our nation on January 6, 2021. If Mike Braun wants to question the legitimacy of anything, it should be his own standing as a United States Senator. He cheated his way into office and consistently shows that he does not represent us.” _**\- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party**_ "It is appalling to see a sitting U.S. Senator from Indiana claim the United States Supreme Court was wrong in deciding the legality of interracial marriage in our nation. Our nation's highest court rightfully decided decades ago that race should not prevent a committed couple from a loving marriage. To suggest that this issue be left to each state to decide is an affront to the rule of law and our rights as Americans under the Constitution. I condemn Mike Braun's comments because they are un-American and do not reflect the values of the nation I swore an oath - as a veteran and elected official - to serve and protect. Braun's comments have no place in our public discourse, and I urge U.S. Senator Todd Young to join me in condemning a form of views that should be left behind in our nation's past." **_\- Tom McDermott, Democratic Candidate for U.S. Senate_** **\- INDems Statement in Response to Governor Holcomb Signing Permitless Carry into Law -** “A majority of Hoosiers told Indiana Republicans directly they opposed permitless carry. State law enforcement echoed their opposition to the measure a year after Republicans defunded their departments. But unfortunately, Governor Eric Holcomb decided to put politics ahead of protecting the safety of Hoosier families by signing permitless carry into law. It’s important to stress that Democrats are doing everything possible to equip our first responders with investments needed to combat crime - thanks to the American Rescue Plan - but it appears the Indiana GOP’s culture wars will now create a reality where Hoosier families will lose loved ones due to a clearly preventable problem.” **_\- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party_** **\- Governor Holcomb Tells INGOP Their Culture Wars Crossed the Line with House Bill 1041 -** “The moment the Indiana High School Athletic Association admitted there was no unfair advantage occurring in women’s sports, it became clear House Bill 1041 was more about fulfilling a made up culture war than actually creating a better future for Hoosier children. Indiana Republicans even admitted their goal was more about abiding by national politics than solving today’s problems facing kids - and it’s why they partnered with a national hate group to pass House Bill 1041. It’s encouraging to see Governor Eric Holcomb tell his party that their culture wars have crossed the line. Signing House Bill 1041 into law would have put the lives of our children in jeopardy. However, this unnecessary debate has set a tone with kids that being transgender means something is wrong with them. It must be said that nothing is wrong and being transgender is exactly how God created you and is exactly who you are born to be. Indiana Democrats value and will advocate for the state’s transgender community, because they have a place in our state and future just as everyone else.” **_\- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party_** **\- Twelve Years In, the Affordable Care Act Continues to Create a Better Future for Hoosier Families - Thanks to the American Rescue Plan -** Indiana Democrats this week celebrated the continued success of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) and how it has delivered access to affordable health care to Hoosiers across Indiana twelve years after being signed into law by former President Barack Obama. This time, President Joe Biden’s American Rescue Plan is strengthening the national law, giving more Hoosiers access to affordable health care coverage while creating a better future for our families. **It bears repeating: The entire Indiana Republican Party opposed the Affordable Care Act and the American Rescue Plan. They put their culture wars and partisanship ahead of creating a brighter future for Hoosier families.** [According to the White House](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43384570/336958981/-816841329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDQ0YzBiNS03OGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzu9mnVMU-tDBGS3CHvfpnJ7H4JpL-HxfGdywns45DA=&emci=31d677ee-6cac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e444c0b5-78ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535), here’s how the American Rescue Plan is strengthening the Affordable Care Act for Hoosiers:
1. ****More than 156,000 Hoosiers secured health care coverage via the Rescue Plan** **
* ****This is a 15-percent increase prior to the passage of ARP****
****
2. ****Americans - including Hoosiers - saved about $800 in health care costs****

Thanks to leaders like Congressman André Carson and former elected officials such as Baron Hill, Joe Donnelly, Brad Ellsworth, and Pete Visclosky, Hoosiers living with pre-existing conditions could no longer be denied health care coverage. Further, the ACA allowed young Hoosiers to stay on their parents’ health care plans until the age of 26, and the law is responsible for creating and funding the state’s Healthy Indiana Plan (HIP) 2.0 - [providing more than 572,000 low-income Hoosiers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43384571/336958982/1470242395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDQ0YzBiNS03OGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzu9mnVMU-tDBGS3CHvfpnJ7H4JpL-HxfGdywns45DA=&emci=31d677ee-6cac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e444c0b5-78ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) access to health care.
**\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring -** **Regional Organizing Directors** The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at [https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43384572/336958983/1076440731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDQ0YzBiNS03OGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fzu9mnVMU-tDBGS3CHvfpnJ7H4JpL-HxfGdywns45DA=&emci=31d677ee-6cac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e444c0b5-78ac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) **Spring and Summer Interns** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
#### Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

#### _Intern Duties_
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

####
_Qualifications_
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

#### _How to Apply_
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org). ###

clean_body: | Join INDems for our in Indianapolis for a day-long training for party leaders and candidate campaigns. \- INDems Slam Mike Braun’s un-American Remarks on Interracial Marriage - "Mike Braun’s words and views are not only un-American, but beneath any respectable person wishing to hold public office. The United States Supreme Court has affirmed many times that marriage equality in our country extends to any committed couple regardless of sex, race, orientation, or religious affiliation, and to question that legitimacy questions the very fabric of America and its people. When Indiana Democrats say the Indiana Republican Party's culture wars are diminishing our nation's future, this is exactly what we mean. Democrats implore all Hoosiers to ask themselves if they want to be associated with someone as embarrassing as Mike Braun and a form of partisanship that endorses white nationalist views — because these are the same views that led to the insurrection against our nation on January 6, 2021. If Mike Braun wants to question the legitimacy of anything, it should be his own standing as a United States Senator. He cheated his way into office and consistently shows that he does not represent us.” \- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party "It is appalling to see a sitting U.S. Senator from Indiana claim the United States Supreme Court was wrong in deciding the legality of interracial marriage in our nation. Our nation's highest court rightfully decided decades ago that race should not prevent a committed couple from a loving marriage. To suggest that this issue be left to each state to decide is an affront to the rule of law and our rights as Americans under the Constitution. I condemn Mike Braun's comments because they are un-American and do not reflect the values of the nation I swore an oath - as a veteran and elected official - to serve and protect. Braun's comments have no place in our public discourse, and I urge U.S. Senator Todd Young to join me in condemning a form of views that should be left behind in our nation's past." \- Tom McDermott, Democratic Candidate for U.S. Senate \- INDems Statement in Response to Governor Holcomb Signing Permitless Carry into Law - “A majority of Hoosiers told Indiana Republicans directly they opposed permitless carry. State law enforcement echoed their opposition to the measure a year after Republicans defunded their departments. But unfortunately, Governor Eric Holcomb decided to put politics ahead of protecting the safety of Hoosier families by signing permitless carry into law. It’s important to stress that Democrats are doing everything possible to equip our first responders with investments needed to combat crime - thanks to the American Rescue Plan - but it appears the Indiana GOP’s culture wars will now create a reality where Hoosier families will lose loved ones due to a clearly preventable problem.” \- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party \- Governor Holcomb Tells INGOP Their Culture Wars Crossed the Line with House Bill 1041 - “The moment the Indiana High School Athletic Association admitted there was no unfair advantage occurring in women’s sports, it became clear House Bill 1041 was more about fulfilling a made up culture war than actually creating a better future for Hoosier children. Indiana Republicans even admitted their goal was more about abiding by national politics than solving today’s problems facing kids - and it’s why they partnered with a national hate group to pass House Bill 1041. It’s encouraging to see Governor Eric Holcomb tell his party that their culture wars have crossed the line. Signing House Bill 1041 into law would have put the lives of our children in jeopardy. However, this unnecessary debate has set a tone with kids that being transgender means something is wrong with them. It must be said that nothing is wrong and being transgender is exactly how God created you and is exactly who you are born to be. Indiana Democrats value and will advocate for the state’s transgender community, because they have a place in our state and future just as everyone else.” \- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party \- Twelve Years In, the Affordable Care Act Continues to Create a Better Future for Hoosier Families - Thanks to the American Rescue Plan - Indiana Democrats this week celebrated the continued success of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) and how it has delivered access to affordable health care to Hoosiers across Indiana twelve years after being signed into law by former President Barack Obama. This time, President Joe Biden’s American Rescue Plan is strengthening the national law, giving more Hoosiers access to affordable health care coverage while creating a better future for our families. It bears repeating: The entire Indiana Republican Party opposed the Affordable Care Act and the American Rescue Plan. They put their culture wars and partisanship ahead of creating a brighter future for Hoosier families. , here’s how the American Rescue Plan is strengthening the Affordable Care Act for Hoosiers: 1. **More than 156,000 Hoosiers secured health care coverage via the Rescue Plan **This is a 15-percent increase prior to the passage of ARP 2. Americans - including Hoosiers - saved about $800 in health care costs Thanks to leaders like Congressman André Carson and former elected officials such as Baron Hill, Joe Donnelly, Brad Ellsworth, and Pete Visclosky, Hoosiers living with pre-existing conditions could no longer be denied health care coverage. Further, the ACA allowed young Hoosiers to stay on their parents’ health care plans until the age of 26, and the law is responsible for creating and funding the state’s Healthy Indiana Plan (HIP) 2.0 - access to health care. \- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring - Regional Organizing Directors The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at Spring and Summer Interns The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field. We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applicants must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed * able to work on multiple tasks at once How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at mailto:lauren@indems.org. ### [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2965%2E3611125%2EQg27tK ][IMG]

Hi there—Emily, Tim’s Digital Fundraising Director here.

I just wanted to let you know that we’ll be sending you a few more emails
than normal (apologies in advance)—but please make sure you read them,
they’re very important.

Our Senate campaign is facing our biggest fundraising deadline to date. At
the end of the month, we’ll be filing our FIRST FEC report of 2022 and it
will set the tone for the rest of our race.

Once the clock strikes midnight on March 31, we’ll be required to share
how much we raised with EVERYONE—including the press, our supporters, and
Tim’s Republican opponents. And they’ll all be watching to see if we’ve
got the stuff to flip Ohio blue.

Posting a weak FEC report could leave us vulnerable to GOP attacks that
drown out our message and take us off track to win here in Ohio. It’s my
job to make sure that doesn’t happen.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9851?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2965%2E3611125%2EQg27tK ]We’re going to do everything we can to hit our $150,000 End-of-Quarter
goal and I’m hoping you can help us get there. Will you chip in $25 right
now to flip Ohio and expand our Democratic Senate majority?

Thanks in advance for your support and patience!

—Emily

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Republicans are trying to buy this race
| | |
---
Let us explain, friend:
_**FIRST,**_ Republicans realized that if Val Demings wins this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.
_**THEN,**_ polling showed her neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so national Republicans poured millions into Florida to stack the cards against her.
_**NOW,**_ Val Demings is falling short of her $10,000 grassroots fundraising goal. She needs to make up the difference before midnight, friend.
Republicans are trying to buy this seat – no matter how much money it takes – and Val Demings desperately needs more resources right now to compete with Rubio.
The last Florida Senate race was determined by _just_ over 10,000 votes, and her race is shaping up to be JUST as close. That means it could be YOUR single donation that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians and reach out to just enough voters to win.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chris=20Walsh=20via=20Biaggi=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Our upcoming End-of-Quarter push.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend — Starting tomorrow, our team will be sending you a lot of emails about our upcoming FEC End-of-Quarter deadline. So I wanted to take a minute to talk about what this deadline is, our goals, and why we need to hit them. [**If you’re already ready to pitch in, you can do that here, but otherwise, keep reading.**](https://biaggi-2022.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bed072e078e3cd8d31941e23&id=a816561d72&e=57c71b3a41) [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://biaggi-2022.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bed072e078e3cd8d31941e23&id=930bfba6f4&e=57c71b3a41) Every 3 months, candidates for federal office are legally required to report all donations they’ve received. We want to report a number that everyone on our team, including you, can be proud of — to show everyone watching that Alessandra has a lot of supporters who know she has what it takes to win this primary. **So we’ve set a goal of $7,439 more between now until March 31st.** Hitting this goal is especially important right now, because it’s the very first federal deadline of our primary. We can hit it if everyone reading this contributes, but not everyone will contribute, which is why we’re hoping YOU will. So please, pitch in today. You can use the link below: [**https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/go/March-Deadline**](https://biaggi-2022.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bed072e078e3cd8d31941e23&id=0038cef326&e=57c71b3a41) Thank you, in advance, for your support. Every contribution, no matter the amount, means a lot to Alessandra, and to everyone on our team. – Chris Chris Walsh
Campaign Manager, Biaggi for Congress [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://biaggi-2022.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bed072e078e3cd8d31941e23&id=37de53ee22&e=57c71b3a41)
---
| |
---
| Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe](https://biaggi-2022.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bed072e078e3cd8d31941e23&id=fb63048a4f&e=57c71b3a41&c=d22a68dd35)[ here](https://biaggi-2022.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bed072e078e3cd8d31941e23&id=f3cca8aaca&e=57c71b3a41).
---

So we’ve set a goal of $7,439 more between now until March 31st. Hitting this goal is especially important right now, because it’s the very first federal deadline of our primary. We can hit it if everyone reading this contributes, but not everyone will contribute, which is why we’re hoping YOU will. So please, pitch in today. You can use the link below: Thank you, in advance, for your support. Every contribution, no matter the amount, means a lot to Alessandra, and to everyone on our team. – Chris Chris Walsh Campaign Manager, Biaggi for Congress | | | Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can .

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Boys vs. Girls? Not in Sports!✊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ecf5a08e7f534f5e922d1f86e59c769b&_e=U36Tur2H31hAj8-CsSGOWMFLdSIikBjNB5QpBlCSDUz5ReWtI-hlL0MwAYyebEZSpbuvMcF5M6z03n6gRkdMk33FuEVDUEj58vX14buohX625zajy_rU6HJxKj6BhJhAfFXB7pngnwoP71YB15wF630YLKJQG-VxaVxPDR76s06DBC1mqYoFmBsDg9dkylePUP5Mr_Wj8BSzDWM-kv0JLjPupXcImNZmPrJGTTM_4lpssA6FcPI4Zm6wt8T-gyRPTb1KFbN_2WzZrDTg0ewrOdFtUWO58AcJ0Dfi8VdDGRCSr5ss_vazugyAgkG8sUXHXMruRBNhQn2f9Wk5RjMg5rqPu5R9Z5fZ-nC6idCELMThyIvfR8hVVoY3tl6TK8Jc8FXV1oqCelXcmZDtuaABtg%3D%3D) | |
---
**Boys Vs. Girls? Not In Sports!✊
**
I didn’t think I would ever be so lucky to have a daughter like Isabel. The day I officially adopted her was the best day of my life. She’s an amazing young woman: smart, driven, kind, and a gifted athlete to boot. That’s why I call her “the boss.” As any father would, I want her to have the best of life, and that means a fair shot at success.

That’s why I am disgusted with what the woke Left is doing to women’s sports. The radical Left is [sacrificing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ecf5a08e7f534f5e922d1f86e59c769b&_e=U36Tur2H31hAj8-CsSGOWHfJRrgPxoKChbRtjsYG8Bxirlt8-4QATeR4x3Jg5MSskxsgkR_N7XjA1yRZmmH4nW7jHscLnZNJuBFzVlPu8y8r3j_sbgZo0GeC5y0hQWVS3yO58qZ-4E8_SHloLmMWf1cRRPPiGhBCeBxMyn8UCL2wv8oiYX3mw4pMWEklBS5VQrKloh3RM1CwllyMojqL4VXb5bYuY-Bb3KasEKFFtBTsemyHLOUq2RLDeW_5ICgMoZRHwgOqSBriYIaj_MqPdfeyhMQO4YXKO5q4OBOY9o1zz9bGMY8Wge4csj4tx7ttmeqVUwnYtcJQAnkpqq7tS82ta_UlIAka7mvy1y7oeWJDm-fURVfXe4_HoeSE-oc6) the hard work of female athletes across this nation to appease an agenda that is straight-up nuts.

Last week at the NCAA swimming championships, Lia Thomas, a biological male, won the woman’s [500-yard freestyle.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ecf5a08e7f534f5e922d1f86e59c769b&_e=U36Tur2H31hAj8-CsSGOWAcgeMT-bEyN_OO-NX-woHwcn-1BtBNR08E2uiW6VGD1Df1rLTf3tr_ol4dlztJbxI5707D6DP0lpv3tkqYkG53ldF0Hu66I2Jz1ASApZNIuYJWoehjiUMs8o7oaqnVkFWyxSC0ywImSuD7o-Ekz59e88q3W-Epd46vHIhFZEGx9TV4EGVorHE37dmrRuuo62dJtBwgAGbg4zd8xhrEYGlb-DUD2qTYLGbzdhPtoKRAhBz5bDAnZcv4Dz4v7BUFFmIsNtOwTBn5xELn_qJu9wt0%3D) Let me break that down. A **male** won a **female** competition. The woman who came in second went home knowing first place should have been hers.

Can’t anybody see the problem with this?

I’m not trying to be mean or disrespectful, but it’s a fact that biological men and women are built differently. When you allow biological men to compete in women’s sports, you [rob](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ecf5a08e7f534f5e922d1f86e59c769b&_e=U36Tur2H31hAj8-CsSGOWOn1RlOnIB1P1Xj4Kon1x972kZWM78DJZ6cOjLJj8VkszULrggwuTtqbq-mfSXuxKPyx13DvWnvZTT-nEwG8ty9jvM6Dit4JSFZpvWiG0KSdwQ9bHJ_qB8eT6HLvrk1Z5AfusZ4mcypNeI1Rm_lMNwm6Noor1q5ldMAU4SSsCSqwpnmoNxD2QrVpPmvcaWPm5k6l4jftK16RSGOO8hhptzlUutetTyg5Ke-FvymdzA8bg_Dp0aiwL_NrJCL4N8wVduwkPoAA52R1iPcLcXsj_8QksJCTLdUB2jHKheIU1zhxGnqneShIPiNL0ABiNzs07q8GbdCrnO_S7N5urpjl4d4%3D) women of athletic victories and teach them that there’s no point in even trying to win a rigged game.

Protecting women’s sports is about women’s rights, and it’s also about teaching our kids fairness and letting them know that they have a shot at being the best if they put in the hard work. As a father to an awesome young woman, that’s what I want for my daughter and all of our daughters. That may not be “woke,” but it’s friggin’ common sense.
|
---
**“Bringing Food & Hope” 😀**
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ecf5a08e7f534f5e922d1f86e59c769b&_e=U36Tur2H31hAj8-CsSGOWIp7y67em_MfR4fBCH4knn_SnLX_rqaPC3tBQFaEoLNBOo54ZnMGuiwMqk9KEf6ph60AGlKYeRnOBQaXD8vjfOCy77oHejvAmFBYYstZyYmP-QyJTliSLzJn0YkqSW_kCrMdf3KX8BaUIRWF62vxGY6cAmg9VrbsnkmTfPZYoQeyk_U9k07xiPzIiN_hfS3PpgWjEp99gyaeZNuX9W1KVN9X1OcapGkkAIpD575A1IMTAiAeT59JYS-2YQycGHsu6YS1kQru5nJ1DEgdwK6mWcE%3D)
_Image courtesy of Fox News_
Special delivery!

This week I joined [Mobile Meals Kitchen](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ecf5a08e7f534f5e922d1f86e59c769b&_e=U36Tur2H31hAj8-CsSGOWIp7y67em_MfR4fBCH4knn_SnLX_rqaPC3tBQFaEoLNBOo54ZnMGuiwMqk9KEf6ph_0s6BNFZOTSdGQHkWoHn6lEgzCaNHDAwhpTBkRM3-kTcsb60U0mqc4k8c658cQLKT-zrKHTWq9acxS8I5CgQ8NOCGDAGc3jB0gSRv_naovpridEL1577dp-Vh94L2V_Jw1ah6SauLdtoVpBojOE9wOxSmBKJMPxpSlUFk_bAT-hOItaAgI_sajleEGSbEa9kXi9fEmIQCIeDnfp8kYhm2g%3D) to help deliver food, support, and safety checks to 1,200 stand-up senior citizens in need here in Knox County. Mobile Meals Kitchen is a great organization that has been feeding our seniors for...wait for it...50 years.

It was a real treat to connect with these special folks. My mom and dad were the kind of people who were always looking for ways to help their neighbors. This is what we do as Christians and as people—we look out for one another. I’m grateful we have organizations in our community like Mobile Meals Kitchen. If you want to learn more about this non-profit and how you can help, you can find out more by visiting: [https://www.knoxseniors.org/donate/](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ecf5a08e7f534f5e922d1f86e59c769b&_e=U36Tur2H31hAj8-CsSGOWCDxe662hkagOOXWodQ4RxLKyWRQMat65hAX51izA2uW8P7H4p_ieQYHEtNTbIyBMdPe33C49MulZzDPnfuyKUngEOV4fgAjYaYep1TkZvqx_DKQBQ19n15ROfI51OMlvaDL51W-3GGYcKK9ZIzU3Ut2YihAW3p0eWze2PKkf0fOqXjyE2MmdubLt3j6gDboCZBpQZ-U-G8LI515akzsjkukVuUMsBEbbR2EBrNDg8rzR63gHOMyq0o7f6QtLkZeqA%3D%3D)

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, With 11 days until the start of Early Voting and 39 days until Election Day, the race for the U.S. Senate is heating up. Jane continues to prove why she is the best candidate to pursue the America First agenda and take on Tim Ryan in November. With great performances at two debates, events across the state, and our great grassroots team contacting voters every day, Jane is heading into Early Voting with a head of steam. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Grit and Grace** Last Friday, at a debate hosted by FreedomWorks, Josh Mandel and Mike Gibbons’ embarrassing antics put Ohio’s Republican Senate seat in danger of losing to Tim Ryan. To quote Jane, “If I had been their mother, I would have grounded them.” That’s why the campaign has released our latest digital ad for this election entitled “Grit and Grace”. The Senate Majority is too important to leave to chance. We need Jane Timken’s leadership to beat Tim Ryan in November and represent Ohioans in the U.S. Senate. Take a look: [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=13ba2ca1307c4e1c98afbc5576e4b92a&_e=QjzMTAE_lnPMeBaNR-beOvupPDy-NjWu9-Lc_rpM3vjPfYnPhw5AFTnersStJGqtC3adjLKZJw-3h25EpPOQBxoEmKlgKfL38TwfOwb8mvbFWuiAwQqRTvNhJETIXttrFtF3IOl-qwlD9k8vuBM3_9h2FjCOuYPXq95hd9BIIp4VpReoTl1uDDIjv8odDMkv5AmYLURNLXHlkqbeLT8CyK586Ro5DmPmm2-MQ4cEZEy20beXCLRArJ-hTwLjcDz9IaGWRHWKPqVVuFKb4adWWTSnmIlmaagakx2x5QnGm9w%3D)
**>From the Trail**
Last Saturday, Jane was thrilled to join the Northeast Hamilton County Republican Club for their annual Pancake Breakfast. It was a huge event to honor Senator Rob Portman and fire up conservatives across Hamilton County.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=13ba2ca1307c4e1c98afbc5576e4b92a&_e=QjzMTAE_lnPMeBaNR-beOmi7MauORpOWr660VULUQAD_67yflhLO9c_A_ga418xbCLYSzYUdA8uRLY2K19iufACwLBrZD9l2U-0mzRDREJb37P1iFn_bi53Wn9iBct8yVXozHUXvAJqRlULTSqtueCfWcBAINd1AfmET648rqjePwvXToofiM0dXAOKGp5ErbaT5tppfic60khgV3dtgTu5KYGjs84gXgzdDMRlxiefZ3Ig4qAwvzMbNm3ORsS2UHih9dmBthRnU46wKF9PEtMKkxEz2GPTYrcbPBe-AC9yYcfApkKTN7EmdCOE1XFWtmQjlkj0NLNRoP38i180fHQ%3D%3D)
Traveling up 71 North, Jane spent the afternoon at the Ohio Cattlemen’s Association Ohio Beef Expo! As Senator, Jane will be a strong voice for Ohio’s diverse agriculture, farming, and beef industries that fuel and feed America.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=13ba2ca1307c4e1c98afbc5576e4b92a&_e=QjzMTAE_lnPMeBaNR-beOlI0hiU4n7GQwzAayg-z3L3M7t6s0DszY-MWd2VN311kaHPU9GA6xgkS7vcaE4h5grfb83UtK8wVxq67TmCeQfOL7Fz6BkvQqBGNS5zIV0xLoq041Y3qHfcowSyBvPkBSGR7J0dsPA1JVYY3ZeoCQ1zwv0p2C7A_a9yIyLkZZ4__QWFv2uuuIjlAuoo5Qe5Qk5CqM9G1LRsNjjy3zeC-e9oVzsc5j3z0YUf6fWc8byXCdgXkl2VeKIK8GXtZgPon-Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, With 11 days until the start of Early Voting and 39 days until Election Day, the race for the U.S. Senate is heating up. Jane continues to prove why she is the best candidate to pursue the America First agenda and take on Tim Ryan in November. With great performances at two debates, events across the state, and our great grassroots team contacting voters every day, Jane is heading into Early Voting with a head of steam. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Grit and Grace Last Friday, at a debate hosted by FreedomWorks, Josh Mandel and Mike Gibbons’ embarrassing antics put Ohio’s Republican Senate seat in danger of losing to Tim Ryan. To quote Jane, “If I had been their mother, I would have grounded them.” That’s why the campaign has released our latest digital ad for this election entitled “Grit and Grace”. The Senate Majority is too important to leave to chance. We need Jane Timken’s leadership to beat Tim Ryan in November and represent Ohioans in the U.S. Senate. Take a look: From the Trail Last Saturday, Jane was thrilled to join the Northeast Hamilton County Republican Club for their annual Pancake Breakfast. It was a huge event to honor Senator Rob Portman and fire up conservatives across Hamilton County. Traveling up 71 North, Jane spent the afternoon at the Ohio Cattlemen’s Association Ohio Beef Expo! As Senator, Jane will be a strong voice for Ohio’s diverse agriculture, farming, and beef industries that fuel and feed America. On Tuesday night, Jane was proud to earn the endorsement of the Preble County Republican Party with over 70% of the vote from the committee. The most important thing in this race is who can advance the America First agenda and win and the Preble County Republican Party knows that Jane is that candidate. Wednesday the campaign celebrated National Puppy Day by highlighting Jane’s dog Bubba across social media. Is this just another excuse to post a picture of Bubba? Absolutely, but he is an exceptionally good boy. Media Roundup On Monday, the first televised debate of the primary was put on by Fox 8 Cleveland. Jane showed exactly why she is the only candidate who can be trusted to pursue President Trump’s America First agenda and beat Tim Ryan in November. Take a look at some of the coverage from Jane’s great performance below: WATCH: Join Jane and Kellyanne Conway This Week! This week we are thrilled to have Former Adviser to President Trump, Kellyanne Conway, in state to support Jane’s candidacy. Join Jane and Kellyanne Conway in Cuyahoga County, Lorain County, or Lucas County this Tuesday! You can RSVP for each event at the links below: We hope to see you on the trail on Tuesday! I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | ---|---

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: FWD - Me, Bernie, and Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Now more than ever it’s critical we show everyone how much momentum there is behind H.R. 1976.
#
Peter, since Pramila emailed you yesterday, we got some big news:
**The House Oversight Committee will hold a hearing next week on H.R. 1976, more commonly known as the Medicare for All Act** — Pramila’s popular, necessary, and urgent solution to a broken, for-profit health care system that left more than 87 million Americans uninsured or underinsured during the COVID-19 pandemic.
Now more than ever it’s critical we show everyone how much momentum there is behind this legislation and the vision for a country that prioritizes people over profits. [**If you’re with Pramila in the fight against corporations, Big Pharma, and the status quo for a health care system that takes care of us all, add your name in support of Medicare for All right now.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220325-1132&t=1&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220325-1132&t=2&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)**
Thank you for taking action today! You can read Pramila’s original email below.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
* * *
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Pramila Jayapal**
Date: Thu, Mar 24, 2022
Subject: Me, Bernie, and Medicare for All
Peter — my friend, Senator Bernie Sanders, tweeted some timely words about Medicare for All.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220325-1132&t=3&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)
I introduced the House version of Medicare for All, H.R. 1976, last year with more than half of the Democratic caucus as co-sponsors. Bernie re-introducing M4A in the Senate will be a huge moment in our fight for single-payer health care in America.
[**Will you add your name in support of Medicare for All at this critical moment? Bernie and I are counting on grassroots supporters to step up and show the strength of our movement for guaranteed, high quality health care for all!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220325-1132&t=4&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220325-1132&t=5&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)**
Medicare for All is the popular, necessary, and urgent solution to a broken, for-profit health care system that leaves more than 87 million Americans uninsured or underinsured every year. This bill ensures everyone gets the care they deserve. That’s health care WITH primary care, vision, dental, prescription drugs, mental health, long-term supports and services, reproductive care, and more. It’s health care WITHOUT copays, private insurance premiums, deductibles, and other out-of-pocket costs.
The pandemic has only highlighted our broken, for-profit health system that was already leaving out far too many people and sticking folks with huge bills and a lifetime of medical debt — even as they cut pills in half and make impossible decisions between paying for their rent or their care.
We can no longer allow profits to get in the way of people’s health and well-being in this country. **With your help, Bernie and I will continue taking on corporations, Big Pharma, and the status quo as we organize and build up support for Medicare for All in Congress and across this country.**
[**If you’re with me and Bernie in the fight for Medicare for All, please add your name to support guaranteed health care for all. This is an important moment in our fight to ensure health care is a human right. Let’s put people over profits and care over corporations.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220325-1132&t=6&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/m4a_senate_2022/?source=em20220325-1132&t=7&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)**
We will prevail in passing single-payer health care legislation in America, but only if we keep our fight going.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220325-1132-footer&t=8&refcode2=1132_420207_VsXzs_&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=9&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1132%2E420207%2EVsXzs_)

name: Rick Scott
subject: Here’s what Democrats stand against:
body:
Peter, Democrats like Chuck Schumer are FURIOUS about my new plan to Rescue America.

But when they stand against my plan, here’s what they’re on the record against:

🇺🇸**Securing our border**
🇺🇸 **Promoting American energy **
🇺🇸 **Saying the pledge of allegiance**
🇺🇸 **.... and so much more!**

The radical Left have made themselves clear: they no longer care about the basic things that make America great.

In fact, they barely want to enforce our laws at all.

**My 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA will save our country from the socialist Left’s destruction, but I can’t put it into action without your help.**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220325-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220325-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&akid=3469%2E9716520%2EQxJPUe) | **" I'm personally asking you to chip in to help Democrats defend our Senate majority."**
---
**\- CHUCK SCHUMER**

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220325-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220325-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&akid=3469%2E9716520%2EQxJPUe)
---

Friend -- We have a make-or-break goal of raising $250,000 by Thursday's FEC deadline, and I need your help right now to hit it. **This _has_ to be a top priority for Democrats today:**

If we hit our goal, Democrats will have the resources to make CRUCIAL investments in Senate battleground states. We'll be in a _rock-solid_ position to expand our Senate majority!

But if we come up short, Democrats will NOT have the resources to make those crucial investments and Mitch McConnell's chances of taking back the Senate will skyrocket.

**[Please, I'm personally counting on you. Click here to give a contribution of $5 to defend our Senate majority!](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220325-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220325-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&akid=3469%2E9716520%2EQxJPUe)**

I need to make this clear: President Biden's historic agenda _hinges_ on our Democratic Senate.

But right now, our 50/50 majority hangs by a thread. Polling shows TIGHT races in key Senate battlegrounds, Mitch McConnell's allies are ready to spend MILLIONS to retake power, and they've _already_ launched attack ads against vulnerable Democratic senators.

Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports the Senate is a toss-up -- and for Democrats to keep the Senate, this grassroots team must step up. Every single donation matters now, whether it's $5 or $10.

**[I'm only asking you because this is absolutely crucial: Will you make a donation to elect Democrats and defend the Senate? Every single dollar you give will go DIRECTLY toward defending our Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220325-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220325-Schumer-Schumer1-Pros-sl1&akid=3469%2E9716520%2EQxJPUe)**
We need your help to defend our Senate majority. clean_body: All of America will be watching... | Peter, There’s now less than a week to go until the first FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline of 2022. We’re running out of time to hit our goal before we have to go public with our Q1 fundraising numbers on next month’s FEC report. I’m counting on your urgent support to ensure we hit our target and outraise the field in the race for Florida’s 27th Congressional District. Political observers from around the country are going to comb through our FEC report. They’ll be looking to see how our campaign is doing in this toss-up race that will decide the fate of the House majority. Nancy Pelosi and Donna Shalala will be closely watching as well, looking for any sign of weakness that they can exploit. I’m not exaggerating when I say this is the single most important fundraising deadline we’ve faced so far this election cycle. We CANNOT afford to come up short. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

Peter,

I’ve been incredibly lucky to receive support from so many Conservative patriots since launching my campaign. And boy do I need it.

I am in the fight of my life to be Connecticut’s next _Republican_ Senator and to oust a career politician _with a massive (and growing) bank account._ It’s no easy feat, but I’m up for the challenge, because I know it will be worth it when a **red wave** sweeps through the nation this November.

**Which leads me to why I’m emailing you today:** [**I’m reaching out to each and every conservative warrior who is tired of politicians putting America last – and asking that they personally endorse my campaign for election immediately.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b258670c99e841a68f31a461ffe7f650&_e=iTQEp0TJuNd58Sim2UaZfBFDdxynTr_RMXrVmn55q4mN56lJQ7uRsUZO2kIyiYDl3zvG3Zx1XRw88oYAFxH2LXrXv17JSTYkBFQZt8VMViIGIDUEYuE47M7hk0XApxPeNsn8IFcjkiKXbHbBmPgxXruV5NAabgyyQUx2Tkpn3INwM8nA5h783F9eHepygbG_LVxMhg013sDEpsy06vnZwjerGylsEWqUdsj9Lt8DNi98W-ZkgfD997-YBPCodE6nUcdY8Zf27XfcCYuevD0Q9lqxtVzvNACp24yTb03ZQ50XPRaRDZU9xdrfCnr-lKrX-3RsnjVqQvZKOjOPpU5GzWub9IRZewHbkl79jc8c16z8hUvp-Z8xnLCEC4UBGEL2NupP1wvZFYRGp7iOAzUJX-a8SidyJ5bxyLuE79a48IliSC_CCsCm1HWUXizhzwxtjoNnNX7HKsxynmgqSb97GKVJZvPdP2Yl9Vz90yYyVhJdTNNAUZAfl_93XsAEJxBJZi1rnmSKVttdK9qYYvgLNyaqkpgOUNfmOyvQ_atK4xgeka1A7yhpZ-Fmm6B6vRbE)

You already know that I would do anything to protect prosperity and defend freedom here in America – _otherwise I wouldn’t be running for a seat in the Senate._

As an immigrant from communist Cuba, a proud mother, wife, and a businesswoman, it breaks my heart to see what President Biden and his enablers (like my opponent) have done to this country. Only together, can we take our country back from the Left and get to work on cleaning up their disastrous mess. I’m counting on you today, Peter.

Georgians deserve a Senator who will stand up to the liberal left, put an end to sky-high inflation, stop out-of-control spending, make America energy independent, and restore our standing on the world stage! #

Hey team, we’re reaching out today to ask for your support.
**Next Thursday, March 31, is the Q1 public reporting deadline — and right now, we are not on track to reach our goal of bringing in 1,000 grassroots contributions before the deadline passes. **
Here’s why reaching this goal is so important:
Every three months, candidates for federal office have to report their fundraising to the Federal Election Commission. The FEC is tasked with collecting and reporting election data, including campaign fundraising and finances. Federal campaigns like ours submit reports to the FEC on a quarterly basis.
Political pundits, the media, and potential opponents use these reports to gauge the support behind our movement and the strength of our grassroots campaign.**It’s a way of creating transparency in our elections. And it’s also an important test of our team’s strength.**
With a primary opponent and multiple GOP opponents eyeing Mondaire’s seat, it’s incredibly important we publish strong numbers to fend off well-funded challengers.
**[That’s why we’re asking: Will you consider pitching in $5 or $10 before next week’s FEC deadline to help reach our fundraising goal? name: Team Cranley-Fedor
subject: Ohio is a MESS right now 🤦‍♂️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
| Hi friend — You’ve heard John and Teresa say for _months_ that DeWine and the GOP have driven our state into the dirt, and if you’ve seen the news, you know that’s more true than ever before. Just look at the mess they’ve made lately: **❌ Gov. Mike DeWine just signed permitless concealed carry into law,** endangering Ohioans across the state by allowing citizens to carry guns in public without a license. **❌ The Ohio Supreme Court just rejected the GOP’s THIRD attempt to produce redistricting maps,** throwing our state elections into further chaos and confusing voters. This is exactly why John and Teresa are running to kickstart our comeback — _Ohio deserves better than this._ **We could be ushering in a legal cannabis industry, or building a massive solar farm, or reforming our criminal justice system.** Instead, DeWine and the GOP are dragging our state down. **[Friend, rush a donation right now to help John and Teresa win this race, send DeWine packing, and mop up the mess in Columbus>>> We need ideas, not distractions, and that’s exactly what John and Teresa bring to the table for Ohio voters. Together, they’ll: ✅ Revitalize our manufacturing sector to help rebuild our middle class
✅ Legalize cannabis to generate crucial tax revenue
✅ Build out Ohio’s clean-energy infrastructure and expand energy access And...so much more! But first we need to win this race, and that starts with YOU, friend — **we need your support _right now!_** **[The Ohio GOP has made a mockery of our state, friend. subject: Senator Jim Nielsen Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
| | |
---
| | | “This year’s race for California Attorney General is the best opportunity we have to break the status quo in Sacramento and elect a Republican to statewide office. Nathan Hochman has the experience and dedication to serve as a great Attorney General, and perhaps most importantly, has built a campaign capable of winning in November. He has my full support and endorsement” **\- California State Senator Jim Nielsen**
---
| Welcome to the team, Senator Jim Nielsen!

Senator Nielsen has had a long and distinguished career serving Northern California. With over 20 years of legislative experience, he brings an unparalleled level of experience and knowledge to the table. Throughout his time in the legislature, he has never shied away from bold policy proposals to improve public safety in California
---
|
---
| Senator Nielsen joins Assembly Republican Leader James Gallagher and Assemblymembers Waldron, Voepel, Choi, Nguyen, Chen, Lackey, Smith, and Flora in supporting our campaign.

As your next Attorney General, I look forward to working with members of the State Senate and Assembly to restore public safety in California and tackle our toughest issues: rising crime, homelessness, and the fentanyl epidemic.

Our current appointed Attorney General has proven himself unable and unwilling to advance solutions to these issues. He would rather play politics with people's safety than do what's right for California. This needs to change and it starts with electing a new Attorney General.

Nathan Hochman
_Candidate for California Attorney General_
---
| |

clean_body: | | | | | | “This year’s race for California Attorney General is the best opportunity we have to break the status quo in Sacramento and elect a Republican to statewide office. Nathan Hochman has the experience and dedication to serve as a great Attorney General, and perhaps most importantly, has built a campaign capable of winning in November. He has my full support and endorsement” \- California State Senator Jim Nielsen | Welcome to the team, Senator Jim Nielsen! Senator Nielsen has had a long and distinguished career serving Northern California. With over 20 years of legislative experience, he brings an unparalleled level of experience and knowledge to the table. Throughout his time in the legislature, he has never shied away from bold policy proposals to improve public safety in California | | Senator Nielsen joins Assembly Republican Leader James Gallagher and Assemblymembers Waldron, Voepel, Choi, Nguyen, Chen, Lackey, Smith, and Flora in supporting our campaign. As your next Attorney General, I look forward to working with members of the State Senate and Assembly to restore public safety in California and tackle our toughest issues: rising crime, homelessness, and the fentanyl epidemic. Our current appointed Attorney General has proven himself unable and unwilling to advance solutions to these issues. He would rather play politics with people's safety than do what's right for California. This needs to change and it starts with electing a new Attorney General. Nathan Hochman Candidate for California Attorney General | | | "Donate to Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022" | | Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022 FPPC ID 1437955 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

**Now, we’re facing our most important fundraising deadline yet. March 31st is the first Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline of the year, and it’s crucial that we have strong numbers to report.

name: Sarah Godlewski for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
If we want to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat blue, we need to take some big risks. Team — I made a very difficult decision this month.

It’s clear that with Republicans having more than $200 million to pour into Wisconsin and Ron Johnson already flooding the airwaves with his own campaign ads, we would need to fight back earlier than any of us had anticipated.

So I approved an ambitious paid media plan that would get us up on TV with our own ads immediately. The money wasn’t in the budget, but if we want to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat blue, we need to take some big risks.

Getting Sarah’s message in front of as many Wisconsin voters as possible is the most important thing we can do to win this race. And I felt good about making a tough call like this because I knew that if we asked, you’d step up to help fill the budget hole we created by going up on TV early — and many of you did. Big time.

The problem is, it wasn’t enough to fill the gap. We still have about 17% left to go to keep our ads running in Wisconsin. So, I’m hoping you can step up right now — for Sarah, for the team, and for those who deserve a better U.S. Senator than Ron Johnson.

clean_body: If we want to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat blue, we need to take some big risks. Team — I made a very difficult decision this month. It’s clear that with Republicans having more than $200 million to pour into Wisconsin and Ron Johnson already flooding the airwaves with his own campaign ads, we would need to fight back earlier than any of us had anticipated. So I approved an ambitious paid media plan that would get us up on TV with our own ads immediately. The money wasn’t in the budget, but if we want to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this Senate seat blue, we need to take some big risks. Getting Sarah’s message in front of as many Wisconsin voters as possible is the most important thing we can do to win this race. And I felt good about making a tough call like this because I knew that if we asked, you’d step up to help fill the budget hole we created by going up on TV early — and many of you did. Big time. The problem is, it wasn’t enough to fill the gap. We still have about 17% left to go to keep our ads running in Wisconsin. So, I’m hoping you can step up right now — for Sarah, for the team, and for those who deserve a better U.S. Senator than Ron Johnson. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Look, I knew we would be taking a huge risk when I gave the green light on this, but I also knew that folks like you have seen us through thick and thin. Sleepy Joe and his Democrat colleagues will never follow through on a proper investigation of Hunter’s laptop. That’s why we need patriots like you to stand up. When President Trump mentioned the Biden family’s suspicious business deals in Ukraine, Russia, and China- the Left triggered his impeachment! Now the truth is coming out, and the woke left is brushing it under the rug. Democrats will NEVER hold President Biden and his family accountable for their shady dealings in Ukraine. We NEED aRepublican House majority to hold the Left accountable for this huge coverup. Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Team Lira
subject: What John’s been up to
body:
| Peter, it's been a busy week on the ground for Team Lira. John is using his time to travel all over — to both connect with voters around the district and show up in support of other progressive leaders in Texas. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43388683/336975810/1232780213?refcode=em20220325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGVlYzVkMi04YWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QqcH7KKx4SXi3LLC90jYPl-vhs9YJbhIqTlxbqGbrY=)
_John speaking with a voter from TX-23._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43388684/336975811/1232780213?refcode=em20220325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGVlYzVkMi04YWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QqcH7KKx4SXi3LLC90jYPl-vhs9YJbhIqTlxbqGbrY=)
_John in El Paso stopping on the way to meet voters._ _[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43388685/336975812/1232780213?refcode=em20220325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGVlYzVkMi04YWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QqcH7KKx4SXi3LLC90jYPl-vhs9YJbhIqTlxbqGbrY=)_
_John at the Phil Hardberger Park Conservancy Event with supporters._ In addition to this, John participated in the Phil Hardberger Park Conservancy Event and the Democratic Convention to support his fellow Texan candidates. Peter, this race is about so many things — it’s about giving a voice to the people of TX-23, but also supporting other Democrats to turn Texas blue and create meaningful change for our country. In order to accomplish all that, we need to build a movement that is not just about one candidate or one district, but about all of us coming together to fight for the things that matter. **[That’s why John is prioritizing meeting with so many different leaders and voters from across the district and across Texas. Can you chip in now to make sure our team can continue this vital work on the ground?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43388686/336975813/1232780213?refcode=em20220325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGVlYzVkMi04YWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QqcH7KKx4SXi3LLC90jYPl-vhs9YJbhIqTlxbqGbrY=)** **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43388687/336975814/1232780213?refcode=em20220325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGVlYzVkMi04YWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QqcH7KKx4SXi3LLC90jYPl-vhs9YJbhIqTlxbqGbrY=)** Let’s get to work, Team Lira | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43388688/336975815/-593876365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGVlYzVkMi04YWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QqcH7KKx4SXi3LLC90jYPl-vhs9YJbhIqTlxbqGbrY=&emci=caeec5d2-8aac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=cdeec5d2-8aac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25686212) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43388689/336975816/-1869672870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGVlYzVkMi04YWFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QqcH7KKx4SXi3LLC90jYPl-vhs9YJbhIqTlxbqGbrY=&emci=caeec5d2-8aac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=cdeec5d2-8aac-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25686212)

## Will the GOP celebrate the biased media at this years White House Correspondents Dinner?
Senator Rand Paul joined us on _Spicer & Co_ this week and gave his take, WATCH:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=768f2a79d8&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |

## VP Kamala Harris is having some staffing issues...
This week [VP Harris’s National Security Adviser announced they were stepping down](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1ce7d4e578&e=f6564bbe3b). Seem like really bad timing, but it does seem like a pattern. Watch:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6a7558deb4&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[White House Report Card: No dazzle, just baffle from Biden & Co.](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4b9c564059&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Examiner [Hunter Biden story is Russian disinfo, dozens of former intel officials say](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e0745f2b40&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Politico in October 2020I wonder how the geniuses that signed this letter claiming the Hunter Biden laptop story was “disinformation” feel now? [Alaksa U.S. Rep Don Young has died, according to former aides ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3413ea6026&e=f6564bbe3b)— via ADN[America Has a Free Speech Problem](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=93509a3032&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The New York Times Amazing that a publication that has been at the forefront of quelling speech and opinions on the right has the gall to print this. [CDC email: Let’s do better with ‘our data’](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e2e4c90ad3&e=f6564bbe3b) — via PoliticoOops, CDC says they screw up but want to do better[Bloomberg op-ed says letting pets die of cancer can beat inflation ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=55be44d774&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Daily Mail
| | | | | | |
---
Last week I asked if people thought that the bill to permanently change the clocks to Daylight Saving Time would pass the house. The results were close, check them out [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0208f8bf31&e=f6564bbe3b). Now I want to know:

Peter,

My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan.

I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - [**and I need your support today in order to win this race and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4c8c0ec8c6a2435dba53d5f7eed6abd6&_e=Wz7pSsuDROwKNcgNx57wyDt5keBpDgimR1p3rtKY4zER3UVZSKeW8qs2qEozDgRUPXTJJTLpaZKhTYPPaci7_NuX5eYgtshQFqCg0u4dpJKJ_UYGOgBIwGL6IO9nHU3rTTIYUdf4_4It-qLeSf1a1awq0-WXBUVdounhZblmKw00vclcqHdBEmQhoTqvQnuHc3jupXp--WF_uRPWq8H92M9XIaycwg0nOyp3kyLNfv0vm9PDIGP7BWCMZTB80gQ3gH7Rce7bYB_qiswhE_5Vk91Qsv3Gwld5HCafa0qeWADfDMB5FggG6BN4kNWMS5gQ-8Akop6QpfsxBZ93_4cPg_MmYTl8NYxkqyi-mcN_QVC9WZ_05ktrbsroc7QN8x-sq5ydcBIMQtE90fL05gPTnUl14Bb2w8R_O4pxNwIBkxE%3D)

Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect.

As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives.

I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means:
1. Securing our border
2. Standing for life
3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and
4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement.

Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Peter.

I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. [**Will you make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect. As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives. I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means: 1. Securing our border 2. Standing for life 3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and 4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement. Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Peter. I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. | | | | | | | Washington needs to STOP the games and fight for what’s right. If I’m lucky enough to be the next U.S. Senator from Arizona I will ALWAYS fight for YOU, protect our values, and stand up for what we believe in. For Liberty, Maj. Gen. name: John Fetterman
subject: “that dude in shorts”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
TBH, our kids are quite literally depending on us to get this right.
#
Derek,
You might know me as Governor Tom Wolf’s Anger Translator (aka Lieutenant Governor of the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania).
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45964?refcode=em20220325-5128&t=1&akid=5128%2E434096%2Eb_kLAB)
You might know me as “that dude in the shorts.”
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45964?refcode=em20220325-5128&t=2&akid=5128%2E434096%2Eb_kLAB)
But I want everyone to know that **the *single* most important achievement in my life has been being a dad (alongside Gisele) to our three amazing kids: Karl, Gracie, and August.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45964?refcode=em20220325-5128&t=3&akid=5128%2E434096%2Eb_kLAB)
One really tough thing about campaigning for U.S. Senate is how much time we spend on the road, meeting with people across all 67 counties of Pennsylvania.
Honestly, knowing Gisele and I would have to spend some weekends away from home made us think long + hard about launching this campaign to flip Pennsylvania blue.
**But here’s why we ultimately decided to go for it, as a family, Derek.**
It's never lost on me that our future generations are going to feel the effects of what our national + state governments do today. On so many issues, from gun violence prevention, to education, to health care, to climate, **our kids are quite literally depending on us to get this right.**
That’s why Karl, Gracie, and August are the reason I can make the following pledge + mean every single word: If you help send me to the U.S. Senate, I will fight for you + your family just the same way I'd fight for my own. That's what I believe we all deserve from our Senators.
**[So if you're with me, if you’re ready to make this country a better place for our kids and theirs, and if you’re ready to fight hard for what really matters, will you please chip in $5 or even just a couple bucks today? I'd be so deeply grateful for every single ounce of your support.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45964?amount=5&refcode=em20220325-5128&t=4&akid=5128%2E434096%2Eb_kLAB)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45964?amount=5&refcode=em20220325-5128&t=23&akid=5128%2E434096%2Eb_kLAB)**
Not a day goes by that I don't feel beyond humbled by this team.
Thank you.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. I’m also a dad to two very special rescue pups, Levi + Artie. They demand to be included 😂
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45964?refcode=em20220325-5128&t=24&akid=5128%2E434096%2Eb_kLAB)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220325-5128-footer&t=25&refcode2=5128_434096_b_kLAB&akid=5128%2E434096%2Eb_kLAB)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

It doesn’t take many $27 donations to reach that — can you help by donating now, so I reach my goal by midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43391362/337011152/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDYxNDE4Zi1iNGFjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2WDheVx5DV8ZH7B6Djh0ZQpwOTlrZJfKYr3a7quaLA=) Rent rose 19% last year.
